name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: In their eyes, they’ve got me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
Whatever it takes...

| Friend,
---
Many friends and kind souls often ask how I do it.
---
_How do I keep going, keep fighting to defend my good name and help President Trump make our country great again after all the Deep State has done to me?_
---
Well, you see, even after all they’ve put me through...
---
...Even after these rabid leftists labeled me a **“DEAD MAN WALKING,” RAIDED** my home, **ARRESTED** me, took a **MUGSHOT** of me, forced me into **BANKRUPTCY** , and __NOW__ , are even taking one last shot at **JAILING** me for the rest of my life as an innocent man, the _TRUTH_ still remains...
---
Being an enemy of the Left’s Deep State like President Trump is not something to fear,_**it’s a badge of honor – a sign that you were willing to take the arrows for what you know is RIGHT!**_
---
When these Democrat crooks first had me booked in one of the most violent jails in America, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757**...
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOpSAQRb8GdxooFJ4LFj1j3PVk0pmkl4YHpZIIGkA77-8nzPgDvSOHWzd1Up_v07t2mwvLL-1RmctNMU0u5BVdxBemvOLrwmXPHiegIGoKNUAJscoqYwWHChWTkkkBou2qVenHc6a2N-2TGkS0sxZ931HTCW47_ZCVU6WJAgADJqFtGO-lADb3TFKwrSQtPQ-rM6bG7CFhvHR2F7oQ9vLaQ2N2X21qzflIhL8RGAmMCc0ZsflyIaItCQJjPO2rtjhjSFjneKZMYJyfndFA-Ww7oLwv03w8s5-M9od2SyB8-L8hexAQ5cejdacnfECv3XbDbAgf_vz8qG8devO0n9Eg4cPH5_TjZmYPGUMmfPj9VkVljy-3bS6J4rqUzn9K-ZsXuBT8DQAA___I3JFP)
__
---
_And now, to show these left-wing thugs that good and honest Americans like** _YOU_** will not stand by as a rogue, politicized Democrat attorney general tries to destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking for your support to help raise the $200,000 needed for my __new__ defense trust to finally WIN the battle for my freedom and justice._
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOpSAQRb8GdxooFJ4LFj1j3PVk0pmkl4YHpZIIGkA77-8nzPgDvSOHWzd1Up_v07t2mwvLL-1RmctNMU0u5BVdxBemvOLrwmXPHiegIGoKNUAJscoqYwWHChWTkkkBou2qVenHc6a2N-2TGkS0sxZ931HTCW47_ZCVU6WJAgADJqFtGO-lADb3TFKwrSQtPQ-rM6bG7CFhvHR2F7oQ9vLaQ2N2X21qzflIhL8RGAmMCc0ZsflyIaItCQJjPO2rtjhjSFjneKZMYJyfndFA-Ww7oLwv03w8s5-M9od2SyB8-L8hexAQ5cejdacnfECv3XbDbAgf_vz8qG8devO0n9Eg4cPH5_TjZmYPGUMmfPj9VkVljy-3bS6J4rqUzn9K-ZsXuBT8DQAA___I3JFP)
__
---

[DEFEND RUDY](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkcGOpSAQRb8GdxooFJ4LFj1j3PVk0pmkl4YHpZIIGkA77-8nzPgDvSOHWzd1Up_v07t2mwvLL-1RmctNMU0u5BVdxBemvOLrwmXPHiegIGoKNUAJscoqYwWHChWTkkkBou2qVenHc6a2N-2TGkS0sxZ931HTCW47_ZCVU6WJAgADJqFtGO-lADb3TFKwrSQtPQ-rM6bG7CFhvHR2F7oQ9vLaQ2N2X21qzflIhL8RGAmMCc0ZsflyIaItCQJjPO2rtjhjSFjneKZMYJyfndFA-Ww7oLwv03w8s5-M9od2SyB8-L8hexAQ5cejdacnfECv3XbDbAgf_vz8qG8devO0n9Eg4cPH5_TjZmYPGUMmfPj9VkVljy-3bS6J4rqUzn9K-ZsXuBT8DQAA___I3JFP)
---

Look, this Democrat attorney general and her cronies know full well the situation I’m in.
---
They know that a _federal_ pardon from President Trump won’t save me from their bogus _state-level_ charges.
---
They know I was already forced to the point of **_bankruptcy_** – and that the top-notch legal defense team required to beat this SHAM case is precisely the kind I can’t afford.
---
**_In their eyes,_THEY’VE_ _GOT_ _ME_. _**
---
_No pardon.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill. _
---
But I beg to differ, because even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: **_THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_**!
---
**So, with my back against the wall as an 81-year old man who's taken on mobsters, faced terrorists, battled corruption, and _NEVER_ _SURRENDERED_ , I’m now turning to YOU – the American people – at this final hour to help me secure my freedom and justice once and for all.**

body:
https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D

A Special Message from our SponsorPlease note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of Parler and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by Parler.
78x Market Reach
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

Bitcoin proved something important.

It showed the world that digital scarcity matters — that people are willing to hold value outside fiat systems.

But markets don’t stand still.

Today, even Bitcoin’s strongest advocates like Michael Saylor are discovering a quiet truth:
Bitcoin works best when the price is rising.

Gold works in every environment.

And right now, gold has entered a new phase.

At $5,000+ an ounce, gold isn’t rallying.

It’s resetting.

It’s no longer trading as a hedge.

It’s trading as money again.

Central banks are buying.

Trust in paper systems is fracturing.

And most importantly:

Gold is going digital.

Not metaphorically.

Structurally.

Billions of dollars are already moving into tokenized gold — blockchain-based representations of real gold — while much of the crypto market treads water.

That’s not speculation.

That’s recognition.

Which brings us to NatGold.

NatGold is not another crypto token.

It is the first system designed to digitally mine gold — transforming verified, in-ground gold into a digitally native monetary asset without extracting a single ounce.

- No bulldozers.
- No vaults.
- No storage fees.

Just real gold, certified by geology and made liquid at digital speed.

This is what comes
https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
after Bitcoin .

And right now, there is still a brief window to position before price discovery begins.

More than 118,451 NatGold Tokens have already been reserved by investors across 161 countries — representing over $355 million in pre-market demand, secured quietly before global trading begins.

Because of this demand, February 24, 2026 is the final day to reserve NatGold Tokens pre-market.

The first tokenization event is now just weeks away.

Reserving tokens does not require payment today.

It simply secures your place ahead of global trading — before access is controlled by price instead of position.

This is how new monetary assets are born.

Quietly at first.

Then all at once.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
Click here to reserve your NatGold Tokens now — before price replaces position.

No obligation today.

Just a place at the front of a market that’s about to exist.

To your wealth,

Brian Hicks

President,
Angel Investment Research

P.S. Windows like this don’t close loudly.

They close quietly — and reappear only as prices.

The window closes February 24.
https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
Reserve your NatGold Tokens now.

Deep State bureaucrats declared total war with no rules and no mercy

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=64f6c324d58c4515a71fdc22da977355&_e=S5a0UZb1ClT46L3xePgkuDk4uOR90syJeNgUbHQSeunsgH4a89saIfdPnYjxxn4xv1g9lXM8RqM00f8_d1Hj63HcjicfRxUYQwA8g2Hz7GjjXyE9yBY-4s-tCl8RCy8-R-UbOVf4hXwqvX9MQCj-4LKindy5J-VxtjIRG5TxKNfDjjq11rfuzWjgdyIqcgU_CFTVVzXgYKmltHHshV_fuz8YI_koF6GHHSO9v3rLyrodMiiZk7DluNYHd928kkfMO9hAbtX6Fwy5V4_Bq-WMmofX3gQ1_zvuW1KQvNNLse099nUHJSskJ100OXUmjRVcS2O1g9Z0ghB0XmfpDKvpx6n-SnlgC-x_UGY5UIO5kU2xP9OzOQkO4SfPxdiac4kclHXJvjIjgdVoWgBZ_6irTP_zp4zX1SO_wTEXoJElMzViW6VD1EMet2LdL9w_TmUN04kRroW4H2KSbQo3iWzSf4zJDxa4ezgHkhJbCGSdYyminwb3ZzLVziCpeW9cXSaMC2vlWWG1I-Nnq-JjlKzEWuaHfDayi2FY6lfAkq2fVfqE5NhsbHuIc12r2K9L0wEt4tt-pFS2X40zq8FHVHah0cnBVjusV3g430UMCIOkcjbBra0nlDKKZ4QMH7ANqQNcEwHYcIx9ERbIqn9-U_PJeDma2S1CKUP4_DBpieDYoSHK5ehThE4_0gS88YrYiwd7)

Fellow Patriot,
The war on President Trump started the instant he stepped off that golden escalator in 2015 and promised to put America First.
**The Democrat Machine, their media pawns, and entrenched Deep State bureaucrats declared total war with no rules and no mercy.**
They hit him with the **Russia witch hunt** that dragged on for years, costing hundreds of millions and tearing the country apart.
When that collapsed, they pivoted straight to the **impeachment effort** – a manufactured crisis built on lies, designed to nullify your vote and remove a duly elected President.
And even after they lost, they didn’t stop. They kept coming – _**more investigations, lawfare traps, endless smears, corrupt indictments and convictions.**_
Through all this and worse, President Trump survived, persevered and prevailed – winning a stunning comeback for a second term to help save this country we love so dearly.
**_But the radicals never quit. They’re still burning with rage._**
**And now, Alexander Vindman – the man who helped to orchestrate the entire failed impeachment effort and nearly killed MAGA – is back. And he's out for cold, hard revenge.**
**He just launched a campaign to hijack Florida's critical U.S. Senate seat in one of this year’s biggest special elections. And within 24 hours, liberal donors pumped in an eye-popping $1.7 million with much more on the way.**
**This is no longer a normal race._It is straight, personal revenge politics._**
[PITCH IN NOW](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=64f6c324d58c4515a71fdc22da977355&_e=S5a0UZb1ClT46L3xePgkuDk4uOR90syJeNgUbHQSeunsgH4a89saIfdPnYjxxn4xv1g9lXM8RqM00f8_d1Hj63HcjicfRxUYQwA8g2Hz7GjjXyE9yBY-4s-tCl8RCy8-R-UbOVf4hXwqvX9MQCj-4LKindy5J-VxtjIRG5TxKNfDjjq11rfuzWjgdyIqcgU_CFTVVzXgYKmltHHshV_fuz8YI_koF6GHHSO9v3rLyrodMiiZk7DluNYHd928kkfM9j_fMLnswD7p1F7BTtk1AEsBzpJVGPdHEJnzOTTWRh3JQq-5mUbTJPtRRzTZ3qw6SAASj6GvsUPfJYauGozv9nVMlrQU8BYcwf4Zdp7lofrAZzTYwV6QwpDXlTkueGiYsFKrgt5Ex6R5Nh3yQXWE62ISx5z_rjzmHZSkd9lZKNKNU9-JUVlXcIaupwh4KuN6Si1Ju3L4x_gLiEBc33smbe-6Bx2ilG8ziNe3khyb8VC1fwvJvfxaRwfkPtF8X7Qp-B8CVRFpq6QsE5UajYHDbuduLxnsm76yIXixrt8WmKG9eFEpIc6oH2fXPS_kNs0Uj4_l-hhbuV35JmRBJjgTgBFV5EajrYMy2YxUOtMMcSAnpaaBN43L0kp80SVZSBiv_HHbzux3K5a0hwP4IVoIh_k2dB3Qq60eRlSbib7bTH17o3pHCBG_tbLxKwqWswtI)
I was honored to be appointed to fill Florida’s U.S. Senate seat once Marco Rubio joined the Cabinet. **And now, with President Trump’s complete and total endorsement, I’m running to win it outright.** It will be one of the biggest and most expensive special elections of the year, but I’m committed to defending President Trump and the America First Agenda that we all voted for.
Remember this – if we lose, our majorities vanish, our agenda stalls, and the country we fought for is lost. **We are not allowing that.**
[**We know you can't personally cancel out $1.7 million in radical, anti-Trump money. But you can cancel out one anti-Trump donor's donation of $25 or more, and you can do it now.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=64f6c324d58c4515a71fdc22da977355&_e=S5a0UZb1ClT46L3xePgkuDk4uOR90syJeNgUbHQSeunsgH4a89saIfdPnYjxxn4xv1g9lXM8RqM00f8_d1Hj63HcjicfRxUYQwA8g2Hz7GjjXyE9yBY-4s-tCl8RCy8-R-UbOVf4hXwqvX9MQCj-4LKindy5J-VxtjIRG5TxKNfDjjq11rfuzWjgdyIqcgU_CFTVVzXgYKmltHHshV_fuz8YI_koF6GHHSO9v3rLyrodMiiZk7DluNYHd928kkfMdmWmix7D6JAAUKIz4AL8_T-NbWQ3-8FUNEwpBkg12WfOmV3MiR8tKyAIf4SIeU7MWmN7M9JrD2BSb5RlkCtQ03HA_leNd_WicHQeh0isC9P-Jly7iLtuNNXkQFnizAYF2P1Z_NkQuU_6vgegdE9ZIqnZA_TmJO6JRzOgfnzBqqbDpfwUWMf3nwabgYEpnpQtvIW0HApYI06O6zhnZXBF0uKZVhyGBHyedSYib62vJU9UTdgLMvUXX-MhOWUrkisHoo9WZiMM_p7oYul8Wm9zWYb2WsK458qY-4DcsoD7XzcdqsPFQhd98G9snL0xdRwIdaUx5PAE9OGaszI62hxaXlN-Q-Rgrv3kUyf5jMMEN7lLPdgA-Uru8k_KHocRfRoT-9ngPKa728Wpz9n0af_53yWBRgxJfYDLU7JH_UvG4GKzBsQFRphtn3sFAWoj5LyA)
**_Are you in?_**
The line is drawn, and it's time to bury the endless vendetta against our President and our movement.
Thank you for your commitment.
Sincerely,Ashley Moody

body:
I’m sorry to email so early on a Sunday

Morning, Derek! I’m sorry to email so early on a Sunday. But like so many hard-working Pennsylvanians, I don’t have the kind of job that clocks out at 5pm on Friday afternoon. Hell, a traditional nine to five was never up my alley in the first place. In my mind — and in so many Pennsylvanians’ minds — there’s always more work to get done. And there’s no better time to get it done than the present. **That’s why I’m reaching out. The truth is, the far-right is working nights and weekends just like we are. They’re determined. They’re focused. And they’re willing to spend whatever it takes to win this election.** [_**Derek, we cannot underestimate our opponents. We have to work like Pennsylvania’s future depends on it... because it does. So even though I know it’s early, I need to ask: Will you make a donation of any amount this morning?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125878394/603221332/-1395620021?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=35&refcode=email_022226_morning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTQwM2U2OC1lZDBmLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J10p2Ai3o6HdK9D7dHCUoR3JzwLMnsuN4v8V-oUXoCM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125878395/603221333/-1395620021?amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&refcode=email_022226_morning&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTQwM2U2OC1lZDBmLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J10p2Ai3o6HdK9D7dHCUoR3JzwLMnsuN4v8V-oUXoCM=)

name: Samantha
subject: Fwd: Trump pulls Hurd endorsement, Endorses Hope Scheppelman
body:
Hey there! Did you see the great news below?!
| | | | Hey there!
I wanted to see if you saw the GREAT news below!
Let me know if you got it!
Samantha
---
---
| |
---
| | [](https://a5qvizhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UClMlhoIbR1ke6XbirQPJgoBUgcsZZdlMgXORTHP37KdNF7d2iukvx2ebgp80yf52WUYyMNuWF5WlvAM1Rwx0XwzzSeRV1vltTk5hi-NWYxuEapMy7x8A-X5lKrjqlh6UOwtXWSimDoMT7rpIDBgeFX-ABg1Zdjx8T4d9TEONSAtumBelUKll1YHqn8n4falR-FTF5TBzJe6y1zAcR3yQQ==&c=M3pS86xiFm-ZdlR6Bon3TIdyRXuyuguZabkLyoxoctee8XSdjAnqhw==&ch=rJDTuuKEq_5qlMWwzbQ0WCPnBg8xc_kD8RGCc6-Qa4W0xayKajkc1w==)
---

| |

Dear Friend,
Have you heard the BIG news?
I'm incredibly honored to share that I've received the endorsement of President Donald J. Trump. Check it out below.
His endorsement is a clear indicator that Colorado's 3rd CD deserves much better leadership in Washington DC than what RINO Jeff Hurd has provided.
President Trump and I have had wonderful policy conversations and I made it clear that I'm fully committed to advancing the America First agenda that puts working families, American jobs, national security, and economic strength first.
With your support, I'll work alongside him to make America affordable again, jail and deport criminals off our streets, and restore fiscal accountability to our federal government.
I promised him I will always put Americans like you first.
Our campaign has always been about restoring America First leadership, defending rural Colorado, protecting our land, supporting energy workers, securing the border, and standing up for the heart and soul of American communities that are ignored by Washington.
As a critical care nurse and Navy veteran, I'm running to give a voice to regular people like us who live, work, and raise their families here -- not the political establishment backing Jeff Hurd who got us in this mess.
But our work has just begun.
This is an inspiring grassroots campaign, growing and gaining momentum every day, and it takes people, outreach, and relentless effort every single day.
So will you help me and President Trump win this race?
With your support, we can beat the odds and defeat the arrogant insiders like Jeff Hurd who think they can get away with tricking us.
To push us over the top on election day, will you please donate $100 or $250 or more today?
If so please donate by clicking the Chip in Today button.
President Trump and I can't do this alone. We need you.
Thank you and God bless you.

---

President Trump and I have had wonderful policy conversations and I made it clear that I'm fully committed to advancing the America First agenda that puts working families, American jobs, national security, and economic strength first. With your support, I'll work alongside him to make America affordable again, jail and deport criminals off our streets, and restore fiscal accountability to our federal government. I promised him I will always put Americans like you first. Our campaign has always been about restoring America First leadership, defending rural Colorado, protecting our land, supporting energy workers, securing the border, and standing up for the heart and soul of American communities that are ignored by Washington. As a critical care nurse and Navy veteran, I'm running to give a voice to regular people like us who live, work, and raise their families here -- not the political establishment backing Jeff Hurd who got us in this mess. But our work has just begun. This is an inspiring grassroots campaign, growing and gaining momentum every day, and it takes people, outreach, and relentless effort every single day. So will you help me and President Trump win this race? With your support, we can beat the odds and defeat the arrogant insiders like Jeff Hurd who think they can get away with tricking us. To push us over the top on election day, will you please donate $100 or $250 or more today? If so please donate by clicking the Chip in Today button. President Trump and I can't do this alone. We need you. Thank you and God bless you. | == | | == | | | Sincerely, Hope Scheppelman | | Candidate for U.S. Congress - Colorado's 3rd District Conservative | Veteran | Nurse Practitioner Cell: (970) 403-5047 == Fighting for Faith, Family, Freedom, and the Constitution | | | By attending the 2024 Precinct Caucus, you consented to receive email communications. You may revoke your consent at any time by clicking the Unsubscribe® link located at the bottom of every email. | | | | | FOLLOW US == == == == == | | | | Hope Scheppelman for Congress | 163 Wagon Wheel Ln | Bayfield, CO 81122 US | | | | | | |

name: JD Vance
subject: The future of MAGA relies on this man
body:
We must fight for Byron Donalds now more than ever

---
| | | | | | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkLFupDAURb_GdEb4ecZA4WK1I6QtZsukRMZ-Bkdgo2fDKH8fESkfkO4WR0f33vfn-DRhDXH-bzbU9gwj5bEs6I9yECa_mdkQrgFzimUZoQHFG-AAFycqp61TEirUom1FqxTcZbVo79FhK6wXrezuXk1C9TfRd8rdQSoxVUFfpgYAhBStbOpOAfZdM6EECb207NYcuzMFc21TzEinKeHEEGO6Uoq1TVu16qWUPTP5h8HAYMhoD8L6FSKhuwgGw_RJKXKXolld5j4Rn9OJFBMxGFyKfKe8c9xMWPmH4x4nfgqeBd_TzuRAl5JCnJl8FDqQgTrKNhbL5OPv2z_gP0Mq0m5_hXUNWbXs1syX8btl-f2vp4avAAAA__8kiob3)
---
| | | | | **An official message from
Vice President JD Vance.**
President Trump just told me, "We can't lose Byron Donalds."

This is our MOST critical gubernatorial fight since his inauguration as your 47th President.

He and I are PROUD to stand with _Florida 's next Governor_, Byron Donalds.

Here's the honest truth: **Byron Donalds is the ONLY choice to keep Florida the Freest State.**

There is NO better fit for Florida than Byron Donalds.

I've known Byron for many years; his record of service to the people of Florida is unmatched, and as your governor, he will keep Florida the Freest State in the Nation.

He will:

**> **Enact our MAGA Agenda to the letter.

**>** Continue with Mass Deportations.

**>** Stand against the corrupt Democratic Establishment.

**> **Increase economic growth that benefits Americans FIRST.

Democrats know this, which is why they're treating Florida as their _**NUMBER ONE**_ priority to flip Blue this year.

They just dumped millions more into this race, and they want Florida to turn into the next California.

_**[To respond, Byron needs a massive surge RIGHT NOW, or we risk losing our home turf of Florida!](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkLFupDAURb_GdEb4ecZA4WK1I6QtZsukRMZ-Bkdgo2fDKH8fESkfkO4WR0f33vfn-DRhDXH-bzbU9gwj5bEs6I9yECa_mdkQrgFzimUZoQHFG-AAFycqp61TEirUom1FqxTcZbVo79FhK6wXrezuXk1C9TfRd8rdQSoxVUFfpgYAhBStbOpOAfZdM6EECb207NYcuzMFc21TzEinKeHEEGO6Uoq1TVu16qWUPTP5h8HAYMhoD8L6FSKhuwgGw_RJKXKXolld5j4Rn9OJFBMxGFyKfKe8c9xMWPmH4x4nfgqeBd_TzuRAl5JCnJl8FDqQgTrKNhbL5OPv2z_gP0Mq0m5_hXUNWbXs1syX8btl-f2vp4avAAAA__8kiob3 "To respond, Byron needs a massive surge RIGHT NOW, or we risk losing our home turf of Florida!")**_

Byron is the best man for the job - but I have to admit, the fight ahead will be challenging, and he'll need ALL the help he can get, so could I humbly ask you to chip in $26, $47, or $100 before midnight?
---
| [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkLFupDAURb_GdEb4ecZA4WK1I6QtZsukRMZ-Bkdgo2fDKH8fESkfkO4WR0f33vfn-DRhDXH-bzbU9gwj5bEs6I9yECa_mdkQrgFzimUZoQHFG-AAFycqp61TEirUom1FqxTcZbVo79FhK6wXrezuXk1C9TfRd8rdQSoxVUFfpgYAhBStbOpOAfZdM6EECb207NYcuzMFc21TzEinKeHEEGO6Uoq1TVu16qWUPTP5h8HAYMhoD8L6FSKhuwgGw_RJKXKXolld5j4Rn9OJFBMxGFyKfKe8c9xMWPmH4x4nfgqeBd_TzuRAl5JCnJl8FDqQgTrKNhbL5OPv2z_gP0Mq0m5_hXUNWbXs1syX8btl-f2vp4avAAAA__8kiob3)
---
| | | This is the make-or-break race for MAGA's future.

Democrats are lining up millions of dollars for this race - there's nothing they want more than to turn MAGA's Home Turf **BLUE** in 2026.

President Trump and I are proud to endorse Byron, but we need EVERYONE with us here.

Democrats are mass-mobilizing around Florida, and Byron needs YOUR help **IMMEDIATELY.**

Because if we don't take the threats seriously, MAGA could be in deep water SOON.

So today, I'm humbly asking you to join me and President Trump to help us KEEP FLORIDA GREAT by supporting Byron Donalds below!
---

With God as my witness and YOU by our side, there's no way they can STOP MAGA or Byron Donalds!

_Your Vice President,

JD Vance_

name: Patrick J. Murphy
subject: Kennedy Democrats March 11th Event
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/PJM_Logo.png]
Friend,
The political environment heading into 2026 is accelerating quickly.
On the Republican side, major donors are writing massive checks. Donald Trump’s political operation has raised more than $300 million. The Republican National Committee: $156 million, the National Republican Congressional Committee: $103 million, and the National Republican Senatorial Committee: $80 million are currently out-raising their Democratic counterparts.
That’s the reality.
But fundraising totals alone don’t decide elections. Organization, candidate quality, message discipline, and early investment matter just as much — especially this far out.
With the 2026 elections now just nine months away, we’re hosting the first of three events this year at my home on March 11 to build the foundation early. We are investing in a new generation of Democratic leaders — veterans, prosecutors, and public servants who reflect our values and are prepared to win in competitive districts.
This is about being proactive, not reactive.
I’m asking you to join us on March 11, share this invitation with others in our area, and — if you’re unable to attend — consider making an early investment to help us compete at the highest level.
Momentum favors those who build it early.
Are you in?
GET YOUR TICKETS HERE:
Kennedy Democrats March 11th Tickets [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kd_3.11.26]

clean_body: [] Friend, The political environment heading into 2026 is accelerating quickly. On the Republican side, major donors are writing massive checks. Donald Trump’s political operation has raised more than $300 million. The Republican National Committee: $156 million, the National Republican Congressional Committee: $103 million, and the National Republican Senatorial Committee: $80 million are currently out-raising their Democratic counterparts. That’s the reality. But fundraising totals alone don’t decide elections. Organization, candidate quality, message discipline, and early investment matter just as much — especially this far out. With the 2026 elections now just nine months away, we’re hosting the first of three events this year at my home on March 11 to build the foundation early. We are investing in a new generation of Democratic leaders — veterans, prosecutors, and public servants who reflect our values and are prepared to win in competitive districts. This is about being proactive, not reactive. I’m asking you to join us on March 11, share this invitation with others in our area, and — if you’re unable to attend — consider making an early investment to help us compete at the highest level. Momentum favors those who build it early. Are you in? subject: Step Into the Arena for Children
body:
What Happens When 22,000 Athletes Fill One City
Theresa Flores leads ground operations to protect children before the crowds arrive.

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ddcc5df491d14f6eaddf37810b90b468&_e=X09ITgJr1wkpV48Q3bxy35mZte3WCEr5XmnBLkaZiYVfWt8Y2uzFroLyxgUgDUeEk36SXNVsKsbaQeG0h_ueGyyQ3IeSIpxVtB6opGnMd-EYOThHYC4wm69cgDJpa76bvj7ovtv9f4WtWQ6Y7YAZIO5fxCyoWOOcDuhLgGGrMXAuGMNC6Ou93thS2Z-3mBO_VrMgctSmoGyh09ljY-0FIWAeT8EBN6dB_ta-Klcq2DIZmBS7JZXB3lsfTIGOC9kz_AM73bYcdAmbFjwfvTrIZUxq__ZtUAyZvS55NB0eArX9_dqAS36VGGt1zCcw8Fx-gbJKU1jRJoJDp1Tbz01_BwrESfuxNNBxVw1c-WnZ7ox4Vwl9lfAuMEXoo4ljTp6z-M8_2vTatoysIqx4BbioLTJY-wIT28X8_Dj5EpMyb-YCeC5ArrikX7oaOyXhioAhbobB2vns3H54DvoSYuAJIbb7Xw8EsCt1XeNkbBPwfq4P4SHtPOCuQCS0cHzbOilESeXH_rJj9Dw4LgnuiuTZ_BvP21vDxycVmILmqAO1tCLRZCl3p9nwetCnuDT844PJDCOZCRuQfADK8VdkN3G-J2tUvtJhwWpWByfmvceh2BII5jkgLV5oN62OmL2qEKLoPUeITUrYLbse4AOVM6SYLCceRp08zi-3t7OB5wSxCWaVjZNhZ-PZbCIgZhe11N68x-MnNTGWC0gGEVQ6JyLFM0jIWnwNKa_m9K0T_plVlHKMPhFgDiyP7o_aqbmmuLCeldV0g1psGPv4fwQGnOOP1PU1kMQY5xqrWY82Bh2zImf94MbvzgWF60XjDFdpcLGhGBV9S1YZ5RvDujYm65Al1g%3D%3D)

| |
---
| GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE
---
|
---
| | Peter,
---
In less than a few weeks... The world's strongest athletes will gather in Columbus, Ohio for one of the largest sports festivals on earth. **22,000 competitors and 80 countries. **
**Over 80 sports. **Four days of power, discipline, and grit. Strength will be everywhere.
But here is what most people never see... **When massive crowds gather, traffickers prepare too.** They hide in packed hotels.
They move in busy hallways.
They look for chaos -- where no one will notice them. That's why Theresa Flores will be there.
**Not as a spectator but on the front lines.** Theresa Flores stands as one of America's most courageous voices in the fight against sex trafficking.
---
[ Stand with a Freedom Fighter](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ddcc5df491d14f6eaddf37810b90b468&_e=X09ITgJr1wkpV48Q3bxy35mZte3WCEr5XmnBLkaZiYVfWt8Y2uzFroLyxgUgDUeEk36SXNVsKsbaQeG0h_ueGyyQ3IeSIpxVtB6opGnMd-EYOThHYC4wm69cgDJpa76bvj7ovtv9f4WtWQ6Y7YAZIO5fxCyoWOOcDuhLgGGrMXAuGMNC6Ou93thS2Z-3mBO_VrMgctSmoGyh09ljY-0FIWAeT8EBN6dB_ta-Klcq2DIZmBS7JZXB3lsfTIGOC9kz_AM73bYcdAmbFjwfvTrIZUxq__ZtUAyZvS55NB0eArX9_dqAS36VGGt1zCcw8Fx-2_N3HQTmXpcU5-h_PYzqKD6ZO2c6wmF4JvlOgzXHRvxzMl_lQuTPHKAO5VS6enEKtFgiDm8oTuPEULtYr4IQi64sUmifaFecrnoUGg5pqM-KTgWNkQKNnHhNW48oHFc3mu7px2PIggWD6M6RIVdMrRH7foVi4HcUrlHib6cGhom21xel7qmODMIuzm1St-aR-6CiZLXXmVzYbo4KuKAbmGWdY34aH9KpW98mDxVThJpdV-7Qme7Ptw6A5ab0m5yqaH-tLyw_27Q15Hru8Atl3vUpeO0OeU0bCfpm2LqwEmMgX9Prnpq3Be9DYl0EYu-k4-i4Tu9MCWmASncu73X_KnjCzm7-UVbmngOMR_CMgttyeBfiPqioeITlblCLp0FUj8I_4SLaiN0kY7lEc7EYAqZMHLS4OU_-kep1xYJhCmd2qrarOG7g5y9fERqDI-Wqc4DtqEmOEc9O7K65x3MEadm1L-9WdS8NM9BjJW5r8-vDT3Jk9ZTVavSFWToDv_C8HWDZuDBk9PSJ2l7mylacgA%3D%3D)
---
Before the first bench press, the first strongman lift and the first trophy is raised... **Her team will train volunteers. **They will equip hotel staff with tools to recognize red flags, and distribute thousands of soap packets into hotel rooms -- each printed with the national trafficking hotline number. They will share life-saving resources and coordinate with law enforcement. **They prepare like athletes.**
**With discipline,****repetition and****focus.** **This fight for FREEDOM requires strength. **
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ddcc5df491d14f6eaddf37810b90b468&_e=X09ITgJr1wkpV48Q3bxy35mZte3WCEr5XmnBLkaZiYVfWt8Y2uzFroLyxgUgDUeEk36SXNVsKsbaQeG0h_ueGyyQ3IeSIpxVtB6opGnMd-EYOThHYC4wm69cgDJpa76bvj7ovtv9f4WtWQ6Y7YAZIO5fxCyoWOOcDuhLgGGrMXAuGMNC6Ou93thS2Z-3mBO_VrMgctSmoGyh09ljY-0FIWAeT8EBN6dB_ta-Klcq2DIZmBS7JZXB3lsfTIGOC9kz_AM73bYcdAmbFjwfvTrIZUxq__ZtUAyZvS55NB0eArX9_dqAS36VGGt1zCcw8Fx-RK_GBOjynu81KqkeKLdn_3e1sZKbwiX0PsFruQKU57RcVKT1ZZvORwI4qtKJiu0zMQ0pTfy5838EdiO5UDxVi8aWNz1MQb0wgNw14DSsTdKTuK1tkhWue8tdT3gvk8rf1r9cVehfasxQJwi7Kqpj6A-5w_W2FjAz9K1HZL9414JU8cMUywKA3SMbOyKWRk5SOW_nC_2TvEtjbw7E3riE2G1GbSuQvIrsdWJkVq97VOTPoQ3tt81bcBIEK4M08FzCp11WhSv9ttZHfZ4x_43Nie67tYphKn_aQIZb_Yr_HvQIxwnOT2xCxs1WXvRU5TzomhiuY6WvVviMsH9rCyGAI0Ss-5OAsZjvOC7GBe_ONASw59lahoGG8C8y0jOSHtZ05qv-oGIMdpszjmQFKjg8yOFBMRwxKVrTDAR30cCzJl2tSR-Fw_qJ8x6VTIa-qqmQDPzAEalLBNhOoC7YZqW53BVF5fmrdalLxSOrIXMeTtoKy50Wrnm5k6KjlxvPoZb8Pkcvy60d8ITmlbAL_0ePTA%3D%3D)
---
Here's how you can help build that strength:
---
* **$60 helps equip one trained volunteer **
* **$120 strengthens outreach and training materials **
* **$180 expands protection across multiple hotel locations **
* **$240 multiplies our presence when traffickers are most active**

---
[ Stand with a Freedom Fighter](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ddcc5df491d14f6eaddf37810b90b468&_e=X09ITgJr1wkpV48Q3bxy35mZte3WCEr5XmnBLkaZiYVfWt8Y2uzFroLyxgUgDUeEk36SXNVsKsbaQeG0h_ueGyyQ3IeSIpxVtB6opGnMd-EYOThHYC4wm69cgDJpa76bvj7ovtv9f4WtWQ6Y7YAZIO5fxCyoWOOcDuhLgGGrMXAuGMNC6Ou93thS2Z-3mBO_VrMgctSmoGyh09ljY-0FIWAeT8EBN6dB_ta-Klcq2DIZmBS7JZXB3lsfTIGOC9kz_AM73bYcdAmbFjwfvTrIZUxq__ZtUAyZvS55NB0eArX9_dqAS36VGGt1zCcw8Fx-VIORGOZPhTwLLuRJ3IUVuJ9A-iXJIVv7jdL5JwrAhr1GVDE_b3SfBmSrzL7KmX5H4Tdc3QIiLQo7tkVxrr8Q9pZJN789kNFRuzFJPTUV264XLK-IbNtmUf8MnoKVDc1oq7oxCPQg8OAwKrIR9Vxp-wEp9-mIdzxa5rqnEOTY0T1JrYl3mElKM7O3nQWVIXYngBMJA8p8ofcy6jH1wGqyMa_Y5iS9QWPRgsrR_At5KV_cBxMsi-D6hdc2W0MifapaK6mUBluf7BkAX9jyyxnAbpnoxpjJoOwkU_GMy3iXAqfP9J3m_chK4tT1C_qtpu-CrwsHIAuvbJuMqpNk9fCDIGFwqueHc789yqnRCR0AbvT_QcvkfIpfWmvq7wNcifWMPWH2zsfpJYX61L4bJldsvNJsce4PtufJUFDKf_cI-BX4GmMuDaC0AqZpx-FNyvxWlS1OWwe8tibUrGEAGrE2Lr7b7dJ5Gpnj54etA6oILgm_shj5MU0Za8PrrcdqrMTbQbi6tn6EM53i69_1BqFIyg%3D%3D)

The **Sound of Freedom Foundation** was created after the success of the film _Sound of Freedom_ -- to turn awareness into action. Our mission is simple and urgent: **To stop the sale of God 's children.** We work through prevention, intervention, education, information, and influence -- partnering with trusted leaders like Theresa to protect children before exploitation happens. We work to restore the children who have been rescued. **Just like training builds strength rep by rep, these pillars build protection layer by layer. ** **And ground operations like this are where preparation meets protection. **Jesus said, _" Let the little children come to me... for the kingdom of heaven belongs to such as these." _(Matthew 19:14) **Every child has God-given dignity.** **Not for sale.**
**Not in Ohio.**
**Not anywhere.** The festival is almost here. Hotels are being mapped now, and materials are being printed, and volunteers are being trained. **Before the crowds arrive ... we must be ready.** **[Will you help Theresa Flores fight for freedom with a gift of $25, $60, $100, or any amount you can give today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ddcc5df491d14f6eaddf37810b90b468&_e=X09ITgJr1wkpV48Q3bxy35mZte3WCEr5XmnBLkaZiYVfWt8Y2uzFroLyxgUgDUeEk36SXNVsKsbaQeG0h_ueGyyQ3IeSIpxVtB6opGnMd-EYOThHYC4wm69cgDJpa76bvj7ovtv9f4WtWQ6Y7YAZIO5fxCyoWOOcDuhLgGGrMXAuGMNC6Ou93thS2Z-3mBO_VrMgctSmoGyh09ljY-0FIWAeT8EBN6dB_ta-Klcq2DIZmBS7JZXB3lsfTIGOC9kz_AM73bYcdAmbFjwfvTrIZUxq__ZtUAyZvS55NB0eArX9_dqAS36VGGt1zCcw8Fx-ukPuUh2FlNQL5bNP07-O7QXuJaHJ31C0XnlzI9ikLWoHYJcC-QINd8vU8XKprVwydvsZ9McQUXPs22KS_sCLyl-hPFKklg2n4ShyUWY0pa66jG0GLce80eSvv2TOoHNAx7IwWXoRNmiP1sApVbSdIwHo_A731FyZNF5jC93SFSXqc7804XeY2qNBpgJHhiJNVpVmankvvL4J7n24DrGYbo2t8iY9LXDUsjju_wq-dBVfrnZ2F2VMXX0S-zdNl4u1M7N2lfZM-bcwoaOsam3Px9R_XJZZSzk6c3JS--uSFfxBCI3Gg11oC1qnUB3nuSlp8mslJ2qmoxH_xRTEI3uX5yC_vj-llEL-JnxrvBjIHOky9NEdUS1uDYLcvrP5nciSHX5Yimx1eCj_VBENWBPcZBdHxA4z6-Us_Xc0YVQQ1UPzdvi8vaKC67_873DYwH2Hvg1XseyB6nEdmsJiCYkps819Dri81df51zA2FU3isxNh6Ouc4vmZtRjbO9SJRZqGjUP3LazZgM6AvDUgIydVZQ%3D%3D)** You may never step onto the competition stage.
But you can step into this arena. **You can help out lift evil.** Let's build a wall of protection around these children.

clean_body: What Happens When 22,000 Athletes Fill One City Theresa Flores leads ground operations to protect children before the crowds arrive. | | | | | | GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE | | | Peter, In less than a few weeks... The world's strongest athletes will gather in Columbus, Ohio for one of the largest sports festivals on earth. 22,000 competitors and 80 countries. Over 80 sports. Four days of power, discipline, and grit. Strength will be everywhere. But here is what most people never see... When massive crowds gather, traffickers prepare too. They hide in packed hotels. They move in busy hallways. They look for chaos -- where no one will notice them. That's why Theresa Flores will be there. Not as a spectator but on the front lines. Theresa Flores stands as one of America's most courageous voices in the fight against sex trafficking. Before the first bench press, the first strongman lift and the first trophy is raised... Her team will train volunteers. They will equip hotel staff with tools to recognize red flags, and distribute thousands of soap packets into hotel rooms -- each printed with the national trafficking hotline number. They will share life-saving resources and coordinate with law enforcement. They prepare like athletes. With discipline,repetition andfocus. This fight for FREEDOM requires strength. Here's how you can help build that strength: $60 helps equip one trained volunteer $120 strengthens outreach and training materials $180 expands protection across multiple hotel locations $240 multiplies our presence when traffickers are most active The Sound of Freedom Foundation was created after the success of the film Sound of Freedom -- to turn awareness into action. Our mission is simple and urgent: To stop the sale of God 's children. We work through prevention, intervention, education, information, and influence -- partnering with trusted leaders like Theresa to protect children before exploitation happens. We work to restore the children who have been rescued. Just like training builds strength rep by rep, these pillars build protection layer by layer. And ground operations like this are where preparation meets protection. Jesus said, " Let the little children come to me... for the kingdom of heaven belongs to such as these." (Matthew 19:14) Every child has God-given dignity. Not for sale. Not in Ohio. Not anywhere. The festival is almost here. Hotels are being mapped now, and materials are being printed, and volunteers are being trained. Before the crowds arrive ... we must be ready. You may never step onto the competition stage. But you can step into this arena. You can help out lift evil. Let's build a wall of protection around these children. True strength is not measured in muscle. It is measured in courage. And God 's children are not for sale. With gratitude and prayer, Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the full weight of the executive branch bearing down on me right now.
Hey, it’s Mark Kelly.
Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate.
I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy.
But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something.
So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too.
I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help.
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the full weight of the executive branch bearing down on me right now.
After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do.
**[I’m asking you to split a donation between Chris Pappas and me, and I hope you know that I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260222_1.dPIcm0&amount=5&refcode=em20260222-1&t=1&akid=5214%2E582294%2Esv_I2F)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260222_1.dPIcm0&amount=5&refcode=em20260222-1&t=20&akid=5214%2E582294%2Esv_I2F)**
Thank you.
Mark
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260222_1.dPIcm0&amount=5&refcode=em20260222-1&t=21&akid=5214%2E582294%2Esv_I2F)

name: Major General Paul Eaton, U.S. Army, retired
subject: What we do at moments like these truly matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
These wars of choice make us sacrifice our sons and daughters, spend trillions of dollars, and tarnish the reputation of our nation.
#
Peter, this is Paul Eaton.
My father was an Air Force pilot, and he and his navigator were shot down over Laos during the Vietnam War. They were listed as missing in action for decades until found and returned home in 2007.
58,000 Americans were killed in that conflict, and more than 10 times as many Vietnamese. The war tore our country apart and did immense damage to the United States Armed Forces. It took decades to recover.
I served in the Army during the Global War on Terror. Another 7000 Americans were killed in Iraq and Afghanistan, and hundreds of thousands of civilians. I trained our nation’s best at the Army Infantry School, deployed to Iraq, and watched as they were torn apart in a war they never should’ve had to fight. We only just ended those wars a few years ago, and we’ve barely even started rehabilitating the force.
These wars of choice make us sacrifice our sons and daughters, spend trillions of dollars, and tarnish the reputation of our nation.
Donald Trump ran for president, in part, on stopping those wars. Instead, he has destabilized the world and ordered American strikes in seven different counties in his second term alone. Now we are on the verge of another war of choice with Iran. If Trump is to be believed, we have only days to stop it.
For the sake of our Troops and their families, we have to do everything we can. Each of us are constituents to one US Representative and two US Senators. When we talk to them - they listen.
[**Peter, I am humbly asking you to join VoteVets in demanding action from Congress. Republicans must bring a War Powers Resolution up to a vote before it is too late. If they don’t, they will be directly responsible for sending another generation of our best into harm’s way. Use this link to sign on.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/260220_VV_EM_IRAN/?refcode=em260220-1-MK&t=1&akid=34959%2E3013755%2EHNJyVY)
| [SIGN ON NOW](https://act.votevets.org/signup/260220_VV_EM_IRAN/?refcode=em260220-1-MK&t=2&akid=34959%2E3013755%2EHNJyVY)
---
Thank you in advance.
Gratefully,
Paul Eaton
Major General, U.S. Army, Retired
Senior Advisor, VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We can’t just hope that our democracy will survive — we have to fight for it
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125890869/603248469/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkZTJiM2RlLWY4MGYtZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTU3NTkzZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aGGt0i7Hlra1WErM28W1M-BwAnUMLPQbuuohlc-4B8o=&emci=9925bb3a-a90e-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&emdi=9de2b3de-f80f-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&ceid=8431045)

A.G. Holder knows we are facing historic challenges right now. The Republican Party has been on a rampage with the singular goal of undermining our democracy. In order to cling to power, they’re working to manipulate our electoral maps, suppress our votes, and endanger our constitutional rights.
Their policies are dismally unpopular, and they know they can’t win on an even playing field, so they’re willing to cheat in every way they can— from unnecessary mid-decade redraws to trying to mislead voters on a ballot initiative in Missouri to pushing the extreme, anti-voter SAVE Act, which would make voting harder for millions of Americans.
In this moment of crisis, the NDRC is working around the clock to fight back. And when we look back years from now at how we rose to meet this moment of crisis for our democracy, let’s make sure we can say we did everything we could. That work is happening now — [**please make a donation so we can win each and every one of these anti-democracy battles in front of us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125890880/603248482/-2069046819?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MomentofTruth_email_20260222-NDRC-Tier1-MomentofTruth_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260222-NDRC-Tier1-MomentofTruth_&utm_campaign=MomentofTruth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkZTJiM2RlLWY4MGYtZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTU3NTkzZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aGGt0i7Hlra1WErM28W1M-BwAnUMLPQbuuohlc-4B8o=)

clean_body: We can’t just hope that our democracy will survive — we have to fight for it | Peter, In case you missed it, we wanted to share a powerful call to action from Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr.: | = A.G. Holder knows we are facing historic challenges right now. The Republican Party has been on a rampage with the singular goal of undermining our democracy. In order to cling to power, they’re working to manipulate our electoral maps, suppress our votes, and endanger our constitutional rights. Their policies are dismally unpopular, and they know they can’t win on an even playing field, so they’re willing to cheat in every way they can— from unnecessary mid-decade redraws to trying to mislead voters on a ballot initiative in Missouri to pushing the extreme, anti-voter SAVE Act, which would make voting harder for millions of Americans. In this moment of crisis, the NDRC is working around the clock to fight back. And when we look back years from now at how we rose to meet this moment of crisis for our democracy, let’s make sure we can say we did everything we could. That work is happening now — = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, The NDRC Team = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Text MAPS to 36787, STOP to end. Msg and Data rates may apply

This is important, so I’ll get right to the point.

Do you pray? **Because I do. **

Praying is a vital part of my life, and right now, there’s a whole lot that needs prayer, including America. I’m praying that America returns to our Christian roots, and fast!

**The radical Left attacks and mocks my faith, and they hate my movement to bring God back into the government. **

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125893820/603254414/-1088349262?refcode=EM_F_260221Fwd_N_KP_NO_7_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzZjIxM2Y4LWZhMGYtZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTU3NTkzZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=haEiqZMAdEzqfFJ9ZjRfXqc_qek_pXXx81TKPHf6gJo=)

| | I’m worried, Friend.

In case you missed it, last week the U.S. House passed the SAVE America Act, and it now heads to the U.S. Senate. We are keeping a close eye on this bill because it’s a disgusting and blatant attack on voting rights that could disenfranchise millions of eligible American citizens from making their voices heard.

Beyond imposing extreme documentation requirements on the voter registration process and targeting election officials, more, this bill would also **effectively ELIMINATE NPPEF’s voter registration program.** _You can read more about the impact in the forwarded email below._

**Our work is critical: In January, among those who answered the phone, 38% said they would have _never_ registered to vote had they not seen NPPEF teams on the ground.**

**That’s 1 in 3 people we helped get registered to vote.**

**If the SAVE Act passes the U.S. Senate and becomes law, NPPEF will no longer be able to be on the ground assisting our centered communities in registering to vote.**

[**The SAVE American Act is circulating in Congress as an attempt to strip away at our democracy and put up barriers to the ballot box. We must protect the right to vote – not restrict it. Please join us in the fight to protect voting rights in Pennsylvania and beyond by rushing $25 now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125893821/603254415/-1088349262?refcode=EM_F_260221Fwd_N_KP_NO_7_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzZjIxM2Y4LWZhMGYtZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTU3NTkzZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=haEiqZMAdEzqfFJ9ZjRfXqc_qek_pXXx81TKPHf6gJo=)

Together,

Katy Personette
Chief Development and Grants Officer

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Friend, this is not hyperbole. It’s a wake-up call.

**Yesterday, the SAVE Act, also known as the SAVE America Act, passed the U.S. House and now heads to the U.S. Senate. At its core, the SAVE Act is an attack on voting rights that would disenfranchise millions of eligible American citizens by imposing extreme documentation requirements on the voter registration process, target election officials, and eliminate or upend most methods of voter registration.**

This bill would not only require every American to provide documentary proof of citizenship to register to vote (passport or birth certificate), but **would also effectively eliminate NPPEF’s voter registration program.**

The SAVE Act requires voters to present citizenship documents in person to an election official in order to register to vote. Yet the majority of Pennsylvania registrations took place outside an election office in 2024 – by mail, online, at registration drives, and at state agencies. Many of those options would be nullified under the SAVE Act. **If the bill becomes law, the convenient, secure voter registration methods used by millions of Pennsylvania voters would no longer exist.**

**In the month of January, of those who answered the phone, 38% said they would have never registered to vote had they not seen NPPEF teams on the ground. _That’s 1 in 3 people we helped get registered to vote._ If the SAVE Act passes the U.S. Senate and becomes law, NPPEF would not be on the ground assisting our centered communities in registering to vote.**

A message from NPPEF’s CEO, Kadida Kenner, about the SAVE Act:
_“This message is important because I too believe in the need for voter ID.

This new iteration of the SAVE Act is not about support for voter ID. WE ALREADY have voter ID laws on the books in PA. They’re effective. Only citizens are voting. Period. This new version is about wiping out opportunities for vulnerable and historically disenfranchised qualified citizens to get registered to vote, and then also cast a ballot.

This is about voter suppression and poll taxes! We must stop it!”_
[**As a voting rights organization, NPPEF continues to vehemently oppose any type of voter suppression, including additional barriers that prevent Pennsylvanians and Americans from accessing the ballot. We should be protecting the right to vote, not restricting it. Please stand with us in protecting voting rights by contributing $25 or more today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125893822/603254416/-1088349262?refcode=EM_F_260221Fwd_N_KP_NO_7_NG_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzZjIxM2Y4LWZhMGYtZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTU3NTkzZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=haEiqZMAdEzqfFJ9ZjRfXqc_qek_pXXx81TKPHf6gJo=)

Together,

Team NPPEF
_Donations to the New PA Project Education Fund supports our staff’s voter and community engagement efforts including; voter registration, civic education, organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round._

| | | | _The New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) is a non-partisan organization led by community leaders across the Commonwealth dedicated to centering underrepresented and underserved communities to embrace their power. NPPEF ensures full participation in the democratic process through civic education and year-round engagement by centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth - with intention - as they are the least represented and most impacted by decisions our government is making._

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Asking about what’s most important to you
body:
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=618%2E124072%2E856twg)
Hi Peter — I hope your day is going well. I’m reaching out with another chance to check in. Hearing about what matters to you, what issues are on your mind, and what priorities you want our elected leaders to address gives our team and me the opportunity to better respond to your concerns. **[That’s why it’s so important to me to stay connected with you, and it’s why our team put together a Pre-Primary Priorities Survey that we hope you can give just a few minutes of your time.](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_Priorities_Survey_022226/?source=em_RC_PET_Priorities_Survey_022226&t=7&akid=618%2E124072%2E856twg)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_Priorities_Survey_022226/?source=em_RC_PET_Priorities_Survey_022226&t=8&akid=618%2E124072%2E856twg)
---
Whether you’re concerned about rising health care costs, school funding levels, the cost of groceries, or anything else, I’d like to hear about it. We really do read these responses, Peter, and they help us better understand and serve North Carolinians and Americans everywhere.
Thanks so much for taking the time to share your thoughts,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_Priorities_Survey_022226/?source=em_RC_PET_Priorities_Survey_022226&t=9&akid=618%2E124072%2E856twg)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=618%2E124072%2E856twg)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=618%2E124072%2E856twg)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=618%2E124072%2E856twg)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=618%2E124072%2E856twg)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=618%2E124072%2E856twg)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

clean_body: | Hi Peter — I hope your day is going well. I’m reaching out with another chance to check in. Hearing about what matters to you, what issues are on your mind, and what priorities you want our elected leaders to address gives our team and me the opportunity to better respond to your concerns. | Whether you’re concerned about rising health care costs, school funding levels, the cost of groceries, or anything else, I’d like to hear about it. We really do read these responses, Peter, and they help us better understand and serve North Carolinians and Americans everywhere. Thanks so much for taking the time to share your thoughts, Roy Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. ** mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper Victory Fund PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal. They’re not.

**Early voting is underway in Texas for the Primary on March 3rd.**

we need to fight back immediately

null, do you know what’s happening in Michigan?
**First,** _The Hill_ reported Michigan’s Senate seat is one of the MOST LIKELY to flip red this year.
**Then,** Donald Trump himself visited Michigan – he knows his Senate majority hinges on _this_ race.
**And now,** polling shows me in a statistical tie (44.1 - 43.7%) with my MAGA opponent (and Trump’s handpicked candidate), Mike Rogers.
If you’ve been waiting for the right time to donate, **now is the time.** This poll comes on the heels of a right-wing Texas billionaire pouring $5 MILLION into this race to support Rogers. Republicans are going ALL IN on this race, and we need to fight back immediately.
**[We set a critical $25,000 daily fundraising goal so we can continue gaining ground. Will you pitch in $5 now to help us reach our goal, keep MI blue, and flip the Senate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14218?t=3&akid=2291%2E49239%2EOlxmU-)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14218?t=4&akid=2291%2E49239%2EOlxmU-)

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14222?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=2291%2E49239%2EOlxmU-) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14217?t=9&akid=2291%2E49239%2EOlxmU-)

subject: you're ignoring us?!?
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt) Listen, this is your final notice.

We’ve reached out to you over and over again. It’s probably time to give up, but we had to try and reach you one more time.

All we’re asking for is your signature on our petition to support the Constitutional Amendment to [**END _Citizens United_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73086?t=3&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt) before the Supreme Court ruins all of our progress... but you don’t seem to care?!

We thought after we told you how IMPORTANT this was, you would listen — but [**STILL, NOTHING.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73086?t=4&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt)

[**The deadline for our petition is TONIGHT at 11:59PM**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73086?t=5&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt) [**and you are the only Democrat in your area who hasn't responded.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73086?t=6&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt)

[ **Will you PLEASE add your name to our petition to support the Constitutional Amendment to end _Citizens United?_ >> ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73086?t=7&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt) | [SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73086?t=8&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt)
---
Hoping to see your name,

Fight for Reform

**\------ FORWARDED MESSAGE ------
From: Horrible Supreme Court news (Fight For Reform)
Subject: Republicans are thrilled...
To: YOU **

[**HORRIBLE BREAKING NEWS FROM THE SUPREME COURT:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73086?t=9&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt)
[**“Supreme Court agrees to hear Republican-backed effort to lift caps on campaign spending”**

_CNN_ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73086?t=10&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73086?t=11&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt)
---|---

[SIGN NOW TO HELP OUR EFFORTS TO END _CITIZENS UNITED_ →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73086?t=12&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt)
---
WOW – this could change everything in a TERRIBLE WAY.

This case (backed by Vice President J.D. Vance) would allow BILLIONAIRE DONORS to drop TENS of thousands of dollars into party committees without any caps.

The Supreme Court has already ruled in FAVOR of _Citizens United_ and money in politics. So it’s never been so CRUCIAL that we show WIDESPREAD SUPPORT for getting money OUT of politics once and for all.

That’s why Amy Klobuchar is sounding the alarm:
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73086?t=13&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt)
[**So please , before it’s too late: Sign our petition to support the Constitutional Amendment to END _Citizens United_ and stop billionaire donors from rigging our elections →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73086?t=14&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt)
[SIGN THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/73086?t=15&akid=23950%2E4449941%2EIMbISt)
---
Thanks,

_Fight for Reform_

name: Jose Javier Rodriguez
subject: Pam Bondi failed Florida then. She's failing America now.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
The Epstein cover-up continues. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125896647/603263029/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_Bondi_022226&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzFhMmU1MjMtZmYwZi1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhNTc1OTNmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dfCHlwXigILe5DpbiH148LZg4Ua2bdnoO299A-7Ik7U=&emci=4dbac17a-a90e-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&emdi=c1a2e523-ff0f-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&ceid=32374386)
---
Let me be blunt, Peter: U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi is covering up the full truth about Jeffrey Epstein. She claims the Justice Department released all required files. Lawmakers from both parties say that's false, and the DoJ is using legal loopholes to protect predators instead of exposing them. Let’s not forget that Pam Bondi was Florida's Attorney General when Epstein committed crimes against children here. She had the power to hold him accountable. She didn't. Now she's blocking transparency at the federal level, mixing victims' names with random people in document dumps to confuse the public, and refusing to release the memos that would show why Epstein's associates weren't prosecuted. This is the same playbook we see over and over from our top leaders here in Florida — including Ron DeSantis and Attorney General James Uthmeier. Big promises on transparency and accountability. Zero follow-through. All talk when it helps them politically. Silent when Florida families need real action. **[As Florida's next Attorney General, I'll stand up for victims and demand accountability from the powerful — no matter who they are. But I need your help to win this fight. clean_body: The Epstein cover-up continues. | Let me be blunt, Peter: U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi is covering up the full truth about Jeffrey Epstein. She claims the Justice Department released all required files. Lawmakers from both parties say that's false, and the DoJ is using legal loopholes to protect predators instead of exposing them. Let’s not forget that Pam Bondi was Florida's Attorney General when Epstein committed crimes against children here. She had the power to hold him accountable. She didn't. Now she's blocking transparency at the federal level, mixing victims' names with random people in document dumps to confuse the public, and refusing to release the memos that would show why Epstein's associates weren't prosecuted. This is the same playbook we see over and over from our top leaders here in Florida — including Ron DeSantis and Attorney General James Uthmeier. Big promises on transparency and accountability. Zero follow-through. All talk when it helps them politically. Silent when Florida families need real action. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Let’s do this. Jose Javier Rodriguez = | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. Howard Avenue #106-813 Tampa, FL 33606

clean_body: Peter, this is urgent. Almost every Republican voter in America agrees--VOTER ID is common sense. Yet the Radical Left is still fighting to keep our elections wide open to fraud, fake registrations, and unverified votes. But without proof of citizenship at the ballot box, millions of voices like YOURS risk being canceled out. We can't afford to stay silent. If patriots like you don't step up, we risk losing the 2026 midterms before they even begin. isn't optional. This is about protecting our democracy, our elections, and our future.| | | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add info@emails.craneforaz.com to your address book. Not Sure How? P.O. Box 1950 Cortaro, AZ 85652 |

<Peter;,

For all of 2025, the GOP was haunted by one major problem that hurt our chances in nearly every election...
_**[Republicans aren’t turning out to vote when President Trump isn’t on the ballot!](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/KpnkAaXGEL3--i1_L8SyUJWw-O3kP71mTN4-YYsWo0oN1qTC3n13dNnlijCx2pQ9T7vMAlzsSjt_UJOnxCTP8A_bRu19XdsW2qjye5h2uxvVvLraUMDQ2ma5hFtOzPXfl7vNPBBrm-mVrU4M3SegaGHxnxdN0VRCPx8PNrC-_2pVVK14WGBJlPUYDP67AtFqqKTEHU_IxnnibM-OQlYoMLNRTV_q_6qychpQ0AG2yrU5GVVworEuqOas9HhEt2XyII-pmuZ-TvBZNlwCaQUSR13e0LYtmeLSM50lk4gYsk2ALJSHlkHUoSdQPZ9AJxYqw8zfzkUzkt1QlLW0kS8mUUtW65gLP-T_TTzEBop3LrqiB2pGvKqoNYPJhKxtk00gyxr2AF93XtQky-ZU91XL2CofMcKnwRmwwQa5ARNfJ0k-9L56Gl9tUcyo8JjlMdYAEQEGJFBViW-DeDWXH9iXV8lEMz1FQCAr0L8e53yonKlFXTRkon7_2gr3j0nLov6EQgW1IbRG8AAGsxwJM1jjkpwZPnG8LM8MT_9chiLDVGt9CC-Lh8JyQP5oSA1pE29D9I1jnrJawhOwrzH8Fe7B1oy6OjBtgcgi6Kqap0oyM_bKCQvHRu3UJfSFtPK8f5fKtN75kJeaA85kzzTsfaK8E-BPV6_pM1dKIDJJc7iOjqx1IhzDwE0tki9HBECiZG8mM63b58pinKpsE6EesEjzpAOfgdUkxg3ME2TOu2lhhjM8X0Au2qVZ7QlPjeJDF7MYFnU61nt6K5RT8D0J5ddIl9u_GFw1dL_MjWOMV8XAQ68zZAVU4zR6uyJ8t4WSNb5AJLKmuVP5J5AgvXWaA8I8w7wEelRqbU9o01jPk89wVVdqcAF8xUXlrOKLkNtHqJrAzeut6vCjQsCPSt8fAf7Hi8et97N1hQLleKMmYJifB1CO3eJGad8AeMvorj3dKdaUgnEEhYqlNrOm/IywY-Txj3feVcVKlj4gtbElpi49vlOBy/18)**_
That's why the Democrats overperformed in special election after special election last year AND won big in the November 2025 elections.

**[But I’m here to tell you today that President Trump and his agenda is on the ballot for the midterms!](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/-Fw5HJjhFgIlrFXkNiXvtj_O_TCPUc1kA5gsItsquhATJAKHEpHcaTxhwKPArB9ZqXL6mxxk4G_usmk_My8SsxlRCWmYvHWN9B6lPtJmSC0JElQONAxIoRbbXt5ZouiIRi11zc9Q7BgAztQ972XRqmfUJcVWprZDtr5yVs1aOws0gXbUNNuDjh_hWSee6gM5uOeoLrIlX_cklk0ISSTR-aD4DkWJUyuLqsw56Sw0qswyefAlKlcKWXDAkdXRmJoe0JcOg6N5AGvKK-knxvTHXfXoSSb2fG1UpIL2-rCi3k9srFFaRuje9gwq_N2k3eIVPykhIMv-YLtgglZwiqcS8n7-Mfb1ocAQDpD1e5_0hkbpvnzNOGy1p1quRu7xDeeChEctUUOHvPitk7aOLRgIfMqoBnZefsNWm2fYY5j2z5cJepMZMhr51lUuld97BX3FB8JtQpkdv5c-pmj-f9E73_S9_4oXx6Ws4pDDioJ39P7eAVTOnA4rtC7myBqpMZt2x0hPNqfoQJ7zH-FpZDXWcCImUSPiC1QyIugqsfx-N4KxTLm2gBzAi4P7DVFZHrzmzMUWJCXQ5dixUdT73zRsh6QWnxTb1l6sMx0rH45rBqZZAmbbDw0H8y7jCr3lLZ2ymP1tVMbjT-zh-5QyjFTau9v203akpkqd5B_x_1XzdVE6xPF_IqL1SRKSSZN3Y4phlOwsmqWS8T8-V_8eemcEy7q0CGQEREeAsuMDGPeyavhWbSxP6qKA8Imc_K6oq9N1JRTg-MKkIlFmp5goDwOw6IuEn3rJ-_xFtJ7PaoAbSlW6XJra5wxKMmz5bB44i5KHdiEqzu01xh7JyGylegloefjoGiXMnWejSeUnILiXakw_OioN9DRaruhdSQUgHYnb1sx9Eb6BlwhtN0LbFVnUfmh1YWNfC7OOBA8ogWNS4mVAyXl8YGpQf1JInvmlGp0DNkEnoEBHnTx-/8hhWyoWYbmb6qQpMcaIrW2GesSHqoQR8/18)**

That's not an exaggeration...

_If we lose Congress, radical far-Left Democrats will take over - and they'll go right back to bogus investigations, hoaxes, and impeachments._

The entire America First agenda will be dead in the water, and it will only be a matter of time before Democrats attempt to remove President Trump from office.

subject: Cold, hard revenge
body:
We dealt some crushing blows to the woke agenda
| | | | |
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=86a8e54c862d408887a94ceb6869ebba&_e=OIJXyRRXHPo_FLQDiJj_HePnMaKKLmyfCgKSq5kzIayUPMpl2W067vRKkxWcwmeTe9aeNEZe7LcMh9fZlWMXxg79de2RyWO7Stx8t-B0liLiTxAQ_63UiMyBlXxGOI_iReIYujAlAZrewX6qB02tEkrtho15n6i1b-o1-7o9LrZZJaGI_11yIPUwSIs7SzrAelB3r48-SjTQyTcLmYIwn4fTnLyEy7mMfrJ4MBiNW1vXeTZOw0jVXs6rnOu2EVl7sfyNjK7x8bDx64Jam-B8Z-vQNvEsNOWogPP23OJB8loNsXLpTbv_kBYzEtT6PPnKvUYLnmu2f-_GWNCZUslaGsYuVbSki5xdHrXRXpNUijiRkCsOcpeTJUVsl5rlQhAzr1JFi31vmhwFxLoce1oRXcOdDSJX9hn_w0l2rQEyJR06BG8JdN8YUsW9zTQXDnM5PVXsyFlVQVunhXxY-LckTx04gP44kmjXsU4yHrhl5fvPug_SPnfA--3D8bAGU9r63gTMK419BXEWxPZbK58P-x3Ru2Tlox2XpDr9U2HcyWd7UTXlQCkIgPsqQMdWxu8KKhrKm3wgXGvRpVMeIgAFVMaKnvQERUEoTUwy2jT7m13CIREQt9b2KaMSr7AAMKqpNtDDVGyPG86NzYFAQMRkI7ShGsB7EtMFiaPUE14TsL7mROZpClp4D8VYtwsQXweC)
|

|
---
Fellow Patriot,
The war on President Trump started the instant he stepped off that golden escalator in 2015 and promised to put America First.
**The Democrat Machine, their media pawns, and entrenched Deep State bureaucrats declared total war with no rules and no mercy.**
They hit him with the **Russia witch hunt** that dragged on for years, costing hundreds of millions and tearing the country apart.
When that collapsed, they pivoted straight to the **impeachment effort** – a manufactured crisis built on lies, designed to nullify your vote and remove a duly elected President.
And even after they lost, they didn’t stop. They kept coming – _**more investigations, lawfare traps, endless smears, corrupt indictments and convictions.**_
Through all this and worse, President Trump survived, persevered and prevailed – winning a stunning comeback for a second term to help save this country we love so dearly.
**_But the radicals never quit. They’re still burning with rage._**
**And now, Alexander Vindman – the man who helped to orchestrate the entire failed impeachment effort and nearly killed MAGA – is back. And he's out for cold, hard revenge.**
**He just launched a campaign to hijack Florida's critical U.S. Senate seat in one of this year’s biggest special elections. And within 24 hours, liberal donors pumped in an eye-popping $1.7 million with much more on the way.**
**This is no longer a normal race._It is straight, personal revenge politics._**
[PITCH IN NOW](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=86a8e54c862d408887a94ceb6869ebba&_e=OIJXyRRXHPo_FLQDiJj_HePnMaKKLmyfCgKSq5kzIayUPMpl2W067vRKkxWcwmeTe9aeNEZe7LcMh9fZlWMXxg79de2RyWO7Stx8t-B0liLiTxAQ_63UiMyBlXxGOI_iReIYujAlAZrewX6qB02tEkrtho15n6i1b-o1-7o9LrZZJaGI_11yIPUwSIs7SzrAelB3r48-SjTQyTcLmYIwn4fTnLyEy7mMfrJ4MBiNW1vXeTZOw0jVXs6rnOu2EVl7JoxipPTn_YnGnmAvab21r2NRxHu8FVdkXc2t4EQTdGlAXmtJE9nFWJy6vnQqE8MruOYiAPmBzZ55XmJSXsHh-fP8-5xYGrZ2djC9Q2Bz_a9NdIVMSgjgH5Vai0NuImCPjgLrnvCJBJy1rQrYFTdpjHS_hidBPi_hGDW-kfe9r66q5NxL1HjawBqtMRtKWjehyPVGF4chyu1PhMe-40OVgw2q9kg98Tj7CpG7Du1UJhNocz4clvzXaWCj3XVEYEew4-2wOUOr_c2eacbfCxFmtgtBm8xjayT7HoQ5lCezWzohmO3pSCo5OctnF8V_2WkpBKCGAPBt6xpN6jRTJl1DhAlZHrHx3AY7Zv6j0dMei2MUZXvyBDgnk72aTAm1nZlPKelxrl753YcO8ktWvIUIdNQgEJ4UGHbfZqZYi2oPlF_MnkTVNf8N2rlL3N7stNkn)
I was honored to be appointed to fill Florida’s U.S. Senate seat once Marco Rubio joined the Cabinet. **And now, with President Trump’s complete and total endorsement, I’m running to win it outright.** It will be one of the biggest and most expensive special elections of the year, but I’m committed to defending President Trump and the America First Agenda that we all voted for.
Remember this – if we lose, our majorities vanish, our agenda stalls, and the country we fought for is lost. **We are not allowing that.**
[**We know you can't personally cancel out $1.7 million in radical, anti-Trump money. But you can cancel out one anti-Trump donor's donation of $25 or more, and you can do it now.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=86a8e54c862d408887a94ceb6869ebba&_e=OIJXyRRXHPo_FLQDiJj_HePnMaKKLmyfCgKSq5kzIayUPMpl2W067vRKkxWcwmeTe9aeNEZe7LcMh9fZlWMXxg79de2RyWO7Stx8t-B0liLiTxAQ_63UiMyBlXxGOI_iReIYujAlAZrewX6qB02tEkrtho15n6i1b-o1-7o9LrZZJaGI_11yIPUwSIs7SzrAelB3r48-SjTQyTcLmYIwn4fTnLyEy7mMfrJ4MBiNW1vXeTZOw0jVXs6rnOu2EVl7PonSxfR92cmeeEvNk43WYTsc-vgq-4Rgi4gDfjMfBYzWYk1jzcOIO7FiVAJsZqn4dsq_djt_6qV4WuuXk-wPXMBcmqr9HG_3KYOVemMNjCv4qLwPpi5JLh8mTHLfI1v_n8GYz4DDplioSDsSrXD6uGvY0o-yFd0fo64k5-dG4g0emnwstCunWqwhW43SnEYlfUZfgM06mJbt2UM9frvC1Jsu0nvtMMbOij7-9CCvMqQdw_yL_wyv82TIEJa93xIsGOcvCAPaqU5e7TwW16-mqkAutSEBjr2KyTc1oGerpG9EJ19Nz4UoNW4yDaA9d14d6sgYe2u4-d5X0KiRE32I5qkuOHpYGN7WGJhUYDNwG-khrfYVt6H9WBHtoxw5O7aVnW0eBjdAMfd5yvNoPFol24R6Ixapgt-Ru3WQSIS7eqAWAAWw9r5TlpHKdDf-wIJd)
**_Are you in?_**
The line is drawn, and it's time to bury the endless vendetta against our President and our movement.
Thank you for your commitment.
Sincerely,Ashley Moody

It will be one of the biggest and most expensive special elections of the year, but I’m committed to defending President Trump and the America First Agenda that we all voted for. Remember this – if we lose, our majorities vanish, our agenda stalls, and the country we fought for is lost. We are not allowing that. Are you in? The line is drawn, and it's time to bury the endless vendetta against our President and our movement. Thank you for your commitment. Sincerely,Ashley Moody | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for Moody for Florida | Moody for Florida 301 W Platt St, #A663, Tampa, FL 33606

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Rewind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter — You may be wondering, how did this kid go from here:
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-feb26.GJoCgS&refcode=em260222-1-f&t=1&akid=1686%2E5691347%2EY16kNX)
To winning a Senate seat in Georgia in 2021...
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-feb26.GJoCgS&refcode=em260222-1-f&t=2&akid=1686%2E5691347%2EY16kNX)
To running for reelection in what is set to be the most competitive and expensive Senate race to date...
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-feb26.GJoCgS&refcode=em260222-1-f&t=3&akid=1686%2E5691347%2EY16kNX)
Well, before Jon was elected to the Senate, he was an investigative journalist who led a team that exposed corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. More and more, the atmosphere under Trump is a reminder of places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
**Jon ran for Senate because he saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and he wanted to confront the corruption that made Trump’s rise possible.**
Now, Jon is the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state that Donald Trump won in 2024.
[**This race is going to be tough, and Jon can’t do it alone. So if you are able, chip in today to help Jon win in November. Any amount you are able to give will make a big difference in a race like this one.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-feb26.GJoCgS&refcode=em260222-1-f&t=4&akid=1686%2E5691347%2EY16kNX)

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I’ve got some important news that I had to share right away:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
This is going to be a tough race.

| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&t=1&akid=7614%2E400544%2EUQHp10)
---
Friend, I had to share this news right away.
**There are now FIVE Republicans running to flip New Mexico.** Several of them are using their own wealth to try to buy this race and bring an extreme agenda into our state.
_One self-funded multimillionaire GOP candidate has even said he’ll put $2 MILLION of his own money into his campaign._
I urgently need your grassroots support to ensure my campaign can compete. _**[So please, will you chip in $5 right now to help me close the gap on my $50,000 goal and win in New Mexico?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5112?refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&amount=5&t=2&akid=7614%2E400544%2EUQHp10)**_
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5112?refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&t=3&akid=7614%2E400544%2EUQHp10)
---
**I’ll be honest: This is going to be a tough race.** It's already clear that the GOP is going to try to buy this race, and unlike my multimillionaire opponent, I can't just write myself a check.
I don’t come from wealth, friend. I have never had the means to self-fund a campaign, unlike my wealthy opponents. I was a single mom living paycheck to paycheck, relying on government programs like SNAP, WIC, and Medicaid to help keep my child fed and healthy.
**So I know what it's like to struggle, and I also know that it takes a village, in both life and in politics. I strongly believe leaders should make people’s lives easier, not harder. We all want good roads, safe communities, strong education, access to parks, and affordable, healthy food to eat.**
That’s exactly why I’m better prepared to lead. I understand affordability because I’ve lived it. I know how critical strong public schools, accessible health care, and safe communities are because my family relied on them. These issues aren’t abstract to me; they’re personal. And beyond my lived experience, I’ve led at the highest levels of government, serving in Congress and as U.S. Secretary of the Interior, where I took on tough fights and delivered real results for communities across the country. I know how to fight for working families — and how to get things done.
Experience matters. Leadership matters. And I’m ready.
That's why I’m running to be the next governor of New Mexico, to build a better future for working families. But I need your help to reach my midnight fundraising goal to make that a reality:
**I'm running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support from folks like you chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare to help me go up against these self-funded multimillionaires.**_**[Please, will you chip in to help me win and keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5112?refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&t=4&akid=7614%2E400544%2EUQHp10)**_
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5113?refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&t=5&akid=7614%2E400544%2EUQHp10)
---
| | [Donate $35](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5114?refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&t=6&akid=7614%2E400544%2EUQHp10)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5115?refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&t=7&akid=7614%2E400544%2EUQHp10)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5112?refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&t=8&akid=7614%2E400544%2EUQHp10)
---
Thank you,

Deb
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2928?refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&t=9&akid=7614%2E400544%2EUQHp10)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&t=10&akid=7614%2E400544%2EUQHp10)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?&t=11&akid=7614%2E400544%2EUQHp10)
[**Update Your Information**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/?&t=12&akid=7614%2E400544%2EUQHp10)
[**Unsubscribe**](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?&t=13&akid=7614%2E400544%2EUQHp10)
Email us: info@debhaaland.com
**PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: HUMILIATING rebuke
