[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100645?refcode=em20260222-10096&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=10096%2E614464%2EFKb-Ro) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100645?refcode=em20260222-10096&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=10096%2E614464%2EFKb-Ro) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100644?refcode=em20260222-10096&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=10096%2E614464%2EFKb-Ro)

They'll be able to respond faster and hit harder when it matters most – simply because they have the resources to do it _immediately._
Unless we do something about it right now.
**The good news? We have something they don't:** A powerful grassroots movement of everyday Americans who refuse to let billionaires and corporations buy our elections.
But that only matters if you act.

Folks - it's John Kennedy.[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/v0ijn4t3FJYjV4EbTEZ2Rc-9gVy-3T2dJTZ4ZrYDvzlysMdxPEVuCOCqm1RAKqCaIKti9KV5m5lSy7uHpDM28TD6qQ9_SvZjVfR7qsjdd3bWKd8E-8nraPNEtidNHDvffW7t7fozfxUCaWY8TUzRVs3jWoqnXY3GOK5m6-j8INw2J4eu9g7hGx5ZFSJIRy_7gAPO_XvFieY5M1pg47l3df3u8TotY6HrF3FQiIXrygxH1ogpSNhuH9NSS7NzucnvL7JdBPXcxJxj-h8BCW1i8aflsHzUTOBetiirzQXiqIV1Zsgfc0mMO2q6A9azy-j5vo5ukQa4a-9-Rd2Grl5Z2J3aPCj0OTGPQXKxAe_K5hOdozMSjrJuDyHKUaphuTmnZ3NeQvOXRfBPTOqXGaQMYirEQ3H4afoH1uTb1XMTYPGQcOcR4dglNrCtrVthsh1opn09CfR8Ig1jyWBN3XVhv2qml1h2PurzSs3Y4cZsArSctmhbnh3JsM2ULgGg24NaS4F5-l1_zc1yxJYgE9UWLocTTlsyYAa5K4AypnD6TVz3r04_H7bkwpYNGtMkjBwFGVKusrmZBmBbhFPPSWSd9_IBwOwK0AOWRin0R-RPtaCPtXei3DGY6Qo2hZSzgRZkQ0ARDuzxCmjSqLyAQV9s4vG4sjbeGyDJcXrXMwY0BtC_xO4-EFOTEH5hPO0lRBeEFoX7-xDoCDhdvLI7NP8w-pRyYmSJqUa0DV0orONNu_9-n0CFWECxBCaXtQQpgQd4eD0l9XlbTgFJNO4KYILNXyw7w2QfFt9bze2DiYj5yzBRJ_i09sTQUOsC-pDwp4AWLOrip5ZNoJHusOaMXAUt/5Pg1VJCcnNyzgxpZfUEfnPaPH9luKmtk/18)I'll put this plainly, the water in Washington is not going to clear up until we get the pigs out of the creek.
That's just reality.
Washington is a cesspool of creeps, crooks, crockpots, and crybabies. It's getting harder and harder to find honest folks who just want to do right by God for America.
My friend Steve Scalise just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $100,000,000 (that ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're targeting 35 GOP seats in our most vulnerable districts - harder than ever before.
Now, my buddies in the House have their FIRST major deadline of the election year coming up - and I just learned they're falling 15-20% behind goal.

Washington is a cesspool of creeps, crooks, crockpots, and crybabies. It's getting harder and harder to find honest folks who just want to do right by God for America. My friend Steve Scalise just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $100,000,000 (that ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're targeting 35 GOP seats in our most vulnerable districts - harder than ever before. Now, my buddies in the House have their FIRST major deadline of the election year coming up - and I just learned they're falling 15-20% behind goal. If they miss it, it'll be a devastating blow. name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: If it’s the last thing I do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1727%2E251025%2EECU0a0 ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1727%2E251025%2EECU0a0 ]Abdul for US Senate

When I served as Wayne County Health Director, we spearheaded a program to
cancel up to $700 million in medical debt for 300,000 Michiganders.

That’s not a typo. $700,000,000.

We did that at the local level. Just imagine what we could do in the
United States Senate,
Peter.

This is the type of progress I’m fighting to deliver on a larger scale,
but there are massive forces working against us, including Big Pharma.

The pharmaceutical industry spends hundreds of millions of dollars
lobbying Congress to keep healthcare expensive, confusing, and out of
reach.

They like the system exactly the way it is.

I don’t.

Peter, if
it’s the last thing I do, I want Americans to have healthcare.

We proved in Wayne County that government can work for people — not
corporations. Now, we have the opportunity to carry this fight forward to
the U.S. Senate.

I don’t take checks from the pharmaceutical industry. I’m the only
candidate in this race who has never accepted a dime from corporate PACs,
and never will.

So if we’re going to beat them, we have to do it together.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260222-1-ak.OKItxS&amount=10&refcode=em20260222-1727&t=1004&akid=1727%2E251025%2EECU0a0 ]If you believe healthcare is a right, not a revenue stream, chip in
$10 to help us prove it in the U.S. Senate:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260222-1-ak.OKItxS&amount=10&refcode=em20260222-1727&t=1023&akid=1727%2E251025%2EECU0a0 ]Donate $10 ››

In solidarity,

Abdul

clean_body: [ ]Abdul for US Senate [ ]Abdul for US Senate When I served as Wayne County Health Director, we spearheaded a program to cancel up to $700 million in medical debt for 300,000 Michiganders. That’s not a typo. $700,000,000. We did that at the local level. Just imagine what we could do in the United States Senate, Peter. This is the type of progress I’m fighting to deliver on a larger scale, but there are massive forces working against us, including Big Pharma. The pharmaceutical industry spends hundreds of millions of dollars lobbying Congress to keep healthcare expensive, confusing, and out of reach. They like the system exactly the way it is. I don’t. Peter, if it’s the last thing I do, I want Americans to have healthcare. We proved in Wayne County that government can work for people — not corporations. Now, we have the opportunity to carry this fight forward to the U.S. Senate. I don’t take checks from the pharmaceutical industry. I’m the only candidate in this race who has never accepted a dime from corporate PACs, and never will. So if we’re going to beat them, we have to do it together. [ ]If you believe healthcare is a right, not a revenue stream, chip in $10 to help us prove it in the U.S. Senate: [ ]Donate $10 ›› In solidarity, Abdul

_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._

|
---
| Parents, America’s 250th birthday is almost here, and moments like this don’t come around often. It’s a powerful opportunity to help your kids understand where our country came from, what it stands for, and why those ideas still matter today. That’s why we created [_The Kids Guide to America’s 250th Birthday Patriotic Gift Bundle_](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D). This special offer gives families a complete introduction to America’s story in a way kids can actually understand and enjoy. Through engaging explanations, thoughtful storytelling, and age-appropriate lessons, your children don’t just learn facts — they begin to understand the meaning behind America’s founding and its lasting impact. For a limited time, we’re giving away _The Kids Guide to America’s 250th Birthday_ and _The Kids Guide to America’s Greatness_ for free to help your kids and grandkids learn the riveting story of how we fought for and achieved our independence, and why we celebrate our freedom every year. You just need to pay $1 s&p each, which is a small price to share the truth with your kids.
---
| [ ](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
---
In a time when kids are constantly surrounded by screens and distractions, this is a gift that slows things down and helps them connect with something bigger than themselves. It gives them context. It gives them pride. And it gives parents a simple way to pass down values that last. If you want your kids to grow up understanding not just what America is, but why it exists, this gift bundle is a great place to start. 👉 Claim your Kids Guide USA Gift Bundle today and be part of this historic moment with your family. Sincerely, Your Friends from The Kids Guide

name: The Democrats
subject: Take a look at this map
body:
Five new Republican House seats are in play...
---
Derek, After Democrats won double-digit victories in 2025, we’re going on offense and targeting _even more_ Republican members of Congress this November. **That’s why House Democrats have added five new Republican-held seats to our target list:** [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?refcode=em_20260222_6173_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6173_22930333_e-M32s&akid=6173%2E22930333%2Ee-M32s) **This is a _big deal._** Since 2025, Democrats have been overperforming by _so much_ that it’s putting previously safe Republican seats in play. **Derek, we can’t take our foot off the gas.** That’s why we’ve launched a nationwide campaign to register voters, train our volunteer base, and host in-person and virtual events in places where people need to hear from us. **We’re organizing everywhere so we can win anywhere — and we’re starting _right now_**. But this kind of investment wouldn’t be possible without our team of grassroots supporters just like you. [**Thousands of Democrats across the country have already chipped in to ensure we can flip the House this year. Derek, will you join them and make a contribution to help flip these districts and win back our majority this year?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?refcode=em_20260222_6173_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6173_22930333_e-M32s&akid=6173%2E22930333%2Ee-M32s) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260222_6173_fr&refcode2=6173_22930333_e-M32s&akid=6173%2E22930333%2Ee-M32s)**

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: I’m running for governor of the state of Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Minnesotans for Klobuchar _
body:
To accomplish everything we’re setting out to do, I need your support.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-klobuchar-2026.A9531n&refcode=em260222-1-b&t=1&akid=11270%2E3935704%2E5P1ooO)
---
Hi there —
I wanted you to be one of the first to hear the news: I’m running for governor of the state of Minnesota.**This is a home-grown campaign, born in a moment like no other.**
[**I’m going to tell you why in a moment. But first: Will you help us get off to a strong start by splitting a donation between GIFFORDS and my campaign?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-klobuchar-2026.A9531n&refcode=em260222-1-b&t=2&akid=11270%2E3935704%2E5P1ooO)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-klobuchar-2026.A9531n&refcode=em260222-1-b&t=3&akid=11270%2E3935704%2E5P1ooO)**
I’m not going to sugar coat it -- Minnesota has been through a lot.
The killings of two innocent Minnesotans. Three thousand ICE agents on our streets and in our towns, sent by an administration that relishes division. Minnesotans stood up. Our state has been the center of America’s heartbreak. But we have also been the center of America's courage and America's hope. In moments of enormous difficulty, we find strength in our Minnesota values of hard work, freedom, and simple decency and good will.
**These moments call for grit and resilience.** I’ve learned resilience from the people of Minnesota. They have stood up, they have marched, and they have brought food to their neighbors. Through it all we do not give up.
And grit? I learned that from my family. I’m the daughter of a newspaperman and a proud union member teacher. My grandpa worked 1,500 feet underground in the mines on the Iron Range, and he saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college. I wouldn’t be where I am today without them.
**These times call for leaders who can stand up and not be rubber stamps of this administration.** But who are also willing to find common ground and fix things in our state.
I led our state’s biggest prosecutors’ office for eight years and then you gave me the honor of serving as your United States Senator. I was ranked number one in the Senate for bipartisan bills and number three out of one hundred for getting bills passed into law.
**I will do my job without fear or favor. I’ve never shied away from taking on the powerful. That’s what I did as a prosecutor. That’s what I did as senator. And that’s what I will do as your governor.**
I believe we must stand up for what’s right. And fix what’s wrong. I am running for every Minnesotan who wants to buy their first home, for every parent who wants a better world for their kids, for everyone who wants more affordable healthcare. I am running for every Minnesotan who wants to protect our democracy and get ICE and its abusive tactics out of the state we love
And I'm running for every student, farmer, dreamer and builder.
_But to accomplish everything we’re setting out to do, I need your support._
**This campaign is for people who believe in something bigger than ourselves. For people who know that things have got to change.**
[**So please: Will you support my campaign for governor with a donation today? Your contribution will be split with GIFFORDS.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-klobuchar-2026.A9531n&refcode=em260222-1-b&t=4&akid=11270%2E3935704%2E5P1ooO)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between Amy Klobuchar and GIFFORDS PAC:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-klobuchar-2026.-uFt1o&amount=3&refcode=em260222-1-b&t=23&akid=11270%2E3935704%2E5P1ooO)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-klobuchar-2026.UKjpVn&refcode=em260222-1-b&t=24&akid=11270%2E3935704%2E5P1ooO)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-klobuchar-2026.4XSmf5&refcode=em260222-1-b&t=25&akid=11270%2E3935704%2E5P1ooO)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-klobuchar-2026.JXDh94&refcode=em260222-1-b&t=26&akid=11270%2E3935704%2E5P1ooO)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-klobuchar-2026.VCIE5K&refcode=em260222-1-b&t=27&akid=11270%2E3935704%2E5P1ooO)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-klobuchar-2026.-uFt1o&refcode=em260222-1-b&t=28&akid=11270%2E3935704%2E5P1ooO)**
---
****
**I like my job in the Senate. But I love our state more than any job.** I love the people of Minnesota. And Minnesota, I want to be a transformative governor.
Now is our moment to renew our commitment to the common good. I’m asking you to look up to the North Star and to see that there is a better future before us.
To pursue good, we must believe that good will prevail. I know I do -- and that’s why I’m asking you to join us.
Amy
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-klobuchar-2026.A9531n&refcode=em260222-1-b&t=29&akid=11270%2E3935704%2E5P1ooO)**
_Prepared and Paid for by Minnesotans for Klobuchar _

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=11270%2E3935704%2E5P1ooO) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up dirt poor, I was raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.
It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.
But I felt God called me to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I believe millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.
As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC.
I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.
I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.
[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/WxhASbzkiFwRhn8xcOvlIS6g3Uupj4h7qFLIDKbWJswdyolD7VT2pugeFftg06JLUslBfd6A8UF-qmJEKwGVv8aL-2u7HzsD3xZgnuDkALXuaQmHYZ7Ma8uIowgxdSUCTisoWjfZGizWGVg0Dm4Rqwwrgppsr9-0v1-BjwRNfbVBDj-TYZ2186INagNZTRWR_5Zt-wZgKoPErNKeH8F_NokoXKNhfdfz9dPvd21shks5d32fFpqn0X7Xx2GmM1RUgR9WjtedF0kG8NRVS7nk5dSU6wKahBbTY6pOlJw7Dav-wkI_j5t9pPfHKQ9JqGksoLHTuQvxef79GlF7aah71gTk_LbM8qGq85jVAjFnmMfmnyGn6Klx_s59wkQj_gUf_PTzjqgLX18JHwHoQKDsR6NnnC-gd_Jo1jHz8MVybSwJ07UrVXZmVZ2pzP5W6xeYKhazWO6jfIT9JBCsi6OHdg0PExUUTuSNePg9EiHWk3uFZPbAiYFR6TXi69C4shD191DH2vXHvH3Bf6oSpCENfJcOzVHm61Dv7AHCeDB7UcR6fvRlozjF9hAD5mChNKJqliU0fJx_QFEQh_OkHRrNOwCn3WV3wNi3eYybbF5GAZf1xvdlqqVOX2PYGGoHr_wClhLlf_2bBKf5Rssjz9xVThbLQeY9J5N5u8KW9TVtxUUFrV9IYGE0r-e2NN7njD2n4uvNerVNS_bWkyKZpWki5ncUnWREEVeA15WEr0Xl86RqVkcumbgiGaNTDNagRzKdOSng9CZn86hjNjD8HipnLAFRPweDW213HUO2kX9ynA0VXZyCV5AdcFiWT3aDPNfkRGp4rOXT1CakfYY/fgR2ReQ768YLVw-5JbUPDjUjlWVgvYQt/18)
We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.
So now we're forced to rebuild.
The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.
At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.
So here's my final pitch to you:

clean_body: fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up dirt poor, I was raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt God called me to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I believe millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer. I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: , you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance * + top Conservative leaders at the heart of our MAGA Movement have reached out with GRAVE WARNINGS on the state of the Midterms like NEVER BEFORE... Democrat controlled House would be the worst-case scenario for the MAGA Movement. We're pleading with you to take this seriously. | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003 |

body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZLSGNBCfGps7nvvLp7V8jUWB28R0QwfMr3uYQcbSoBFoiQNkI21WhnXIpcNqEj_PElC-3bWOsWzO05UpHfONtGLgAtc-MPSna1CKrIsXl8ZVRWgPgF1C2isYkV0XgkIy1oFpsxHqqirXTAG_drqRjLTEyqrK80YLrYGy3dm4Ph2vcQ3CaqxzS9TD2_IujaBw2TQFB10y3ZCU-b8PjcCMMj_PNm7xj1LYd34C864s5Y8=&c=RLgzgDYr_V9Vgi9NU31GuSBqrU9S4Zq2dD3eITw92q88cWRe0_KFuQ==&ch=1ytI3Fg_0k6_os_xGEGpvQom3Xouhu19Kg3OmH9NGlr1ag_PNW_ReA==)

| Peter, Just a few weeks ago, Trump's longtime advisor and MAGA mouthpiece, Steve Bannon stated that ICE will surround polling locations and intimidate voters in the upcoming midterms.
Now, Kristi Noem, the head of the Department of Homeland Security that oversees ICE just told the press that she will work to ensure that the "right people" vote for the "right leaders" in the upcoming midterm elections:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZLSGNBCfGps7nvvLp7V8jUWB28R0QwfMr3uYQcbSoBFoiQNkI21WhnXIpcNqEj_PElC-3bWOsWzO05UpHfONtGLgAtc-MPSna1CKrIsXl8ZVRWgPgF1C2isYkV0XgkIy1oFpsxHqqirXTAG_drqRjLTEyqrK80YLrYGy3dm4Ph2vcQ3CaqxzS9TD2_IujaBw2TQFB10y3ZCU-b8PjcCMMj_PNm7xj1LYPvC37Xe9Tmk=&c=RLgzgDYr_V9Vgi9NU31GuSBqrU9S4Zq2dD3eITw92q88cWRe0_KFuQ==&ch=1ytI3Fg_0k6_os_xGEGpvQom3Xouhu19Kg3OmH9NGlr1ag_PNW_ReA==)
---
MAGA isn't even hiding their election rigging scheme anymore. They are just openly admitting it because they don't think Democrats can do anything to stop them.
For months, Defend Our Courts has warned that MAGA was preparing to rig the next elections by any means necessary. What Kristi Noem said is just further proof. MAGA is preparing to use DHS and ICE to interfere with voting itself.
MAGA knows their support is collapsing. They're in full panic mode, throwing every scheme they can at the wall, hoping something sticks and lets them rig the midterms before voters hand them a massive defeat.
But thankfully, Democrats can do something to stop Trump's election rigging schemes.
When voter intimidation and election disputes happen, the final word does not come from the White House. It comes from state Supreme Courts. That is why MAGA is gearing up to spend hundreds of millions to capture these courts in 2026.
Last year, we helped defend the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, protecting a critical firewall in the most important swing state in the country.
Now the next battlegrounds are Michigan, Wisconsin, and Georgia, where state Supreme Courts will decide whether democracy is protected or undermined.
Defend Our Courts was built for this moment. We rallied more than 100,000 Democrats and proved we can win in PA. Now we are taking that fight nationwide.
[Will you chip in $25, $15, or whatever you can right now to help us defend pro-democracy majorities on state Supreme Courts before MAGA puts its election rigging scheme into action?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZLSGNBCfGps7nvvLp7V8jUWB28R0QwfMr3uYQcbSoBFoiQNkI21WhnXIpcNqEj_Pf3VSRDrx4KAzTRmWdyv-T7-b8S8CThHKhEDvaRv4uFS5nd8GIlDAd7EsRoHkEj6t4Rzwd7eoWYHgJOvpnY5OEHxR1uu_z02wmmo4sdJ5Xb0lbcLZDvvTLUzyw55STfoKREyti2MyaDiiK2sUM3S8Ud10ncwRg5EDjF4GArZOrKpRNtiDthFEDCiRP21XWwz_&c=RLgzgDYr_V9Vgi9NU31GuSBqrU9S4Zq2dD3eITw92q88cWRe0_KFuQ==&ch=1ytI3Fg_0k6_os_xGEGpvQom3Xouhu19Kg3OmH9NGlr1ag_PNW_ReA==)

Now, Kristi Noem, the head of the Department of Homeland Security that oversees ICE just told the press that she will work to ensure that the "right people" vote for the "right leaders" in the upcoming midterm elections: | == MAGA isn't even hiding their election rigging scheme anymore. They are just openly admitting it because they don't think Democrats can do anything to stop them. For months, Defend Our Courts has warned that MAGA was preparing to rig the next elections by any means necessary. What Kristi Noem said is just further proof. MAGA is preparing to use DHS and ICE to interfere with voting itself. MAGA knows their support is collapsing. They're in full panic mode, throwing every scheme they can at the wall, hoping something sticks and lets them rig the midterms before voters hand them a massive defeat. But thankfully, Democrats can do something to stop Trump's election rigging schemes. When voter intimidation and election disputes happen, the final word does not come from the White House. It comes from state Supreme Courts. That is why MAGA is gearing up to spend hundreds of millions to capture these courts in 2026. Last year, we helped defend the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, protecting a critical firewall in the most important swing state in the country. Now the next battlegrounds are Michigan, Wisconsin, and Georgia, where state Supreme Courts will decide whether democracy is protected or undermined. Defend Our Courts was built for this moment. We rallied more than 100,000 Democrats and proved we can win in PA. name: ChristinaBohannan.com
subject: Miller-Meeks is neglecting farmers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125905472/603284301/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjYyYTU2MC0wODEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pp9ZZA59OtT45O7YNoby0v3C7gIuxX5_SyodZHduC5A=)

Peter, in Iowa, farming is a way of life. You would think that representing a state like ours in Congress would mean standing up for the families who work the land and feed the country. _But time and again, Mariannette Miller-Meeks has put Iowa farmers on the backburner._

**She's failed to even try to deliver a Farm Bill that farmers desperately need, and she's supported tariffs that have squeezed family farms and made it harder for them to stay afloat. Instead of fighting for our farms, she continues to side with special interests and wealthy donors. From her vantage point in Washington, maybe those decisions don't feel like a big deal.**

But Christina knows exactly what happens when our farming families get left behind by politics.

Christina’s grandparents had a family farm. They looked forward to the day when her dad would take it over and continue to build on the family's legacy. But their costs were high, profits were low, and then the government used eminent domain to cut an interstate straight through their property, splitting the farm apart and making it harder to access. The way of life they loved became unsustainable, so Christina’s dad had to quit school at just 16 years old and get another job to help his family get by.

Christina knows that good representation can help farmers succeed – but politicians like Miller-Meeks can also drive them to bankruptcy. That's why in Congress, Christina wants to be a champion for farmers and the middle class and ensure they can thrive.

**[It's time to send someone to Washington who will stand up for Iowa's farming families every single day. Chip in today to help power Christina’s campaign>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125905473/603284302/-2011951990?refcode=em26_260222_FRFarm_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260222_FRFarm_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=4b62a560-0810-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjYyYTU2MC0wODEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pp9ZZA59OtT45O7YNoby0v3C7gIuxX5_SyodZHduC5A=)**

Thank you,

ChristinaBohannan.com

name: Endorsement Update (via JanePAC.com)
subject: Big Oil picked their Democrats. We picked ours.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We’re going all in.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125905843/603285470/1328794144?refcode=ea.2b9c8e39-0810-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&ms=ea.2b9c8e39-0810-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJiOWM4ZTM5LTA4MTAtZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTU3NTkzZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KrQK7mYvte7VObmGJzfNWdxnoLsaKarw8EU9QrWtTRE=&emci=0622f9cb-e70d-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&emdi=2b9c8e39-0810-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&ceid=4823105)
---
Friend — you've probably heard the phrase “follow the money.” When it comes to two Democratic primaries this year, the money tells a very telling story.
* * *
**In California's 22nd Congressional District, Jasmeet Bains** has collected donations from 53 of the same corporations that funded her Republican opponent — including Chevron, ExxonMobil, and Phillips 66. She accepted over $54,000 from oil and gas in just one legislative session while representing communities breathing some of the dirtiest air in America. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125905844/603285471/2105508926?refcode=ea.2b9c8e39-0810-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&ms=ea.2b9c8e39-0810-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJiOWM4ZTM5LTA4MTAtZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTU3NTkzZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KrQK7mYvte7VObmGJzfNWdxnoLsaKarw8EU9QrWtTRE=) She even voted against blocking oil companies from price-gouging her own constituents. clean_body: We’re going all in. | Friend — you've probably heard the phrase “follow the money.” When it comes to two Democratic primaries this year, the money tells a very telling story. In California's 22nd Congressional District, Jasmeet Bains has collected donations from 53 of the same corporations that funded her Republican opponent — including Chevron, ExxonMobil, and Phillips 66. She accepted over $54,000 from oil and gas in just one legislative session while representing communities breathing some of the dirtiest air in America. = She even voted against blocking oil companies from price-gouging her own constituents. And when a fellow Democrat simply pointed to her public donor records in a campaign ad, she called it “political violence.” = In Minnesota's U.S. Senate race , a Chevron-backed super PAC has poured over $600,000 behind Angie Craig — a Democrat who was the only member of her entire state delegation to vote for the Laken Riley Act, empowering ICE to strip immigrants of due process. = Her campaign is stacked with the same corporate PAC money that funds the politicians blocking climate action in Washington. = These are not the kind of Democrats we're fighting to elect. And that's exactly why we're going all in on the candidates who are taking them on. Peggy Flanagan is challenging Angie Craig for Minnesota's U.S. Senate seat, and the contrast could not be sharper. Peggy has refused every dollar of corporate PAC money, helped deliver over $1 billion in clean energy investment as Lieutenant Governor, and has been on the front lines protesting ICE raids alongside Minnesota communities. Randy Villegas is taking on Jasmeet Bains in CA-22 — and he's doing it the hard way. No corporate PAC checks, no favors owed. Just a journalist-turned-school board member who exposed pesticide dangers, connected schools to clean water, and is running to hold the same corporations Bains took money from accountable in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = — Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

| Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are now cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A vengeful Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.

_...Or so I thought!_

**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**

_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_

Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.

My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN this trial is patriots like _YOU_.

**That’s why I’ve officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me _more power_ to fight the Democrats' vindictive attempt to imprison me for LIFE.**
---
_And now, I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my new Defense Trust._

clean_body: | Peter, I just stepped off the stage with President Trump. The crowd was electric. Fired up. Ready. You could feel it in the air: He called me up. I walked over. Shook his hand. Looked him in the eye, and said: ** And I meant it. Not for me. For this country. Because November isn't just another election. It's our shot to KICK DEMOCRAT JON OSSOFF OUT OF THE UNITED STATES SENATE and continue to TAKE OUR COUNTRY BACK. Right now: > >> Ossoff is counting on DC insiders and coastal donors. > >> The Left is flooding Georgia with outside money. > >> Chuck Schumer is desperate to protect his rubber stamp. They know Georgia could decide control of the Senate. And if they keep that seat? > They keep blocking President Trump's agenda. > They keep protecting the swamp. > They keep dragging this country further left. But here's the truth: The energy from that stage? The fire in that crowd? That has to turn into action. Into turnout. Into organization. Into resources to fight in every county in this state. I told President Trump I'd deliver Georgia. Now I need you to help me do it. | This race will be one of the most expensive in the country. The Left is already gearing up. But they don't have what we have. They don't have patriots who refuse to back down. Georgia isNOT for sale. Georgia isNOT backing down. And Jon Ossoff 's time is up.** For America, Mike Collins U.S. Congressman | Candidate for U.S. Senate PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO Box 6491 Athens, GA 30604 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please . |

| | Hello Friend, There are moments in life when eternity suddenly feels very close. A doctor’s report.
A late-night phone call.
A quiet realization that this life is far more fragile than we like to admit. In those moments, one question rises to the surface. What happens when we die? The Bible does not leave that question unanswered. The apostle Paul wrote, “To be absent from the body is to be present with the Lord” (2 Corinthians 5:8). For the believer, death is not a season of uncertainty or separation from God. It is an immediate entrance into the presence of Jesus Christ. That truth replaces fear with confidence and despair with hope. Yet many Christians have never been clearly taught what the Bible actually says about heaven. That is why I wrote _A Place Called Heaven_. In this book, I answer from Scripture what happens the moment a Christian takes their final breath and steps into eternity.

| Hi friend, it’s Senator Elissa Slotkin. Today’s a special day for my friend and fellow Michigander, Congresswoman Hillary Scholten. It’s her birthday, and I need your help to make it special!

I see how hard Congresswoman Scholten works to represent West Michigan and support strong candidates across Michigan. In order to take back the House, we only need to flip 5 seats and 3 of them are right here in Michigan.

The stakes are high – for the cost of living, healthcare, and the future of the middle class in our country. Winning back the House is critical to changing course, and like me, Congresswoman Scholten takes her responsibility as a legislator and a leader seriously.

In order to take back the House, we only need to flip 5 seats and 3 of them are right here in Michigan. The stakes are high – for the cost of living, healthcare, and the future of the middle class in our country. Winning back the House is critical to changing course, and like me, Congresswoman Scholten takes her responsibility as a legislator and a leader seriously. = | | | = | = | = | = | = For Congresswoman Scholten’s birthday, the best gift would be knowing people have her back. Thanks for being part of this team, Senator Elissa Slotkin = Here’s a fun photo of us from the DNC convention in 2024! * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . To stop receiving all email communications, please

name: Gov. Andy Beshear
subject: My north star
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Peter,

Earlier this month, I went on _The View_ and talked about something Democrats don't always say out loud enough: our "why."

For me, my why has always been my faith. It's my north star.

My faith teaches me to love my neighbor, and it teaches me that everyone is my neighbor — **not just the people I agree with, not just the people I know, not just the people who vote the same way I do.** _Everyone, no exceptions._

That belief shapes how I lead, and it's why I vetoed the nastiest anti-trans bill that came through Kentucky. Because my faith tells me all children are children of God — I won't be part of a state government targeting and picking on kids for being who they are. It's why I've worked so hard to bring good-paying jobs to Kentucky, so families can live with dignity, and why I'm fighting for better healthcare, universal pre-K for our kids, and real opportunity, **because everyone deserves a level playing field and the same chance to thrive.**

At In This Together PAC, we're helping candidates figure out their why, Peter:
* Why do they feel called to serve?
* What in their life pushes them to stand up for others?
* What grounds them when the pressure is on?

Because when you're guided by something deeper, you govern differently.

**[If you believe we need more leaders who lead from their values and with integrity, honesty, and a fundamental belief in the work they do and the people they fight for, chip in anything you can to help power this work forward.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125906770/603288497/1338299492?refcode=em26_260222_view_fndd_gq_act___GAB_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em26_260222_view_fndd_gq_act___GAB_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=bcbaa5e2-0a10-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&refcode2=bcbaa5e2-0a10-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmNiYWE1ZTItMGExMC1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhNTc1OTNmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EvZKImD1lhUaws2LSOxobE8R5iESXMLAqTpBh_Mvkvs=)** clean_body: Peter, Earlier this month, I went on The View and talked about something Democrats don't always say out loud enough: our "why." For me, my why has always been my faith. It's my north star. My faith teaches me to love my neighbor, and it teaches me that everyone is my neighbor — not just the people I agree with, not just the people I know, not just the people who vote the same way I do. Everyone, no exceptions. That belief shapes how I lead, and it's why I vetoed the nastiest anti-trans bill that came through Kentucky. Because my faith tells me all children are children of God — I won't be part of a state government targeting and picking on kids for being who they are. It's why I've worked so hard to bring good-paying jobs to Kentucky, so families can live with dignity, and why I'm fighting for better healthcare, universal pre-K for our kids, and real opportunity, because everyone deserves a level playing field and the same chance to thrive. At In This Together PAC, we're helping candidates figure out their why, Peter: Why do they feel called to serve? What in their life pushes them to stand up for others? What grounds them when the pressure is on? Because when you're guided by something deeper, you govern differently. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Andy | Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. Will you donate today to support In This Together's mission?** = Paid for by In This Together PAC. InThisTogetherPAC.com. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: JD Vance is a pathetic liar

body:
JD thinks it is okay to create stories and lie to defend Trump and Republicans.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2100%2E791427%2EFHHv6D)
**Friend — JD Vance is a pathetic liar.**
He lies about undocumented people voting. It’s a complete fabrication.
He lies about undocumented people taking healthcare from US citizens. Another complete fabrication.
He lies about me and defames me with wild accusations of fraud so he can justify this administration’s sham investigations.
He lied about the murders of Renee Good and Alex Pretti and went along with calling them “domestic terrorists” and “assassins” — absolutely vile.
He lied about Kilmar Abrego Garcia, the innocent man that Trump sent to a torture camp in El Saldavor, calling him a "convicted MS-13 gang member".
Before he was elected, he pushed the racist lie that Haitian immigrants are “eating cats and dogs.”
**JD Vance thinks it is okay to create stories and lie to defend Trump and Republicans.**
Don’t take it from me, take it from him:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4818?t=2&akid=2100%2E791427%2EFHHv6D)
Friend, this guy is a complete joke, and we can’t take anything he says seriously.
And it’s not just him; **the Trump administration is the most dishonest, fraudulent, and corrupt group of liars in American history.**
That’s why it’s so important that we take back Congress this November. We need a strong legislative branch that will seek the truth through investigations, committee hearings, and real Congressional oversight.
**[If you can afford it, chip in to my campaign today as I fight for reelection and an end to the Republican majority in Congress. |

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125907297/603290354/556305950?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_GratitudeRS_260222_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWNmYzZiYS0wYjEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rEp4psINeb5Fia-2vq9QXQshxId1V5kkHWUe35P3MWo=) Derek, thank you.

I know I’ve been emailing you a lot, asking you to speak out, push back, and fight for Virginia and our country. I couldn’t be more grateful to have supporters like you by my side stepping up during critical moments for our country.

[_**If you’re able, will you make your first donation to my campaign to help Democrats win the midterms and finally put a check on this administration?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125907298/603290356/556305950?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_GratitudeRS_260222_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWNmYzZiYS0wYjEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rEp4psINeb5Fia-2vq9QXQshxId1V5kkHWUe35P3MWo=)

As I travel the Commonwealth, I've heard from folks who are fired up and ready to defeat the Republicans in Congress that have spent the last year bending to Trump's every demand.

Let me tell you, I can feel the momentum.

But I've been doing this job long enough to know that no campaign is won overnight. It takes sustained engagement and support from folks like you. A victory in November requires us to build this momentum day by day, until the last voter has cast their ballot.

That's why I’m so grateful for your continued support. The resources we raise now determine how many volunteers we can recruit, how many ads we can put on the airwaves, and how strong our Get Out the Vote operation is in the fall.

**It all starts now, and I'm confident that with committed grassroots supporters like you, we can get the job done.**

[_**Which is why I have to ask: Will you pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can today? Your contribution right now lays the groundwork for the rest of the year.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125907300/603290357/556305950?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_GratitudeRS_260222_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWNmYzZiYS0wYjEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rEp4psINeb5Fia-2vq9QXQshxId1V5kkHWUe35P3MWo=)

Thank you for standing with me.

The fight continues,

Mark **Before you go:**

We’re asking people like you – who care deeply about our democracy and the future of our country – to join us in our fight to help Democrats win the midterms and bring accountability and transparency to Washington.

Conservative activist and Oregon gubernatorial candidate David Medina **[raised hell at a Portland city council meeting,](https://substack.com/redirect/ddfbb5e6-88e6-4d91-9387-91175daa035b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** calling out radical left Democrat leaders for obstructing ICE and allowing their city to be overrun with crime.
## [Watch the intense moment here: ](https://substack.com/redirect/ddfbb5e6-88e6-4d91-9387-91175daa035b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ddfbb5e6-88e6-4d91-9387-91175daa035b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ddfbb5e6-88e6-4d91-9387-91175daa035b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"It's no wonder this city is going down hill, you don't care about law enforcement!" he snapped at the politicians.
An uproar of left-wing crowd members interrupted his speech, some shouting "Nazi." "Let me have my time back!!"
* * *
**Sponsored by[Health Sciences Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/8357a091-e03c-44b2-8c18-c50435e77635?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Pelosi retiring early after EXPLOSIVE humiliation?](https://substack.com/redirect/8357a091-e03c-44b2-8c18-c50435e77635?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8357a091-e03c-44b2-8c18-c50435e77635?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Nancy Pelosi 's worst nightmare is happening RIGHT NOW...**
**[5 buried government files](https://substack.com/redirect/8357a091-e03c-44b2-8c18-c50435e77635?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have just been leaked online...** And the **[explosive bombshells](https://substack.com/redirect/8357a091-e03c-44b2-8c18-c50435e77635?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** revealed inside have the entire Swamp QUAKING.
**Because they 've been kept under government lock and key **_**for more than 55 YEARS**_**.**
**Until today.**
[ See the uncensored files](https://substack.com/redirect/8357a091-e03c-44b2-8c18-c50435e77635?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. She NEVER thought these files would go public (**and when you see bombshell #1, you 'll understand why.**) **[Watch now](https://substack.com/redirect/8357a091-e03c-44b2-8c18-c50435e77635?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** before this video is scrubbed from the internet forever.
* * *
# **Armed intruder shot dead after breaching Mar-a-Lago security perimeter**
An unidentified man in his early 20s carrying a shotgun and fuel can **[was shot and killed by Secret Service agents](https://substack.com/redirect/8baeaf06-ecfb-47d1-a965-65e98ed94bc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and a Palm Beach County sheriff's deputy after illegally entering the secure perimeter at President Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago estate early Sunday morning around 1:30 a.m. The suspect raised the shotgun to a "shooting position" after being ordered to drop his weapons, Sheriff Rick Bradshaw said.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8baeaf06-ecfb-47d1-a965-65e98ed94bc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The situation:** Trump was not at Mar-a-Lago at the time of the incident -- he was at the White House after attending the Governor's Dinner with First Lady Melania on Saturday night. The shooting marks the latest security incident involving Trump, following an assassination attempt at his West Palm Beach golf club in 2024 when Ryan Routh aimed a rifle through shrubbery, and the Butler, Pennsylvania rally shooting where Thomas Crooks shot Trump in the ear.
* **What we know:** The suspect was from North Carolina and had been reported missing by his family a few days earlier, according to authorities. Secret Service spokesman Anthony Guglielmi said the gunman is believed to have bought the shotgun after heading south from his home, with the box from the weapon recovered in his vehicle. The FBI, Secret Service, and local police are investigating, and the Secret Service agents involved have been placed on routine administrative leave per agency policy.

* * *
# **Trump sending "great hospital boat" to Greenland after Denmark medical evacuation**
President Donald Trump announced Saturday night **[he will send a U.S. military hospital ship to Greenland to"take care of the many people who are sick,](https://substack.com/redirect/786963fb-8380-4468-91a0-abcb73274a57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and not being taken care of there," working with Louisiana Gov. Jeff Landry, his special envoy to Greenland. The move comes after Denmark's Joint Arctic Command evacuated a U.S. submarine crew member requiring urgent medical treatment from Greenlandic waters to a hospital in Nuuk.
* **Why it matters:** The hospital ship deployment represents Trump's latest push to expand U.S. influence in Greenland amid his designs to buy or take over the strategic Arctic territory from potential Russian and Chinese threats. Gov. Landry spoke with NATO leadership in late January and expressed support for a "framework of a future deal" to solidify U.S. Arctic security, with Trump warning the U.S. is "the only nation that is able to control and secure Greenland."
* **The pushback:** Danish Defense Minister Troels Lund Poulsen told Danish broadcaster DR that "the Greenlandic population receives the healthcare it needs" either locally or through specialized treatment in Denmark, saying "it's not as if there's a need for a special healthcare initiative." Danish PM Mette Frederiksen took a shot at Trump and Republicans without directly addressing the offer, writing she's "happy to live in a country where there is free and equal access to health for all" where "it's not insurances and wealth that determine whether you get proper treatment."

* * *
# **Team USA stuns Canada 2-1 in overtime for Olympic hockey gold on 46th anniversary of 'Miracle on Ice'**
Team USA **[defeated archrival Canada 2-1 in overtime](https://substack.com/redirect/edab8e88-2161-4e14-8fff-d8569756da5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to capture Olympic gold on Sunday, exactly 46 years after the "Miracle on Ice," with Jack Hughes scoring the game-winner at 1:41 of overtime off a feed from Zach Werenski. The victory marks Team USA's third-ever men's hockey gold medal and comes days after the U.S. women's team also won gold.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/edab8e88-2161-4e14-8fff-d8569756da5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Why it matters:** Canada had been Team USA's stumbling block in 2002, 2010, and last year's 4 Nations tournament, dominating the run of play throughout most of Sunday's final. The Americans survived largely on the strength of "arguably the greatest goalie performance in the history of hockey," as Connor Hellebuyck stopped breakaways from Connor McDavid and Macklin Celebrini while his team killed off a 93-second five-on-three penalty in the second period.
* **What happened:** Matt Boldy gave the U.S. a 1-0 lead just 6 minutes into the game with a highlight-reel backhand finish, but Canada's Cale Makar tied it at 18:36 of the second period. Canada twice had open-net opportunities in the third period that will "play out in Canadian nightmares" -- Devon Toews' shot went through the crease and Nathan MacKinnon hit the post. Brock Nelson became the third gold-medal winner in three generations of his family, following his great-uncle and grandfather who won in 1980 and 1960.

| | | | |

| | |
# [Tell Congress: "End Trump's Tariff Power Completely](https://default.salsalabs.org/T907e283e-f508-4364-929c-256d1df50bb0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Quick links: [Go to action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b5f9c06-ff41-434d-8ca6-41baa43cb33a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | [Discuss on Substack](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td80ea27d-4ceb-4116-bf4f-75cfeef11b90/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | [See other actions)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T770f765f-f9b7-424f-8cff-147c805fbbb1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tecd59177-7762-4604-be37-37a0f4203a31/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td31050c4-fde6-484d-96ae-4459d05b09a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**Sign no****w, and demand that Congress stop him. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T41d1a3d5-b35e-46ea-a70e-f580eb83478e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **The Supreme Court just restricted his ability to do impose tariffs, but he still has enormous power to wield his profound stupidity to do incredible damage (thanks to earlier acts of Congress granting him specific powers).** He just put a 15% tariff on Earth. Yes, every country. All of whom now hate us. Congress can and must take these powers back, and end Trump’s tirade. We can’t have one person holding the Sword of Damocles over the entire economy — especially when that person is a moron. **[Tell Congress: “Act NOW to End Trump’s Tariff Rampage.”](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d3c86d1-c369-49db-ac95-f5de9cba5a84/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

body:
The Fourteenth Amendment should not be up for debate. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW2ls3jz6TXBQ7P5g-yIxVekz9pjc13X0rC0qic0f3LYroJfJJLzdFpyq0Gns3lWvq6IDtlvfHggpSU5BaOir2xodLI7VRUzlin7E-VOIVgCyXM9JBqvFFGCFK_YcR1YpqrSftIgFV6bSaSYkxIDFy0Hf2aflkcCNTJt663weJbRH0vu6AZzcLyLE0huQfhxTrqVCaHPDhLIBAFuINsaorVibbzj1QrNAz2yxRIPGLIGrpZxY4wDRWY7hyUUK22b0eOtQaq7c6E7KyVLkAkkuAXC0L5dO6gN3-3dm-HMFV0OpSjCHhzmXFQfcDPGK17pXTZM8GJa_5mM8Y26Sq3eQr7A/4od/1Ichd6vrTMOgBLttTjyt1g/h0/h001.vA-ES4XCsJw6ZTmkeHhA03luOZ4_SXOGcxXQ60BpVN4)
---
Friend, We’re seeing our constitutional rights shredded by this administration, every single day.
**Birthright citizenship, due process, and equal protection are not up for debate. They are written into the Fourteenth Amendment.** That’s why, along with allies in Congress and across the country, I have introduced the **_Defend the Fourteenth Amendment Resolution_** to protect rights that are the cornerstone of our multiracial democracy. We will not allow the Trump administration to criminalize immigration and revoke our rights that were ratified by the states more than 150 years ago. | Friend,
The first big election for Democrats this year is here.
On April 7, Wisconsin voters will decide the future of their State Supreme Court. And with less than two months to go, the race is already exploding.
Last year, Democrats flipped the Wisconsin Supreme Court and secured a 4 to 3 majority. Now, with another seat up for grabs, we have a chance to expand that majority to 5 to 2.
If we win this race, Democrats could lock down control of this critical swing state court until at least 2030.
That means protecting voting rights. Protecting reproductive freedom. Protecting democracy itself in one of the most important battleground states in the country.
And the race has officially begun.
Liberal Judge Chris Taylor just launched the first major ad campaign of the race, warning that extremist judges like her MAGA opponent Maria Lazar are coming for basic benefits like BadgerCare and even trying to enforce Wisconsin's 1849 abortion ban.
Within days, Lazar fired back with a six figure ad blitz of her own calling Taylor a radical and absurdly claiming she wants non-citizens to vote.

---

---
| The first shots of this race have been fired. It's now a dead sprint to the finish.
Right now, Taylor has the edge in fundraising, outraising Lazar by 10-1. But we don't expect this edge to last long. MAGA billionaires and dark money groups will be jumping in the race any day now to prop up Lazar and attack Taylor.
That's why Defend Our Courts is jumping in to help Wisconsin Democrats defeat Lazar. But we need to move fast to be prepared for the inevitable onslaught of MAGA cash, disinformation, and smears.
Last year, we helped lead the successful defense of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, locking in a Democratic majority there until 2029. Now, we are taking our winning formula national.
Wisconsin is our first major test of 2026.
If we are going to stop MAGA, we need to build the war chest now so we are ready to counter every attack the moment it comes.
With more than 100,000 grassroots supporters nationwide, we have the power to be the difference in this race. But we need you on our side in this fight:
Will you rush a donation of $50, $25 or whatever you can spare right now to help Defend Our Courts win in Wisconsin and protect this critical Supreme Court majority?

clean_body: | | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below. | | | | | == | Friend, The first big election for Democrats this year is here. On April 7, Wisconsin voters will decide the future of their State Supreme Court. And with less than two months to go, the race is already exploding. Last year, Democrats flipped the Wisconsin Supreme Court and secured a 4 to 3 majority. Now, with another seat up for grabs, we have a chance to expand that majority to 5 to 2. If we win this race, Democrats could lock down control of this critical swing state court until at least 2030. That means protecting voting rights. Protecting reproductive freedom. Protecting democracy itself in one of the most important battleground states in the country. And the race has officially begun. Liberal Judge Chris Taylor just launched the first major ad campaign of the race, warning that extremist judges like her MAGA opponent Maria Lazar are coming for basic benefits like BadgerCare and even trying to enforce Wisconsin's 1849 abortion ban. Within days, Lazar fired back with a six figure ad blitz of her own calling Taylor a radical and absurdly claiming she wants non-citizens to vote. | == | The first shots of this race have been fired. It's now a dead sprint to the finish. Right now, Taylor has the edge in fundraising, outraising Lazar by 10-1. But we don't expect this edge to last long. MAGA billionaires and dark money groups will be jumping in the race any day now to prop up Lazar and attack Taylor. That's why Defend Our Courts is jumping in to help Wisconsin Democrats defeat Lazar. But we need to move fast to be prepared for the inevitable onslaught of MAGA cash, disinformation, and smears. Last year, we helped lead the successful defense of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, locking in a Democratic majority there until 2029. Now, we are taking our winning formula national. Wisconsin is our first major test of 2026. If we are going to stop MAGA, we need to build the war chest now so we are ready to counter every attack the moment it comes. With more than 100,000 grassroots supporters nationwide, we have the power to be the difference in this race. But we need you on our side in this fight: Will you rush a donation of $50, $25 or whatever you can spare right now to help Defend Our Courts win in Wisconsin and protect this critical Supreme Court majority? | | | | | == | == | == | == Thank you for your support, Team Defend our Courts | | == | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | |

name: Annie Andrews
subject: I'm a pediatrician. I’m pissed. I’m scared.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
I'm a pediatrician. I’m pissed. I’m scared. And I need your help to defeat Lindsey Graham in the U.S. Senate.
I’m not the “monsters-under-the-bed” kind of scared. I’m the “I’ve watched children suffer from preventable illness and injury while politicians do absolutely nothing” kind of scared.
I’ve treated kids who’ve been shot. Kids whose families struggle to afford their medications.
Kids who live with mold that causes asthma attacks, miss school for climate disasters, and watch politicians use them as political pawns.
And now? Trump is causing chaos and Lindsey Graham is right by his side.
And Medicaid — the program that keeps half our pediatric patients insured, healthy, and...alive — is on the chopping block to pay for tax breaks for billionaires.
So yeah, I never planned to run for Senate.
But I’m scared. I’m pissed. I’m motivated. And I’m 100% in.
I’m running for Senate in South Carolina to defeat Lindsey Graham and to fight for the kids no one in D.C. seems to be thinking about. So I need you with me.
We need to hit 10,000 donations before midnight to prove that this campaign can go the distance. Can I count on you to split a donation with my campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
HELP ME DEFEAT LINDSEY GRAHAM! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
I’m running because the Republican Party, led by people like Lindsey Graham, is dismantling the very systems that keep our kids safe here in South Carolina.
I’m running because the issues I care about — children’s healthcare, vaccines, gun violence, public education, Social Security, Medicaid and Medicare — are under direct attack right now.
And I’m running because I consider it my professional duty as a pediatrician — to give children a strong voice at the national level. Too many are comfortable on the sidelines. That won’t work for me.
We need bold leaders who aren’t afraid to fight. I am ready.
Even though the path will be hard, I know Lindsey Graham must be held accountable. He certainly doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years.
That’s why I’m running for US Senate. To defeat Trump’s lapdog and fight for everyday Americans. But, I need your support today. Can you rush a split donation of $10 (or whatever you can spare) between Resist Reclaim Rebuild and me to become a Founding Donor to my campaign? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
CHIP IN TO STOP MAGA EXTREMISM!>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
Thank you for believing in this campaign,
Dr. Annie Andrews
Resist Reclaim Rebuild is an organization committed to helping Democrats win up and down the ballot, nationwide.
PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW.RESISTRECLAIMREBUILD.COM) AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE COMMITTEE.
Resist Reclaim Rebuild
1331 FLORIDA AVE NW
Washington, DC 20009
United States

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Hear what some of our slate has to say →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Justice Democrats has endorsed a dozen bold, progressive champions to take
on out-of-touch incumbents and run for open seats in this year’s
Democratic primaries.

Hear directly from some of our candidates about what it means to be a
Justice Democrat at this critical moment for the Democratic Party and our
country:

“JD’s investment gives me the opportunity to join the ranks of
progressive, working-class champions like Summer Lee, Ayanna Pressley,
and other fearless Justice Democrats in Congress. We look forward to
fighting alongside them in their visionary efforts to identify, nurture
and uplift bold, progressive and courageous leaders to help our country
overcome corporate greed, white supremacy, patriarchy, inequality,
authoritarianism and other attacks on democracy.”
— State Representative Justin J. Pearson, candidate in TN-09

“I am proud to have launched my campaign with Justice Democrats because
they, like Mayor Zohran Mamdani, have shown us what’s possible when we
refuse to let the politics of our past dictate the future we can build
for all New Yorkers today. When we come together, we can topple the
wealthiest political machines and build a government for and by the
people. This campaign is about ensuring that our voices are not only
heard in City Hall, but in the halls of Congress where they have been
ignored for too long.”
— Darializa Avila Chevalier, candidate in NY-13

“I’m honored to earn the endorsement of Justice Democrats and thrilled
to stand alongside a movement that believes our government should work
for working people, not corporate donors or political insiders. Justice
Democrats represents the kind of honest, people-driven politics our
district deserves and together will win the fights for affordability,
justice, and a livable future.”
— Junaid Ahmed, candidate in IL-08

"Since 2018, JD has helped elect a new generation of working-class
leaders who refuse corporate PAC money and answer to their communities.
That mission has never been more urgent than right now. We are living
through a crisis. Our neighbors are being ripped from their families by
ICE. Working people can't afford rent, healthcare, or groceries. And too
many establishment Democrats in Washington are more concerned with
protecting the status quo than protecting our people. We need leaders in
Congress who will meet this moment with the courage it demands—leaders
who fight because it's right, not because they're finally being held
accountable."
— Councilmember Mai Vang, candidate in CA-07

“Justice Democrats was instrumental in my election to Congress, and
their mission of electing working-class candidates to meet this moment
and fight for justice is more urgent now than ever. Congress is beholden
to oligarchs and corporate elites – we need to rebuild a bloc of
fighters for the people. I cannot wait to return to Washington to help
lead this restoration. This race will be a battle – the people vs.
money. I am excited to have JD in our corner as we build a St. Louis
where everyone can thrive.”
— Former Congresswoman Cori Bush, candidate in MO-01

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260222.hn5zdx&refcode=em20260222-37490&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37490%2E1203867%2EeXgs3e ]If these are the kinds of leaders you want to see fighting for you and
your working-class communities in Congress, fuel our work this cycle with
a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare today →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260222.hn5zdx&refcode=em20260222-37490&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=37490%2E1203867%2EeXgs3e ]Contribute $5

Our entire slate rejects corporate PAC money, so they’re counting on this
grassroots movement we’ve built to come together and help them win. Every
dollar you give makes a real, positive impact for each of these campaigns.

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260222-37490-footer&t=1022&refcode2=37490_1203867_eXgs3e&akid=37490%2E1203867%2EeXgs3e

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=37490%2E1203867%2EeXgs3e

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Seth
subject: standing up isn’t optional
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=zeq9RBN45Wk3W%2B1rQkiJ9%2BX9TmiYr2PeoXrf%2FSOtrF%2FOmKnkbw%2FC%2Bhzubz2rd6YUz%2BXFGqVLah18VopzkeWGLbOIj3vGJNdtYEovuSWinQLMcY21w1Gim26ab8H1rKPWd9hlSnkw5IwviTce04yw%2F5%2F4aMMMur%2FH3aEiOqAtEvd%2F1%2BTlnSPBBNSMmTM9u4Wrh6fwHMS5GL1fq1qCroCRUUUacMtMpoMVBa54VuQsA8kLZ%2BPnI%2FV6%2Ft85XexHoW3ANsWm81UMv%2B3dRTWkYQRPApD6Mu15c6mn22xSchRLWL%2BXiJg2ARlaWIrErtwtcQ23m4eyEvLOcmvywZD79jIf7F5pS1r4X2Z3sejFcRZbUfgiibX3W4NrmTwkztV7fyRPPyaVHr4b67ARbxsWINe47ySS8hAS828dSM2eKVuOOcd6MVmY38Wu0mILqNaMcKus)

| |
---
Peter,

When federal power is used the wrong way, it affects real people: workers, families, and neighbors. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125907902/603292445/2092679929?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20260222_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamSeth_NA_NA_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTY2NzhmNy0wZTEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gcDFNwQ0tnfoAkrwNo-6c1TFrFHPG0tXSPVwwtrhN3k=) That’s why Seth has been clear about standing when ICE crosses the line. They promised to go after the “worst of the worst”, instead they are locking up innocent, hardworking people with no records, and children.

The easy thing in Washington is to stay quiet. The harder thing is to speak up when it matters. **Seth is choosing the harder path.**

But here’s the reality: taking strong positions in an election year means we need strong grassroots support behind us.

body:
When the government starts grading your opinions, "free speech" suddenly feels like a pop quiz you can fail.

| |

# [The Ministry of Truth by Vincent Cavaleri](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=188409937&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg4NDA5OTM3LCJpYXQiOjE3NzE3Nzk2MzUsImV4cCI6MTc3NDM3MTYzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.B1TPyp4y-KW7Zl9XRz_BTwo3SqGFT1vROGCaNiePpxs)
### When the government starts grading your opinions, "free speech" suddenly feels like a pop quiz you can fail.
| | [Heartland Journal ®](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---
| Feb 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=188409937&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg4NDA5OTM3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3MTc3OTYzNSwiZXhwIjoxNzc0MzcxNjM1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNjcyOTU4OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5nJS2jxEKmqBGuV-8lCoIXmGSNpceCiobE4ovHTwyRE&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3e10bf54-bd8e-46b5-96cb-a524d1bf90ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The first amendment was clearly crafted to protect the people from their own government and to preclude the authorities from dictating how people should think, what they could say, or what they could believe. Clear, concise and deliberately direct.
"Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion, or prohibiting the free exercise thereof; or abridging the freedom of speech, or of the press; or of the right of the people peaceably to assemble, and to petition the government for a redress of grievances."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.BmwmQwghxkM6sYmhRJ1XoLXoAF31nr55_R8k3v9zndw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=188409937)
George Orwell's book 1984 was required reading when I attended middle-school roughly 40+ years ago. Orwell's novel eerily peers into the future and centers on the significance of mass surveillance and repressive government overreach in futuristic 1984. The parallels to today's America are uncanny.
Orwell goes to great lengths to describe what life would be like in the future under autocratic rule. Orwell grew up in poverty, despised Communism, and understood the perils of repressive governments. He depicted in his novels that Marxism/Communism could occur anywhere, anytime, in any place. His books serve as a reminder that democracy is certainly not bulletproof, and always a generation away from extinction.
Recently, the Biden Administration empaneled a group of progressive elitists and called them the "Disinformation Board," much like the Ministry of Truth in Orwell's novel. The goal, although unstated, is to suppress or quell free speech and debate. The intent is to annihilate and eviscerate anything resembling the free flow of information, in the name of national security. Controlling the narrative and free flow of information is how the Oligarchical class stays in power; it's quite simple, really.
The mere fact that we are having this conversation in America shows exactly how far this administration and the radical elements within it will go to retain power. The thought of Dept. of Homeland Security Alexander Mayorkas being placed in charge of the panel should strike fear in the hearts of everyone. The same Mayorkas that refuses to enforce federal laws at America's southern border. The same Mayorkas that grew up in Cuba and has professed the socialist mantra repeatedly. A true wolf in sheep's clothing.
The term "big brother is watching you" is a passage from the book and really strikes at the heart of the Disinformation Board's mission. Try to imagine the Department of Homeland Security having unfettered access to private information. The Patriot Act already signed into law by George W. Bush in 2001 was the proverbial catalyst for a dystopian push. America's FISA court has already proven to be corruptible or overly accessible to government requests. This explains how an American presidential candidate was able to be surveilled during the 2016 election.
Marxists have been plotting to overthrow America and the rest of the democratic world since the early 1900s. Now, the progressives and big tech have seized the moment and colluded to create the newly formed Disinformation Board. They will undoubtably be the arbiters of speech. Orwell wrote, "Who controls the past controls the future, who controls the present controls the past."
China's lab leak, Hunter's laptop, or the efficacy of masking, take your pick, these truthful matters were suppressed and buried by a corrupted consortium with impunity. These are the same individuals championing the Disinformation Board.
Finally, to my patriotic brothers and sisters, please be strong and remember what's at stake. We will decide the fate of our republic and ourselves, not some elitist despots. When the history books recite the blue-collar effort that stood in front of autocracy and protected the Bill of Rights in the 21st century, we will proudly look at one another and know that we did our part when the baton was passed to this generation.
_**God bless you and God bless America, Vincent**_
_Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer._

name: Richard Hudson, NRCC Chairman
subject: You only have 24 hours to help us protect the House.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter,
I'll get straight to the point.
House Republicans are facing the most aggressive Democrat assault we've seen in years -- and it's focused on 29 critical battleground districts that will decide control of Congress.
That's why I personally approved a 29X IMPACT INITIATIVE, effective immediately.Here's what that means for you:
Your donation today doesn't just help one race -- it helps 29 must-win House seats at once.
$5 becomes 29X more powerful,
$10 becomes 29X more powerful,
$25 becomes 29X more powerful, or
ANY AMOUNT becomes 29X more powerful!
This isn't a gimmick. It's a targeted, battlefield strategy designed to stop Democrats from flipping the House by a single seat.

But here's the catch:
