House Republicans are facing the most aggressive Democrat assault we've seen in years -- and it's focused on 29 critical battleground districts that will decide control of Congress. That's why I personally approved a 29X IMPACT INITIATIVE, effective immediately.Here's what that means for you: Your donation today doesn't just help one race -- it helps 29 must-win House seats at once. $5 becomes 29X more powerful, $10 becomes 29X more powerful, $25 becomes 29X more powerful, or ANY AMOUNT becomes 29X more powerful! This isn't a gimmick. It's a targeted, battlefield strategy designed to stop Democrats from flipping the House by a single seat. And make no mistake - if they win even ONE of these districts, everything we're fighting for is at risk. But here's the catch: Once it closes, this opportunity is gone. In their own words, they're warning supporters about a "hyper-partisan voter registration machine."

They even asked: _" Ever heard of Turning Point?" _

Yes. They have.

Because Charlie cracked the code -- and it works.

**Knock more doors. Chase more ballots. Win more races. **

That's the math.

And the Left knows it's beating them.

Because while they talk, we train. While they protest, we're building.

Every day, we're training new Chase the Vote patriots -- men and women who know that a yard sign won't win an election...

_**... but a ballot chaser will. **_

We're already working around the clock in Arizona.

**We 've expanded aggressively into Nevada and New Hampshire, and opened a permanent office in Las Vegas -- a command center to lock in victories in '26 and beyond. **

This is what winning early looks like.

The Left sees it. And now they're rushing to respond.

That's why they're scrambling. Raising money. Trying to spin up their own copycat machine.

Because they know they're behind, so they're sounding the alarm NOW -- not in October.

Doors. Ballots. Early. Often.

_It 's that simple. _

Saving America starts NOW -- not later.

We have the upper hand, for now. But we can't let the radical Left claw their way back to power.

**So here 's my ask, Fellow Patriot: every $50 you give today helps train and deploy ONE ballot chaser into a battleground state. **

name: Powered by People
subject: Texas can’t wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240704%2E444211%2EJZmBGX)
In Texas, every choice we make this year matters. If we’re going to win, we have to register voters, turn them out, and fight for every single seat in every single community.
March 3rd is the first test. That’s when Texans head to the polls to choose many of our Democratic nominees—the candidates who will take on Republican incumbents and fight for the State House, State Senate, and Congressional seats across the state.
And it doesn’t stop there.
Local elections in April and May are often decided by just a handful of votes. Republicans count on low turnout. We don’t. Powered by People shows up early and stays late—registering voters, helping Texans understand what’s on the ballot, and making sure they know exactly how and when to cast their vote.
By building these relationships year-round, we make strong turnout possible, especially on November 3rd, when it all comes together. It’s how we build the margin of victory up and down the ballot.
[**None of this happens without you. Texas can’t wait, and neither can we. Will you chip in $3 today to help us reach voters, turn them out, and win every single seat we can?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260222.l5fgfM&refcode=ema20260222-240704&t=3&akid=240704%2E444211%2EJZmBGX)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260222.l5fgfM&refcode=ema20260222-240704&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=240704%2E444211%2EJZmBGX)**
Thank you,
Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Hidden footage and confidential intel reveal a mission so controversial, it’s shaking the very foundation of MAGA America. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | This is not just another feud. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Donald Trump is working overtime rig the next election and Virginians have a chance to stop him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
Trump’s allies are redrawing maps. Virginia voters can stop it.
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260222-221&t=1&akid=221%2E12592%2EYoGkLI)
Hi, it’s Governor Gavin Newsom.
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to Virginians for Fair Elections. Please allow me a moment to explain why this request – especially today – is so important.
Here is the truth:
In state after state, Donald Trump and the Republican Party are trying to rig the next election by redrawing Congressional maps to avoid accountability from voters in the next election.
In California, we fought back, I heard the calls for Democrats to "Do Something!" I agreed. No more holding hands. No more talk. It was time for action. Concrete action.
And we won.
In Virginia, they are taking action as well.
Just like we did in California, Virginians will vote on their maps as well. And it’s happening fast. On April 21st, voters will decide for themselves whether to adopt new, temporary congressional maps that level the playing field.
As you read this, Virginians for Fair Elections is organizing across the Commonwealth to pass this amendment and protect fair representation ahead of the 2026 election.
They’re educating voters. They’re countering misinformation. They’re taking on Trump-backed operatives trying to confuse and derail this vote.
And heaven help us if we lose. Nothing less than control of the House is on the line. Which is why I am reaching out to ask:
**[Please chip in $3 or whatever you can to help Virginians for Fair Elections level the playing field and protect democracy before April 21.](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260222_1.gt9JCb&amount=3&refcode=20260222-221&t=2&akid=221%2E12592%2EYoGkLI)**
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260222_1.gt9JCb&amount=3&refcode=20260222-221&t=21&akid=221%2E12592%2EYoGkLI)**
When we started our campaign in California, a lot of folks thought we had no chance. Many said we'd lose if we tried. But we built a grassroots campaign and we won.
This isn’t about lines on a map. It’s about drawing a line in the sand to stand up for our democracy. But the outcome of this election – and the future of our democracy – is not something we can just sit back and witness. We have to act to shape the outcome. So please:
**[Chip in to support the Fair Elections Amendment today.](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260222_1.gt9JCb&amount=3&refcode=20260222-221&t=22&akid=221%2E12592%2EYoGkLI)**
Thank you,
Gavin Newsom
[](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260222_1.gt9JCb&amount=3&refcode=20260222-221&t=23&akid=221%2E12592%2EYoGkLI)

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=24&refcode2=221_12592_YoGkLI&akid=221%2E12592%2EYoGkLI)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

clean_body: Trump’s allies are redrawing maps. Virginia voters can stop it. Hi, it’s Governor Gavin Newsom. In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to Virginians for Fair Elections. Please allow me a moment to explain why this request – especially today – is so important. Here is the truth: In state after state, Donald Trump and the Republican Party are trying to rig the next election by redrawing Congressional maps to avoid accountability from voters in the next election. In California, we fought back, I heard the calls for Democrats to "Do Something!" I agreed. No more holding hands. No more talk. It was time for action. Concrete action. And we won. In Virginia, they are taking action as well. Just like we did in California, Virginians will vote on their maps as well. And it’s happening fast. On April 21st, voters will decide for themselves whether to adopt new, temporary congressional maps that level the playing field. As you read this, Virginians for Fair Elections is organizing across the Commonwealth to pass this amendment and protect fair representation ahead of the 2026 election. They’re educating voters. They’re countering misinformation. They’re taking on Trump-backed operatives trying to confuse and derail this vote. And heaven help us if we lose. Nothing less than control of the House is on the line. Which is why I am reaching out to ask: When we started our campaign in California, a lot of folks thought we had no chance. Many said we'd lose if we tried. But we built a grassroots campaign and we won. This isn’t about lines on a map. It’s about drawing a line in the sand to stand up for our democracy. But the outcome of this election – and the future of our democracy – is not something we can just sit back and witness. We have to act to shape the outcome. So please: Thank you, Gavin Newsom

Theresa Flores leads ground operations to protect children before the crowds arrive.

In less than a few weeks... The world's strongest athletes will gather in Columbus, Ohio for one of the largest sports festivals on earth. **22,000 competitors and 80 countries. **
**Over 80 sports. **Four days of power, discipline, and grit. Strength will be everywhere.
But here is what most people never see... **When massive crowds gather, traffickers prepare too.** They hide in packed hotels.
They move in busy hallways.
They look for chaos -- where no one will notice them. That's why Theresa Flores will be there.
**Not as a spectator but on the front lines.** Theresa Flores stands as one of America's most courageous voices in the fight against sex trafficking.
---
[ Stand with a Freedom Fighter](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d800d6ecc82040c3aefcbb2ff4ad1307&_e=MiSYsZ7DiZb7g3in_BWHbh9mGk1-6Pbwu5dj3Vuq-bqO-TjEM397jEYUAB0G6WeZXn-gB8P4hPZjUFqZ63kJ9FoGSjvea8rM9Es8eYnIZYdn0xAALKdxZgoFqUJu8WQjq8AiWLpygy_AV2IMT2sPKiTxnGb50oBGtBIMupniAQyhbpPDioiN1XxU6NGdO8V9mjFGgB43ppbe7UuNPPicF3M4Sa4Dfop_xRP2QipOmlweBZKtp_79mWaMVk1CDVJWoLv6gYNe5LcwFd3H8Oue17Br-fDgrybWerxwu2auSuq8kdkr7HZwcT9aYdV2Yho-Smmons9o80yKOb-ElL0x9PxMCthTkvfa2YXsf-mn7ahmdU9vSxqYmYu5hk1MVWAL7rI6a44gtKfGaxGanLHLEpQeQ0JAIg4ZbUM7ASeNQAnbGuk0YXOTU6imSfV2u4qAjW16uBICwrZQunBZoktAC9B3DyWzeKK_ymX38t6oX35wjMKbKT76vQwscFfFaFVH7rA-_B3O0X9y80mCsuou1mYF_C_3h8Q5adwH2t1tnByfJs3l8_ER72m4Eu-Il0LHaNRyE4n_W8cuzE0iizTGbb0Fd1ohGFP3bah5R9nB6HPRe3yxhlzUw7z2Em17vANWCNJtFAOle258N6M-BSbZhGYZaqz35hrBb_3YDll5dj5x4sd84rIIhY-ZNpWB502GcHikNhYBhr8pvKP-p9fGPOeLDh7MEwj6pZwjckTonuZI8ltDDSNQaXKUgzJIRCF3n_NyXWV6e4IXydmKHFbJNHfJbs5AErE_dGkySXGezbH_04s1mQGcbBLKuTzCWprfqbRZIYi1e3mhoUQEse02sg%3D%3D)

Before the first bench press, the first strongman lift and the first trophy is raised... **Her team will train volunteers. **They will equip hotel staff with tools to recognize red flags, and distribute thousands of soap packets into hotel rooms -- each printed with the national trafficking hotline number. They will share life-saving resources and coordinate with law enforcement. **They prepare like athletes.**
**With discipline,****repetition and****focus.** **This fight for FREEDOM requires strength. **
---

The **Sound of Freedom Foundation** was created after the success of the film _Sound of Freedom_ -- to turn awareness into action. Our mission is simple and urgent: **To stop the sale of God 's children.** We work through prevention, intervention, education, information, and influence -- partnering with trusted leaders like Theresa to protect children before exploitation happens. We work to restore the children who have been rescued. **Just like training builds strength rep by rep, these pillars build protection layer by layer. ** **And ground operations like this are where preparation meets protection. **Jesus said, _" Let the little children come to me... for the kingdom of heaven belongs to such as these." _(Matthew 19:14) **Every child has God-given dignity.** **Not for sale.**
**Not in Ohio.**
**Not anywhere.** The festival is almost here. Hotels are being mapped now, and materials are being printed, and volunteers are being trained. **Before the crowds arrive ... we must be ready.** **[Will you help Theresa Flores fight for freedom with a gift of $25, $60, $100, or any amount you can give today?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d800d6ecc82040c3aefcbb2ff4ad1307&_e=MiSYsZ7DiZb7g3in_BWHbh9mGk1-6Pbwu5dj3Vuq-bqO-TjEM397jEYUAB0G6WeZXn-gB8P4hPZjUFqZ63kJ9FoGSjvea8rM9Es8eYnIZYdn0xAALKdxZgoFqUJu8WQjq8AiWLpygy_AV2IMT2sPKiTxnGb50oBGtBIMupniAQyhbpPDioiN1XxU6NGdO8V9mjFGgB43ppbe7UuNPPicF3M4Sa4Dfop_xRP2QipOmlweBZKtp_79mWaMVk1CDVJWoLv6gYNe5LcwFd3H8Oue17Br-fDgrybWerxwu2auSuq8kdkr7HZwcT9aYdV2Yho-3qamZNpLt_4MWSyMr3E6jLQ56zFNpOpwKb3M6wGkr5FXvy4y18uuYQpDhv3vhSQ2Zd4Mjtr0a15IV10_aOFK2jR0NCAPJsMwRzT2f6SUif1z4dcgNxnO-bRslxCE_zAivfBHQoRtVubJBd2FdNhFN-Gt2cvZm9Nh4WYqwZHc773rPr-0N86brTCq4Y6WbLOy_RKxxHGT0y-3n3eZGBwni98MPu70GInwJzT9zGJCs9wKZxlzC260IHkvHoezsUSsvr9eQZCtg9D1jIuCjpIO-eIifT0ecmtf3woxsW2OzkPl6_bfVxLi-4y2Bd8CRYC_pPnu6ybgqnq2JQfudHhFpO3-eVIYBM4OUOq_ivy_tEoV5vWkbwpFOvrr1ZiiG1FTnE2tDgm3tk0tJueFSfL30VnySK6f8_Pxe7bp1DOWFvtrGRb_ORNLk8_659vOTZ9JdfzOYmzw2L9tMnIKUrDPjKxrJMXScjUb-BA4suKz5RA9Uz44hwRNkQ_Cc-CLL2A5t-sjJZs-1c8R4OFVvSmUFw%3D%3D)** You may never step onto the competition stage.

clean_body: Step Into the Arena for Children Theresa Flores leads ground operations to protect children before the crowds arrive. | | | | | | GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE | | | Peter, In less than a few weeks... The world's strongest athletes will gather in Columbus, Ohio for one of the largest sports festivals on earth. 22,000 competitors and 80 countries. Over 80 sports. Four days of power, discipline, and grit. Strength will be everywhere. But here is what most people never see... When massive crowds gather, traffickers prepare too. They hide in packed hotels. They move in busy hallways. They look for chaos -- where no one will notice them. That's why Theresa Flores will be there. Not as a spectator but on the front lines. Theresa Flores stands as one of America's most courageous voices in the fight against sex trafficking. Before the first bench press, the first strongman lift and the first trophy is raised... Her team will train volunteers. They will equip hotel staff with tools to recognize red flags, and distribute thousands of soap packets into hotel rooms -- each printed with the national trafficking hotline number. They will share life-saving resources and coordinate with law enforcement. They prepare like athletes. With discipline,repetition andfocus. This fight for FREEDOM requires strength. Here's how you can help build that strength: $60 helps equip one trained volunteer $120 strengthens outreach and training materials $180 expands protection across multiple hotel locations $240 multiplies our presence when traffickers are most active The Sound of Freedom Foundation was created after the success of the film Sound of Freedom -- to turn awareness into action. Our mission is simple and urgent: To stop the sale of God 's children. We work through prevention, intervention, education, information, and influence -- partnering with trusted leaders like Theresa to protect children before exploitation happens. We work to restore the children who have been rescued. Just like training builds strength rep by rep, these pillars build protection layer by layer. And ground operations like this are where preparation meets protection. Jesus said, " Let the little children come to me... for the kingdom of heaven belongs to such as these." (Matthew 19:14) Every child has God-given dignity. Not for sale. Not in Ohio. Not anywhere. The festival is almost here. Hotels are being mapped now, and materials are being printed, and volunteers are being trained. Before the crowds arrive ... we must be ready. You may never step onto the competition stage. But you can step into this arena. You can help out lift evil. Let's build a wall of protection around these children. True strength is not measured in muscle. It is measured in courage. And God 's children are not for sale. With gratitude and prayer, Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

body:
District Round-up 02.22.26 Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you...
---
|
---
| | | [Beth Farnham for Congress](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com) | [Read on blog](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2026%2F02%2F22%2Fthank-you-for-the-standing-ovation-women-standing-strong-of-huntingdon%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=f09c39c1406d0693bade17452e0e186b&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z) or [Reader](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wordpress.com%2Freader%2Fblogs%2F213069660%2Fposts%2F6377&sr=0&signature=9d296e197e61a6f3fe30bf3115357ece&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)

# [Thank You for the Standing Ovation, Women Standing Strong of Huntingdon!](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/2026/02/22/thank-you-for-the-standing-ovation-women-standing-strong-of-huntingdon/?jetpack_skip_subscription_popup)
---
By **Elizabeth Farnham** on February 22, 2026
---
| **District Round-up 02.22.26**
---
Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=01b37242ce8443ade01564160f5f4d15371aa83b07ead4437a79e25c78924352&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6377&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=69d3024a15e71f17d37860d8146625a3&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=89c148ae7c5dcd41a1658c90debe3593)
---
| | |
---
Photo credit: Judith Young
---
On Sunday, I was proud to stand among my fellow patriots, singing hymns and holding lit candles in solidarity for our precious Democracy at the Vigil for Democracy at the Lutheran chapel in Gettysburg.
---
Attendees listened to excellent speeches and stopped at stations of “Ethical Governance,” “Separation of Powers,” “Separation of Church and State,” and other important elements of our Democracy that have been eroded by the current administration and complicit Congress.
---
May our neighbors and families [#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=ef0b2e7a6392028c9d5f84062738cde19cea8c358281de479892517ba1c76b65&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6377&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=377874bb9c46761afaebbd7b6d4e7214&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=89c148ae7c5dcd41a1658c90debe3593) instead of excusing fascism.
---
| | | | |
**Janis Jones kindly introduced me to the crowd.**
---|---|---
Many, many thanks to Women Standing Strong for hosting the meet and greet in Huntingdon on Tuesday. They welcomed me very warmly and gave me a standing ovation when I finished. It was a terrific event, well attended, full of good food and great vibes, and signed petitions. I also thank Team Beth Farnham for Congress member, Janis Jones, and her neighbor, Pam Gannon, for hosting meet and greets in their homes so I could connect with even more voters.
---
Photo credits: Jack Stansbury
---
| | |
---
Photo credit: Nina Licastro
---
Thank you to the Cambria County Democratic Committee event in Ebensburg, also on Tuesday. It was a strong start to the petition season.
---
Because candidates in Pennsylvania need signatures of support to appear on the ballots for the primary election, it is important to connect with the different county Democratic committees in order to learn about petition signing events or how to circulate a petition. I need 1000 signatures, for example, as do Governor Josh Shapiro and Lt. Governor Austin Davis in order to appear on the Democratic ballot of the May 19th Primary Election.
---
Please follow the link below in order to reach out to the committee of the county in which you reside:
---
[https://www.padems.org/county-parties/](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e60f379a8d0b40bd89489d8d4c4ed0ff5023d7e1ddb09265c6c9907c42e502c2&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6377&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=0c17d22b88a860268003465ab9d0a4fb&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=89c148ae7c5dcd41a1658c90debe3593)
---
| | |
---
Photo credit: Jack Stansbury
---
Thank you to Blue Storm Action in Gettysburg for opening up their meeting to candidates and petitions. It was a packed house at Unitarian Universalist Church of Gettysburg on Friday night. Voters signed petitions for candidates and learned about our platforms. To learn more about mine, please visit my priorities page here: [https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/priorities/](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=1549d711ebe167c9232337287bb587a0334a2a327d68c31d6b1c3ebb37548cb2&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6377&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=c1e516fa670f2204b391bc767d31e1d8&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9iZXRoZmFybmhhbWZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS9wcmlvcml0aWVzLw=&email_id=89c148ae7c5dcd41a1658c90debe3593)
---
| | |
---
Photo credit: Liz Reilly
---
Thank you to Cumberland County Democratic Committee for hosting a fantastic petition signing event yesterday! It was a packed house with great spirit and important information. I will be sorry to see Matt Roan retire as Chair and Liz Reilly retire as Vice Chair, but I know your committee will also find great replacements to tackle the challenges of this year because...
---
Together, we #ChooseDemocracy!
---
| **Legislative Comparison**
---
Check out how Joyce recently voted, how I would have voted in comparison and why!
---
| **Legislation**| **Joyce’s vote**| **US House Result**| **How Beth would have voted**| **Rationale for Beth’s vote**
---|---|---|---|---
[HR 2189 – Law-Enforcement Innovate to De-Escalate Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=6b6f5e62c3419eda9527b4f1034ebcac9b8f7c1986951c1b15324549bc13ab2c&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6377&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=a14271ec4022bf00e3c10be31565d43d&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC8yMTg5L3RleHQ&email_id=89c148ae7c5dcd41a1658c90debe3593)| Yes| Passed| No| While less-than-lethal weapons are ostensibly less lethal than many firearms, they can still be lethal, especially when converted through kits designed for that pu
rpose. Repealing the power of the Gun Control Act to now allow convicted criminals, including domestic abusers, to create these “ghost guns” increases danger to American communities, especially by those who have not changed their ways.
[H J Res 72 – Relating to a national emergency by the President on February 1, 2025](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=bf84e17536d514fc3e29b14d76748ba59dd8d0587d915cd093ea74efa2cf5bd7&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6377&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=f029640f8f1b6598cc89de06bd3111c6&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2Utam9pbnQtcmVzb2x1dGlvbi83Mi90ZXh0&email_id=89c148ae7c5dcd41a1658c90debe3593)| No| Passed| Yes| Agree with Rep. Bacon that Trump’s unjustified tariffs on China, Mexico, and Canada “have been a ‘net negative’ for the economy and are a significant tax that American consumers, manufacturers, and farmers are paying.” and that “Article I of the Constitution places authority over taxes and tariffs with Congress for a reason, but for too long, we have handed that authority to the executive branch. It’s time for Congress to reclaim that responsibility.”
[S 1383 – Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=69c4e090408997739ebef7ec0bd045cb21f427029db0c56386686b589706c290&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6377&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=ab425093172c2b27c871bb8325ba48d1&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3Mvc2VuYXRlLWJpbGwvMTM4My90ZXh0&email_id=89c148ae7c5dcd41a1658c90debe3593)| Yes| Passed | No| Suppresses the votes of married women especially whose names do not match those on their birth certificates by requiring passports as proof of citizenship instead, in the event of registration for change of address, name change, change of political party, or unjust removal from voter rolls. Cost and burden of passport is virtually poll tax with disparate impact against women.
[HR 1531 – Pressure Regulatory Organizations To End Chinese Threats to (PROTECT) Taiwan Act ](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=5375a14d6cdddc6f8db1188f87f8ef242e273a582e861abe46e2290a54fb2925&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6377&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=dafa2a52c35a211a10a9bb4b1e452a10&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC8xNTMxL3RleHQ&email_id=89c148ae7c5dcd41a1658c90debe3593)| Yes| Passed| Yes| Requires Department of the Treasury, the Federal Reserve, and the Securities and Exchange Commission to exclude China from the Group of Twenty;
the Bank for International Settlements;
the Financial Stability Board;
the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision;
the International Association of Insurance Supervisors; and
the International Organization of Securities Commissions, if China poses threat to Tawain or US interests.
[HR 6644 – To increase the supply of housing in America, and for other purposes](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=dbc89b0049a1083abb94a9ee192b08f4bc777e8364a7c4e7060c0709d2859b21&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6377&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=a57009bdf88698f0a191bf01fca192df&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC82NjQ0L3RleHQ&email_id=89c148ae7c5dcd41a1658c90debe3593)| Yes| Passed| Yes| Expanding available finance programs for affordable housing. Restricts veterans’ disability benefits from being considered as source of income.
[H J Res 142 – Disapproving the action of the District of Columbia Council in approving the D.C. Income and Franchise Tax Conformity and Revision Temporary Amendment Act of 2025](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=aa660d94643813257a502b344feff3472be2865d695c19ea261f02defc0be16a&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6377&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=6976b900edae4180617dff671a7d30e3&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2Utam9pbnQtcmVzb2x1dGlvbi8xNDIvdGV4dA=&email_id=89c148ae7c5dcd41a1658c90debe3593)| Yes| Passed| No| OBBBA decreased DC’s “overall stability and revenue streams of economic base” and the decoupling was allowable through Home Rule.
[HR 4090 – Critical Mineral Dominance Act ](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=ad19ac837f969ea85f6fd3fea31522537bf54f3ce808f1b495460dab85b63d28&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6377&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=461ad218b638e2e93a9b9b325ef0ff0a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC80MDkwL3RleHQ&email_id=89c148ae7c5dcd41a1658c90debe3593)| Yes| Passed| No| Sweetheart deals to foreign mining corporations is contrary to American interests and security. Nor should we violate our protected public and tribal lands to do it.
[HR 7148 – Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2026](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=c0d51fe135c5aa9ed66c1a317c994a29b8b36a6cae2811e37a63147c91ceafd6&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6377&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=c5fdd10b9a2a1b22653d763bd7b9e34b&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC83MTQ4L3RleHQ&email_id=89c148ae7c5dcd41a1658c90debe3593)| Yes| Passed| No| Because there has been no correction of masked agents of I.C.E. using lethal force for imaginary reasons, I.C.E. must be abolished. It is unconscionable that the United States keep supplying funding to masked agents of the state who murder Americans on our public streets with no accountability. This is contrary to ideals born of the American Revolution.
[HR 3123 – Ernest Peltz Accrued Veterans Benefits Act](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=6d9b85bf42691502bd04b3c008eeb53ca92e7683bd89cf9408758fdb753b3f26&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6377&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=403f98b64e65a711507bfbcb3b4f42c5&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC8zMTIzL3RleHQ&email_id=89c148ae7c5dcd41a1658c90debe3593)| Yes| Passed| Yes| Living dependents of the veteran who died deserve the pension payment that was destined to him/her, yet unpaid.
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
---
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
---
Sincerely,
---
Beth
---

clean_body: District Round-up 02.22.26 Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you... | | | | | or ---|---|--- By Elizabeth Farnham on February 22, 2026 | District Round-up 02.22.26 Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: | | | Photo credit: Judith Young On Sunday, I was proud to stand among my fellow patriots, singing hymns and holding lit candles in solidarity for our precious Democracy at the Vigil for Democracy at the Lutheran chapel in Gettysburg. Attendees listened to excellent speeches and stopped at stations of “Ethical Governance,” “Separation of Powers,” “Separation of Church and State,” and other important elements of our Democracy that have been eroded by the current administration and complicit Congress. May our neighbors and families instead of excusing fascism. | | | | | Janis Jones kindly introduced me to the crowd. ---|---|--- Many, many thanks to Women Standing Strong for hosting the meet and greet in Huntingdon on Tuesday. They welcomed me very warmly and gave me a standing ovation when I finished. It was a terrific event, well attended, full of good food and great vibes, and signed petitions. I also thank Team Beth Farnham for Congress member, Janis Jones, and her neighbor, Pam Gannon, for hosting meet and greets in their homes so I could connect with even more voters. Photo credits: Jack Stansbury | | | Photo credit: Nina Licastro Thank you to the Cambria County Democratic Committee event in Ebensburg, also on Tuesday. It was a strong start to the petition season. Because candidates in Pennsylvania need signatures of support to appear on the ballots for the primary election, it is important to connect with the different county Democratic committees in order to learn about petition signing events or how to circulate a petition. I need 1000 signatures, for example, as do Governor Josh Shapiro and Lt. Governor Austin Davis in order to appear on the Democratic ballot of the May 19th Primary Election. Please follow the link below in order to reach out to the committee of the county in which you reside: | | | Photo credit: Jack Stansbury Thank you to Blue Storm Action in Gettysburg for opening up their meeting to candidates and petitions. It was a packed house at Unitarian Universalist Church of Gettysburg on Friday night. Voters signed petitions for candidates and learned about our platforms. To learn more about mine, please visit my priorities page here: | | | Photo credit: Liz Reilly Thank you to Cumberland County Democratic Committee for hosting a fantastic petition signing event yesterday! It was a packed house with great spirit and important information. I will be sorry to see Matt Roan retire as Chair and Liz Reilly retire as Vice Chair, but I know your committee will also find great replacements to tackle the challenges of this year because... Together, we #ChooseDemocracy! | Legislative Comparison Check out how Joyce recently voted, how I would have voted in comparison and why! | Legislation| Joyce’s vote| US House Result| How Beth would have voted| Rationale for Beth’s vote ---|---|---|---|--- | Yes| Passed| No| While less-than-lethal weapons are ostensibly less lethal than many firearms, they can still be lethal, especially when converted through kits designed for that pu rpose. Repealing the power of the Gun Control Act to now allow convicted criminals, including domestic abusers, to create these “ghost guns” increases danger to American communities, especially by those who have not changed their ways. | No| Passed| Yes| Agree with Rep. Bacon that Trump’s unjustified tariffs on China, Mexico, and Canada “have been a ‘net negative’ for the economy and are a significant tax that American consumers, manufacturers, and farmers are paying.” and that “Article I of the Constitution places authority over taxes and tariffs with Congress for a reason, but for too long, we have handed that authority to the executive branch. It’s time for Congress to reclaim that responsibility.” | Yes| Passed | No| Suppresses the votes of married women especially whose names do not match those on their birth certificates by requiring passports as proof of citizenship instead, in the event of registration for change of address, name change, change of political party, or unjust removal from voter rolls. Cost and burden of passport is virtually poll tax with disparate impact against women. | Yes| Passed| Yes| Requires Department of the Treasury, the Federal Reserve, and the Securities and Exchange Commission to exclude China from the Group of Twenty; the Bank for International Settlements; the Financial Stability Board; the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision; the International Association of Insurance Supervisors; and the International Organization of Securities Commissions, if China poses threat to Tawain or US interests. | Yes| Passed| Yes| Expanding available finance programs for affordable housing. Restricts veterans’ disability benefits from being considered as source of income. | Yes| Passed| No| OBBBA decreased DC’s “overall stability and revenue streams of economic base” and the decoupling was allowable through Home Rule. | Yes| Passed| No| Sweetheart deals to foreign mining corporations is contrary to American interests and security. Nor should we violate our protected public and tribal lands to do it. | Yes| Passed| No| Because there has been no correction of masked agents of I.C.E. using lethal force for imaginary reasons, I.C.E. must be abolished. It is unconscionable that the United States keep supplying funding to masked agents of the state who murder Americans on our public streets with no accountability. This is contrary to ideals born of the American Revolution. | Yes| Passed| Yes| Living dependents of the veteran who died deserve the pension payment that was destined to him/her, yet unpaid. If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism. We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you. Sincerely, Beth | | | | Beth Farnham for Congress © 2026. or . | | | | Get the Jetpack app Subscribe, bookmark, and get real-time notifications – all from one app! | | | | ---|--- | | | | Automattic, Inc. 60 29th St. #343, San Francisco, CA 94110

Election season is in full swing, . Primaries start kicking off in March, and Republicans are dealing Democrats a **HUGE **blow to their 2026 electoral strategy... Passage of the **SAVE America Act** , making voter ID _mandatory_ nationwide, will mean Democrats can no longer count on non-citizens, dead people, and even voters who don't exist to turn out to the polls for them. _But this won't stop them from finding new ways to cheat - not by a long shot._ That's why **Turning Point PAC** is ramping up our operations on the ground in key districts and states across the nation, **[and why we need your increased support as primary election season gets underway.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/y4wVq3tSKnByvrYs_MwmNTy45Cy6Y1zlXoFf9TMNy2IpxZPd_OglI87W7Xbs3pjaMrF-tMy_Fb-FJ8DZkq_q3Jw2x3GjS1lEmddu61A0je8Pp_C7L63VrZpgZnPWV8ZQItGxnsqcBUC7sEG7VoWfuOEe300RjfqPoqNan7mP3wxXdhV-ATWeHJfLaXjeNiVpg-5_B4-DlT4UfOsft4Yvjl-96ZQNazdKvsvaodM5nXO-42xjTFBtqCAT3714K23CdfShwUMoFRQ-Ebp1-KQnSrsl00elinVFi1cqAY0F1Z18sxJ55VfDpv6dTb9SiXZ495L5biBv0nOC3WpSKTf_m34zcVEuzTIK0nFN3lDpAYBrDTqZyIlcr9BFbkUy1oGvxE_Ncya_2Y3Mh8978I-u0fEgUALwLW-SZOjuVjBZnBOhsGX_XnX3BhHenzjjYmkjzVGSGcTCnuzoWoM8fl6_bgbPOhqAFos8rbIsSyzdPFIfUP994glgmNdaurGOCvhzhM5MOxvNO4_64F3jwLJz5c_uQVfz41_v7B-gckWllCxesBc9XVD6AQQ3zNB7zVNnW2QiNx7dg-zKexqrxCpHYaSzIJ-LtjeQuNXl0iX_6djaGqGDrhLpJi41uvM5BROQ9LeIeZ9UQqf7aBvjm5e3Vyo57Q/A5Dn-tmixp7JG_EEBgOG0aJzUrjkck_U/18)**

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. body:
What else can I say?

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125911087/603303999/510768709?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTIzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzIzMzM5Yy0xNzEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f08K0ck1IEWw5S8YXpSdqkJGe7-7S8HyDJ3OLuXF5OU=) I’m reaching out today to ask you to please donate just $1 to help me beat Bill Huizenga and flip this critical toss-up seat blue. What do you say? | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125911088/603304000/819412648?amounts=1,10,15,25,50,100,250,500&amount=1&refcode=email_022226_humbly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTIzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzIzMzM5Yy0xNzEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f08K0ck1IEWw5S8YXpSdqkJGe7-7S8HyDJ3OLuXF5OU=)
---
You might be thinking: “Seriously? $1 isn’t very much money.” And you’re not wrong: $1 is less than a bag of Skittles. It would get you barely enough gas to drive from Kalamazoo to Portage. It wouldn’t come all that close to buying you a cup of coffee these days (thanks to Trump's tariffs).
**But your $1 very much moves the needle when it comes to flipping the House blue — because if everyone reading this email pitches in _just $1,_ that puts a real dent in our cash disadvantage with Bill Huizenga.**
In fact, it adds up to enough money to get our message out to a few hundred more voters than we would have been able to reach yesterday.
It helps us build on all the momentum and endorsements we’ve received these last few months.
And frankly, it helps us fuel up our car and travel around MI-4 to meet with hardworking voters that Bill Huizenga has made it clear he doesn’t have the time of day for.
**_[So, don’t think for a second that $1 isn’t enough to impact our fight to bring change to Washington. I promise you, we will put every dollar we receive today to good use in this fight — and in a race this close, every single donation counts. If you could pitch in just $1, I’d be incredibly grateful.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125911089/603304001/819412648?amounts=1,10,15,25,50,100,250,500&amount=1&refcode=email_022226_humbly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTIzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzIzMzM5Yy0xNzEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f08K0ck1IEWw5S8YXpSdqkJGe7-7S8HyDJ3OLuXF5OU=)_**

| | | | | |
# Join Kevin and Patriots on Tuesday, February 24 to Watch President Trump’s State of the Union Address!
---
| | Dear Friend and Patriot,
I hope this email finds you and your family well. I'm truly **grateful for the incredible support** we're seeing across Michigan as we build toward the **County Conventions this Thursday** and **Endorsement Convention on March 28** to take back the Michigan Attorney General’s Office.
I’m excited to **invite you to a wonderful event celebrating President Trump and America this Tuesday, February 24** — join me for delicious complementary food, fun, friends, and an evening cheering on President Trump as he delivers his 2026 State of the Union Address!

This is a **casual and complementary opportunity** to connect with fellow delegates and patriots, watch President Trump deliver his American First message, and hear about how we secure the MI AG nomination and win big in November.
[**Event Details:**](mailto:glenn@kevinformi.com?subject=I'm%20attending%20Kevin's%20event%20on%20March%202&body=I'm%20attending%20Kevin's%20event%20on%20March%202!%20I'm%20ready%20to%20make%20Michigan%20red%20again.)**Kevin’s MAGA State of the Union Watch Party****Tuesday, February 24****Doors open 8:00 PM****Watch Party starts 9:00 PM** Fireside Lounge at Vibe Credit Union Showplace(located in the Hyatt Hotel, formerly Suburban Showplace)46080 Grand River Avenue, Novi, MI 48374 Please kindly RSVP so we can plan accordingly by email: [glennn@kevinformi.com](mailto:glenn@kevinformi.com?subject=I'm%20attending%20Kevin's%20SOTU%20Party%20in%20Novi%20on%20March%2024&body=I%20support%20President%20Trump!%20I'm%20attending%20Kevin's%20event%20on%20February%2024!%20I'm%20ready%20to%20make%20Michigan%20red%20again.).
I look forward to seeing you there — **together we’ll deliver results for Michigan families** : restoring trust in elections, standing up for parental rights, backing law enforcement, and ending government overreach. . 🇺🇸
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=c30cc3b0ac&e=4b10910eed)
| | **Let’s Keep Winning for Michigan Families!**
Thank you for your continued support and commitment to making Michigan red again. I'm honored to earn your vote at this Thursday’s County Conventions and the Endorsement Convention in March — **together, we'll secure this nomination and win big in November.**
Very truly yours,Kevin Kijewski
Republican Candidate for Michigan Attorney General

name: Adem T. Bunkeddeko
subject: Here's How to Fund Housing Access Vouchers
body:
Find out the importance of funding rent vouchers

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | |

Friends,New Yorkers need rent relief now, but New York City is struggling to fund the Housing Access Voucher program amid mounting budget pressures.I have a solution to fund _and expand_ the program. And _**Politico** _has taken notice:_“Bunkeddeko is proposing an “Opportunity Trust Fund” that would invest unclaimed funds and use those earnings for public good. The fund, which would require legislative approval, could be used to help sustain and expand rent voucher programs.” - Politico_[**If you believe New York needs real solutions — not temporary fixes — please contribute today to help us make it happen.**](https://ademfornewyork.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=81a9f685946c3d17fe402b3fb&id=ed6434255b&e=5702859c35) Instead of scrambling year after year to plug budget holes, we can create a responsible, recurring source of revenue to expand rent vouchers - not just in NYC, but statewide.The **Opportunity Trust Fund** would invest the nearly $20 billion in unclaimed funds currently sitting idle in state custody. The principal would remain fully protected for rightful claimants — but the investment returns could generate a long-term funding stream for rent relief and other programs like child care, and a seed account for every child born in New York.Public funds should build public prosperity. I believe making New Yorkers have a stable roof over their head is both a moral imperative and a fiduciary responsibility. Adem

---

President Donald J. Trump has been invited by Congress to deliver his _FIRST_ State of the Union Address since his triumphant return to the White House.

But the President will not just be speaking to his Majorities in the House and Senate...

...He will foremost be speaking to **_YOU_** – the Silent Majority of Americans who voted to Make America Great Again!

That’s why we want to pay tribute to the patriots for whom this Address is dedicated.

With Friends Like Charlie's, Who Needs Enemies? takes a closer look at Charlie Kirk's inner circle and the dynamics surrounding his closest allies. As controversy builds within segments of the conservative movement, loyalty is being tested and silence is becoming harder to ignore. When pressure rises, alliances reveal themselves.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9rYXRoeWJhcm5ldHRlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.2n7M2gh4ZMybfYPvMlsGogYZySu_XKe3a-WLug3cemI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=188817881)

---|---|---
New Jeffrey Epstein documents include emails containing the line: "Delete These Emails." In this episode, I read directly -- word-for-word -- from those emails and examine the names referenced in those communications.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c75eac6f-8bcf-49a1-a533-c0e6727d25f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This episode examines the growing problem of influence without responsibility in conservative media, using Candace Owens as a case study. After a viral post sparked over 100,000 impressions and intense backlash, Kathy Barnette breaks down how conspiracy thinking, grievance culture, and moral permission slips are radicalizing parts of the Right.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9rYXRoeWJhcm5ldHRlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.2n7M2gh4ZMybfYPvMlsGogYZySu_XKe3a-WLug3cemI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=188817881)
When constitutional rights are misused as weapons, freedom erodes for everyone. Let's set the record straight.

name: Jeremy Moss
subject: We cannot have ICE agents act as masked vigilantes in our communities.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeremy Moss for Congress
body:
Even in this heightened political climate, our government must be transparent and accountable to the public. In the Legislature, we haven’t changed our procedures to take votes in secret when making laws. In the same way, officers should also be transparent and accountable when enforcing laws.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125912515/603308857/680287355?refcode=BLU_EM_MOSS_2026-02-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc5OTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU2ZjE5MjMtMTkxMC1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhNTc1OTNmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xCsYIujbkr2dGvpxX9wVwmNcWeXPv5tXUf0X6XmokFI=)
---
| Peter,

I recently introduced legislation to require ICE agents in Michigan to wear uniforms that identify themselves and ban them from wearing masks to conceal their identities.

We cannot have law enforcement act as masked vigilantes in our communities.

Even in this heightened political climate, our government must be transparent and accountable to the public. In the Legislature, we haven’t changed our procedures to take votes in secret when making laws. In the same way, officers should also be transparent and accountable when enforcing laws.

My bill is about restoring trust, protecting our communities, and ensuring power is never exercised in the shadows.

I’m running for Congress because we need leaders who aren’t afraid to show up in the face of adversity and challenge the status quo.

**If you agree that we must ban ICE agents from concealing their identities,[_chip in to my campaign to help me bring this fight to Washington._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125912516/603308858/680287355?refcode=BLU_EM_MOSS_2026-02-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc5OTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU2ZjE5MjMtMTkxMC1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhNTc1OTNmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xCsYIujbkr2dGvpxX9wVwmNcWeXPv5tXUf0X6XmokFI=)**

clean_body: Even in this heightened political climate, our government must be transparent and accountable to the public. In the Legislature, we haven’t changed our procedures to take votes in secret when making laws. In the same way, officers should also be transparent and accountable when enforcing laws. | = | Peter, I recently introduced legislation to require ICE agents in Michigan to wear uniforms that identify themselves and ban them from wearing masks to conceal their identities. We cannot have law enforcement act as masked vigilantes in our communities. Even in this heightened political climate, our government must be transparent and accountable to the public. In the Legislature, we haven’t changed our procedures to take votes in secret when making laws. In the same way, officers should also be transparent and accountable when enforcing laws. My bill is about restoring trust, protecting our communities, and ensuring power is never exercised in the shadows. I’m running for Congress because we need leaders who aren’t afraid to show up in the face of adversity and challenge the status quo. If you agree that we must ban ICE agents from concealing their identities,= | | | = | = | = | = | = – Jeremy * | | = Paid for by Jeremy Moss for Congress Jeremy Moss for Congress 2211 S Telegraph Rd PO Box 7023 Bloomfield Hills, MI 48302 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics...
body:
The quietest thing he ever did was the most powerful
Peter, Charlie’s final book is available with a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA.
| | | [ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fe7b762a32894c9a8d1a23686ed25987&_e=UvpqjxxjnE5mBREfGpX26-wpIeJnmIr6eUzjz7MuzXPKBL_mmfES1ilSvYO7hSFtPHE7-r_HQw1Axr8tTQ2Z4c2_BCbwCWWnZugH7xL47jvzZZ1KkB1AaMtNIYr-DWZgFEYd6jMY7DJCPiNZIR1C07gQJqNkf0yrBrMEmqXBs6ZZ-Q-CX8N2FQvb8dneTuDK0wRg-jPd5dPdnyfBI9qYxZ_shnNrzTPJY16gmiufb8DE7Ob5PNMuTCicKC6JtLEeNwdZvK3GnW4R2mGvHJLBmFrp4hTi6OXaxyWZfqTCAOUbjkt0cpTqA3MrtkRCrlf1CyKQGp15DbdXEfXlHc4-YX9lI8aVrJDnnMX2LmuG75uvE0cjI9Dv8aHtnHax_3ZOlSzRfuVG3L_ZH4ig9PQ7cuI70gKaWqs_-T-4d5IgZNpDeZEGIQHbQuNg9o5uNKYROVBYiMkciljcrwCD716EYwWH02ch802AOrEbnoyFIC5oOU_BemJ3lFaevVQ94eCfbyyRrGAK6HGYZ9ILGFi_B8bInBRVID33AjPl8OOb3Mq5dcfNykSZ44HmA1BdAbkN0tJhrKQqPygAOY2zOsSt1rqVGkQqudo1u3tlNDS5oX4u_pc-OM4fvySzlySxH6EDfw72jjRMzv0c5TrkhKQ-zMMIZxRKsCB-KAO1vRvwOWKDdm9J-RHZtSXAWjomYiKt)

| | Peter,
---
| | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---

This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust.

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

**[ And right now, when you make a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA, we’ll send you a copy — as our thank-you for carrying Charlie’s mission forward. ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fe7b762a32894c9a8d1a23686ed25987&_e=UvpqjxxjnE5mBREfGpX26-wpIeJnmIr6eUzjz7MuzXPKBL_mmfES1ilSvYO7hSFtPHE7-r_HQw1Axr8tTQ2Z4c2_BCbwCWWnZugH7xL47jvzZZ1KkB1AaMtNIYr-DWZgFEYd6jMY7DJCPiNZIR1C07gQJqNkf0yrBrMEmqXBs6ZZ-Q-CX8N2FQvb8dneTuDK0wRg-jPd5dPdnyfBI9qYxZ_shnNrzTPJY16gmiufb8Cr-wLP_LXYauT5Sf-kzAABEsOYvT-c-BlcBwGHKM8NZ-5qgpqOnsgM7jvLuMXPoTB38Xjo76zDqqT0XzTzlW0FFoXlvVX8_aafOL2dOWHjdmWmeWpvU2at6_qMomOxbnX9_hZ70qI_9SsV1-YqbEJ_odZYaAEs14DrFtL3KGQzZYMi6BAupJKXbuoDsKaBv9_L1M_9ovMGVnGepIaYk5Tse7LidEshWoT_amxnUQ-O_Ei9GPaWidnCk4MhVXWjYC0DTm-Jn6tqWInRYIi-1srX61dQd-YuKp7hCqRDvFy17zhNc8Ws64m1OgpXeTnBA2sJssy4r2FX9E6I32BDtYSXlKfp1-WzvihpPxS0ebLfxf3TQYhmiJzp2H44sGay2hFzOT6cemS56RbrgNfba1jfH1dEa9BWKBIlmbrM7Ly0KZHEnIOFZDTqOMSHjZvsx7gx2k-O5AgEJiAcltQpFKXV) **

Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer

clean_body: The quietest thing he ever did was the most powerful Peter, Charlie’s final book is available with a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA. | | | | | Peter, | | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

Help us expose the DeVos operation and keep Michigan blue |
#
---
We reminded you about her a while ago, team. You know, her: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125912587/603309242/-1561548048?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260222_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjlhOGFlNDQtMTkxMC1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhNTc1OTNmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Wvb7a_1EdfNxxCvkCeCnjdZ959QI-152v1ZW9mrxSyM=) **Betsy DeVos,** Trump’s former Secretary of Education, is a billionaire political donor and longtime enemy of public schools and working people. She’s spent decades trying to buy elections — and now she’s back, with a political machine more dangerous than ever. **She and her family are planning a full-blown hostile takeover of Michigan politics.** They’ve brought in former RNC Chair Ronna McDaniel to run the operation, leading a dark-money machine designed to flip the state red from top to bottom: the Senate seat, Governor’s office, Secretary of State, Attorney General, and both chambers of the state legislature. **That started with attacks on Governor Gretchen Whitmer.** False ads. Conspiracy theories. Misinformation flooding local airwaves. It’s all meant to discredit Governor Whitmer’s progress and pave the way for a DeVos-backed GOP resurgence. **Let’s fight back with the truth.** That means early, strategic organizing across the state, with the resources to break through their noise. **We're less than a week away from our February fundraising deadline, and the attacks aren’t stopping.[Please pitch in any amount today to help Fight Like Hell PAC expose the DeVos operation and meet our February goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125912588/603309244/-1561548048?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260222_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjlhOGFlNDQtMTkxMC1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhNTc1OTNmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Wvb7a_1EdfNxxCvkCeCnjdZ959QI-152v1ZW9mrxSyM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125912590/603309245/-1561548048?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260222_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjlhOGFlNDQtMTkxMC1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhNTc1OTNmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Wvb7a_1EdfNxxCvkCeCnjdZ959QI-152v1ZW9mrxSyM=)

name: Team Jack
subject: NANCY PELOSI ENDORSES JACK SCHLOSSBERG FOR CONGRESS!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=021626_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=021626_1]
Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi just endorsed Jack for Congress, and what she said about him matters (but before we go on - will you split a donation between Jack and Outrage then Action PAC right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=021626_1]
This isn't just a political endorsement. This is one of the most effective leaders in modern history telling us exactly why Jack is the candidate we need right now.
Speaker Emerita Pelosi knows what we're up against — Trump's chaos, RFK Jr. gutting healthcare, an administration running unchecked. And she's endorsing Jack because she believes he can fight back and win.
Here's what she said:
"Jack Schlossberg is giving people something to believe in again and something to vote for. His candidacy will help democrats win nationwide — and it will help us flip the House."
But Peter, she didn't stop there. She got specific about what makes Jack different:
"Jack understands that progress is not some abstract idea— it must be felt in daily life, in neighborhoods, and in hopes for the future. He has released specific policies to address local challenges facing his district—plans to lower costs at the grocery store and for families, his housing initiative, his public safety measures for houses of worship, and a way to tackle the flow of illegal guns at the federal level, and more. Jack has the mettle and the moxie to get his policies passed in Congress, and the ability to bring all sides to the table."
That's what we need right now. Not empty promises — real policies that will make a difference in people's lives. And someone with the strength to actually get them passed.
And here's the part that really matters in this moment:
"Jack possesses a unique ability to navigate the digital and the classical political worlds in ways that can get things done for people — and hold President Trump accoun table. Those skills are critical right now, and they are also quite rare."
That's why she's backing Jack. Because he can hold Trump accountable. Because he has concrete plans to help people. Because he represents a new generation ready to do the hard work.
But endorsements don't win races — people do.

body:
We know it’s Sunday, so we’ll keep this short

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125912851/603310084/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjc5Yzg3YjAtMTkxMC1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhNTc1OTNmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6OvI0S_oNMcOL2GfiF5LE1BKjQzjqkBhU64OVgcnDHk=) We know it’s Sunday, so we’ll keep this short. Here are three quick things you should know about our race:
1. [**Janelle was one of the ONLY Democrats to flip a Republican-held seat in 2024** ,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125912852/603310085/-2128870824?refcode=email_022226_3things&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjc5Yzg3YjAtMTkxMC1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhNTc1OTNmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6OvI0S_oNMcOL2GfiF5LE1BKjQzjqkBhU64OVgcnDHk=) and she won by an incredibly narrow margin.
2. National Republicans spent _millions_ to try to keep this seat red — [**and we are sure they’ll spend even more to try to flip it back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125912853/603310086/-2128870824?refcode=email_022226_3things&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjc5Yzg3YjAtMTkxMC1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhNTc1OTNmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6OvI0S_oNMcOL2GfiF5LE1BKjQzjqkBhU64OVgcnDHk=)
3.
