Peter, Elon Musk sparked a __**HUGE**__ conversation on Joe Rogan about immigration policy, government systems, and the real threats to voting...

He highlighted concerns that **open borders allow non-citizens to flood in and affect our democracy, including potentially influencing votes.**

Musk explained: **_“That’s why they want open borders... That’s why some leaders changed their views on borders. That’s the reason—to bring in more people who could affect our systems.”_**

That's why Congress passed the SAVE Act (Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act) in the House — a game-changing bill to require documentary proof of U.S. citizenship before anyone can register to vote.

_But the Senate is stalling_ — _**and we can't let that happen.**_

With millions at stake, we need massive pressure **NOW** to force a vote and _**get the SAVE Act to the President's desk.**_

Backed and authored by **House Freedom Caucus member Rep. Chip Roy** , the SAVE Act fights back against the very threats Elon Musk exposed on Rogan—requiring ironclad citizenship proof to protect your vote.

That's why we're calling for **10,000 Americans** to sign our [**EMERGENCY SAVE ACT SUPPORT**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/C-bdBHsqta7g5HSjf9E5YXUYU-2p_ThnSfbJ0fBdrXbGzNFUteYJwRN3XNJwugOqVt2oN7Z2j5cSFIZVnra0lZpri8WHKjnKA0S7G1PZJfEhN0KDcASSHIgkZsikjelEeBL5oigwfGFHpmCcdu3_sMegfmDQrYVLzbgkeRduab7jenXiKh2Uc8CHNzttFVy29gAvZPcDSM1lx3bvAmrrJTdczchB5K-DxTeCAUzRSoMqdcYiF3S_1f5bnqA6WO6DD8y77vwVCET7PqoAYcmNUeH_NXfMlJsQyoTxU5WbECy0JJe-AcwnsK_1Az81O8SPX4ybVmkP-rN4AVcTO-1pFE17P11a_HyBWjXYU8v145JC_DbzcLyeRfehhCzcq7NfX-blOwW312JWy9KBfIivcRdp25RAw7m3fCTsEl7_oZHBSBXKLhDkGiM4ybgDTvjlHK7KwA0KwqFQMqv4-KyDpMM-wyHG5CRfk7WZSRMQ2ZpNINCrRyFz_3UItrnO9loMC5Yo-TYh9cSferrH6im0DEfxUhhGfWA3UxXH0HG8JcUtLTEzPtBWnSAQO2WTi2QDzcCxuW41xEqlXp3wo3_41l40ufoKxNc_3QoYELdq-ovuM4Ub6rHdzdFtSZkXIHOu0QzgwY93ln66qd0m76bnwvUO7XqSdC63fCmA9bw3drq_njRMqK8agjNDXaS5G_44vh2usZW1bt5432jFpAfQzmRXiLzlEjm9gnWvJJoCI_xWXB74-R28FqTvcEpNxT7NO1WbUTctJ5fixe5Y5myMPcBL2mt40XnC7gy5wry2jikesN2ctHPhg6WnY0dI5Z3aVKAJvAePWmsQ1vAI0TUrN9C9oPxYARNAn82VOvMsQ2eFTbN2m-BKa4RT8dM4pDR625ML_uNWNolPp48GgUFZl_RaNZfcuH9oqnU4g5YfcEpqQBu_vrQILMXlGHDMOWMOLJD8fQgoH0Ms4HZ0alucVHUWrcPvVMO59rt0rqiwS48PgaFjNzdKXQWi09j9_cuEGkyxiqhWx1UE7wG4YkLfEd1eG1_RN7zBGf2oQvK_7YJSUT-YwbhyqNtYuR8q4viJJbo584hNQn6NsjXcAxovO6Oy97t0r0lW4i_EQte-LokB8RViLA/aGkGqjoOu9KDSTHKujGXzPr3c6rAwuJQ/18) petition in the next **10 minutes** — a critical step in demanding the Senate act, amplifying this fight for American voters FIRST.

body:

A Special Message from our SponsorPlease note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of Parler and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by Parler.

Bitcoin proved something important.

It showed the world that digital scarcity matters — that people are willing to hold value outside fiat systems.

But markets don’t stand still.

Today, even Bitcoin’s strongest advocates like Michael Saylor are discovering a quiet truth:
Bitcoin works best when the price is rising.

Gold works in every environment.

And right now, gold has entered a new phase.

At $5,000+ an ounce, gold isn’t rallying.

It’s resetting.

It’s no longer trading as a hedge.

It’s trading as money again.

Central banks are buying.

Trust in paper systems is fracturing.

And most importantly:

Gold is going digital.

Not metaphorically.

Structurally.

Billions of dollars are already moving into tokenized gold — blockchain-based representations of real gold — while much of the crypto market treads water.

That’s not speculation.

That’s recognition.

Which brings us to NatGold.

NatGold is not another crypto token.

It is the first system designed to digitally mine gold — transforming verified, in-ground gold into a digitally native monetary asset without extracting a single ounce.

- No bulldozers.
- No vaults.
- No storage fees.

Just real gold, certified by geology and made liquid at digital speed.

This is what comes
https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
after Bitcoin .

And right now, there is still a brief window to position before price discovery begins.

More than 118,451 NatGold Tokens have already been reserved by investors across 161 countries — representing over $355 million in pre-market demand, secured quietly before global trading begins.

Because of this demand, February 24, 2026 is the final day to reserve NatGold Tokens pre-market.

The first tokenization event is now just weeks away.

Reserving tokens does not require payment today.

It simply secures your place ahead of global trading — before access is controlled by price instead of position.

This is how new monetary assets are born.

Quietly at first.

Then all at once.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
Click here to reserve your NatGold Tokens now — before price replaces position.

No obligation today.

Just a place at the front of a market that’s about to exist.

To your wealth,

Brian Hicks

President,
Angel Investment Research

P.S. Windows like this don’t close loudly.

They close quietly — and reappear only as prices.

The window closes February 24.

Reserve your NatGold Tokens now.

name: Ximena, United We Dream
subject: 🧡 Organizing is an act of love —learn from Black activists who guide our fight for liberation
body:
The caring we have for one another is what holds us together. | | | Hey Peter, **To honor Black History Month, we bring you three important reflections from our conversation with Black organizing elders at our Digital Congress last year.** This month is a powerful reminder that our movement is grounded in the struggle for Black liberation. Anti-Blackness is the root behind the racist and xenophobic policies within our legal and immigration system. In this moment of uncertainty, we are guided by the long legacy of Black organizers who paved the way for our communities to continue fighting for collective justice for all. Are you ready to follow in their footsteps? The moment we face today is meant to break us. Black History Month reminds us that we must rely on our collective power as neighbors, students, educators, and workers to reclaim our future. [📣 **Sign up today to get trained and receive guidance on ways you can join your community in building the future we need:**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dB6af7XiYbFjRI2tw86gdhnCIm9s-IwwIo4kaplUyS4mZTZqLw24TwPXFwxPgLXLIR7fvfkzpNIfS_avT5pe1btwD35FMy1aFnu29aPXwOexXiLfnPwO9fcxtRD3MBmdb8CKkY7qug5oGoj3vLGaMZ2DejWVc6G-79vfuDz9gRPkZ6kSncxPu496ZzywBmI7kpq0-vw702jeEMgo6nSntWdfjnMqU6Sum9CYRkEXf7vu8gCBMwXxrd-F0yMcNyuYXJAmK5OWgqmfiSPikD0dPTkMmtuNfHGvzL-CpmCeAqo-yDoWVKSu6i1tAfSCCK1wVU/4od/YN4i-xxvRyiP-t3qdFWWvA/h0/h001.5VR5BICNUvCPg9yxFof_AP3hivVqPBzM506CoXkO7ho) **[Sign Up Now!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dB6af7XiYbFjRI2tw86gdhnCIm9s-IwwIo4kaplUyS4mZTZqLw24TwPXFwxPgLXLISV0hOy-S3saUvoBYbAugKKXI51LYsBFbyql0QUTHdQ2ROr_wiqm37Mc0Kekrye_tuKPRr9T40KfQwamuOVaFVxgnsp60gW96vuQ_FINAtHTKQc_-YAZBhmlq5bguzLAkLg_nAoZVkuwEFvwq5hikMkSBKU8CZbh1Y2ogG6A0zaCLER_N1bPgX_HcEdzLLT7pK1OODA8xdpu4HWuqDF2NDkePDfQdlbsen6G3j7T5NWppcvNauHtRXQnOY-oUpzLnI/4od/YN4i-xxvRyiP-t3qdFWWvA/h1/h001.5u5OZ9j5UjAwCAXlD4z5jIvakfvu5lkQunc1HlX5xPo)** [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dB6af7XiYbFjRI2tw86gdhnCIm9s-IwwIo4kaplUyS4mZTZqLw24TwPXFwxPgLXLIRvmkAzeRyNIem5uVdoU-U_bHr2uFOdneC54iysOwns5tcxyegJBHy59M5sYyHY0KAo1f9T4YA8TQo4Igwl3DVgvadzLb9xU5rYYZHWb8gT1CJZ9XQxlw1N6oSTSl7LY_83ixQ3RjljlOMEaQq9ms20aD3HrySXXaXC-euFl8N0t9P_0gN-zuk65M3vYFSzvGx5pyFF1LurXNz7OLtjFlC5tdX_9ZfGOR4CD8ULAGFG7qefBEbTNsHg0ZzcbopIytw/4od/YN4i-xxvRyiP-t3qdFWWvA/h2/h001.hz6EQ3l8kCqF8F4Q00BTP39T-jdzacAzaGo_DC7TTfo) We’re not the first generation to stand up to injustice. Throughout history, young people have come together to dream up a world where everyone has the safety and dignity to thrive. At our Digital Congress last year, we gathered over 100 youth from around the country and had the opportunity to hear from Black civil rights leaders who know what it takes to build power in the face of adversity: **Ms. Judy Richardson and Mr. Courtland Cox from the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee (SNCC) and Dr. Barbara Ransby, award-winning author of**** _Ella Baker and the Black Freedom Movement (2003)_****.** **👉 Here are three lessons to carry with you beyond Black History Month:** **1\. We are never powerless under the most ruthless of regimes.** Dr. Barbara Ransby invited us to tap into the resistance that already exists in our communities. Drawing from her involvement in the Anti-Apartheid Student Movement in South Africa and her extensive research on SNCC, Dr. Ransby reminded us that even in moments of despair, we are never without power. Solidarity is the antidote to fighting oppression. When they try to divide and conquer us, we must stand united and show one another our love. “If they come for some of us, they come for all of us.” [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dB6af7XiYbFjRI2tw86gdhnCIm9s-IwwIo4kaplUyS4mZTZqLw24TwPXFwxPgLXLIT5nzc1YxEI6ZgDNQJdIEsu86HTjjmA9AyEpqRjD1nJSsQ_qIJU4b_B_QuWCwqI7vkSUtSML4uZB5o-Xe1lUJysYKzeGkYY73_MItCGt2rNdpk00nXdiDpYgfxm840P-ZV2MTJU95hvSjf_UZJmn1oX6Xv9kDMZ10s5O-cpgOu8gJw-FcDUbfuQpZyrboOb7mQ8cRv1EBlhrW9AFpH57mNKiRC8h-_imfHpGsRjn2yb2ON9UR4MTzfILvTXbMFM4eU/4od/YN4i-xxvRyiP-t3qdFWWvA/h3/h001.yINXaRyt2lnY2EOum0s_lHPTMuttsfqXM6dscOiqgUo)
**2\. We are a community in action. We need to stay organized.** At only nineteen years old, Mr. Courtland Cox organized during the Freedom Summer to help register Black people to vote. From participating in local sit-ins to helping bring the 1963 March on Washington to life, Mr. Cox has dedicated his life to growing Black electoral and economic power. In this moment of uncertainty, he reminded young people at our Digital Congress that we are part of an ongoing movement. The struggle we are up against is not new. From Black students who staged lunch counter sit-ins in defiance of segregation, to our neighbors standing up for immigrants in the face of violent ICE raids, our communities have met moments of intense fear and uncertainty with courage. We are a community in action, and we need to stay engaged and organized to build a future where we can all thrive. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dB6af7XiYbFjRI2tw86gdhnCIm9s-IwwIo4kaplUyS4mZTZqLw24TwPXFwxPgLXLIQ992S7iuD0gQDjIU3tyadzLn7M3Bcd684OGuQLEm_AT8qACJX0Oxxg01As5l7dVekO-CNHOtq4bx5m-RVjinvYkb_BlXml74IzYHUT14aX-mZ8lqBXaNgc-dIYTvY_AEABhodGTp-uj9Lcav4QWN2rz_2BJgzIyGQPFaBiKMGbJ8CcRweGuOUm0tQg991qKk1rkB9KNdRrkUtPkzmkF5llJEBQfuUFD1a7ey8AuR23nl7z3yVheI-prWtv74Zv_Mg/4od/YN4i-xxvRyiP-t3qdFWWvA/h4/h001.ArkeRl2RWMg075Wx2S6p6598eru-3IAY0UO1ABFAEww)
**3\. The caring we have for one another is what holds us together.** Ms. Judy Richardson was a key part of SNCC’s efforts in Georgia and Alabama. She co-founded _Drum and Spear Bookstore_ in 1968 alongside Mr. Cox and other SNCC veterans — at the time one of the largest bookstores in the country dedicated to Black literature. Today, she is a film producer and member of the SNCC Legacy Project board. But before all of this, she had people who believed in her. This is what our survival depends on. Even in moments of disagreement within our communities, we need to know that we can count on each other. Our lives depend on each other. Peter, organizing is an act of love. It’s up to us to protect each other and build the future we need. Generation after generation, our communities have met moments of adversity with courage. This resilience runs in our veins. **We’ve seen time and time again that we’re vulnerable when we’re divided.** To survive, we need each other. Now is our moment to organize and build a future with all the resources our communities need: a pathway to citizenship, living wages, healthcare, affordable housing, and liberation for all. [**Will you sign up to get trained and receive guidance on real ways you can step up in your daily life to protect your community?** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dB6af7XiYbFjRI2tw86gdhnCIm9s-IwwIo4kaplUyS4mZTZqLw24TwPXFwxPgLXLISixRfVkBURuPYks6UKOcHssr-AbH2yvIYTmf1CdDElncI4YfCyF7-pXEK6_joteqsNM5fbBlzFC3QBHlNK2b2pH3W0ee45vuzVNRVxwTfJUNpd2s0aaNY_sBT1t1ctg2rDVQaRV-v-EDg3wQIFgXvGdRVVvaHwA6XIJ6Yj_2I6n8oAOZ6-eSmBkobw0IDwZvQh0GWuQ07I3JWtgKPs4GIdeUhy6GDdMhQ1jVPLD67RcnCiYgl3dLBcf3816bxgCj4/4od/YN4i-xxvRyiP-t3qdFWWvA/h5/h001.WCx2mN5BvFOGA0PxcL9Y1DzKwQKz_dXHHYBHG-Y_NKk) **[Sign Up Now!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dB6af7XiYbFjRI2tw86gdhnCIm9s-IwwIo4kaplUyS4mZTZqLw24TwPXFwxPgLXLISIU3JOThumkhG2O9hGLoKparwZ3o4yD98etCC8P6cIquOFVnY4ihvp0Q6V9Inthl_eiUD3Ug7S1HUS4nga_6xDrCJS2Mgkut9cFcyAAFGxqVv7OJFRYscH7kwASUxZC10UbPm0SJJdlDZeLwUML35BeyHRZ_D-SMupQQebTjYR1DsbcFxr7aruO4C3F3nb-wp05_H-l9CH06ujcYnRZYTq6PO1KG-CdBi3zal2OSXJl2KVFlQ9l-SzFa1ocJ_zYjI/4od/YN4i-xxvRyiP-t3qdFWWvA/h6/h001.VH0lGLg0oph_kx6oQi2qwiv0GA2yyFtgTRd7UHD2dZY)** In unity, Ximena and the UWD team

name: Mike Rounds
subject: Can you pitch in $7 this weekend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rounds for Senate**
body:
We cannot afford to fall behind |
---
Fellow Conservative,

Weekends like this decide everything.

While most people tune out, Democrats keep raising money and building momentum to take back the United States Senate.

**We cannot afford to fall behind — not now, when Republicans have the chance not only to defend our majority, but expand it.**

The Supreme Court struck down Trump's tariffs.
It's about time.
These tariffs have driven up costs for our farmers, our small business owners, and our families. **They cost the average household nearly $1,000 last year.** The truth is right there in the grocery store checkout line.
**But Dan Meuser voted to protect them.** He voted to ban Congress from overturning the tariffs that are taking money right out of your pocket.
Representatives should be fighting to lower costs for working families. Why is ours trying to make sure they go up?
Dan isn't worried about putting food on the table or keeping employees on the payroll. He doesn't care about the thousands of his constituents who don't have an extra $1,000 a year lying around. All he's concerned with is his own stock portfolio - and it's doing just fine.
**I 'm running to protect YOUR wallet. Not to get myself rich. But I can only beat Meuser if I have a big enough grassroots team behind me.**
**[If you're able to, chip in to my campaign today to help me flip this seat and fight for our families in Congress.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/85ae06f7-c5b3-4884-8a5c-e324afe0230a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[DONATE NOW](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/85ae06f7-c5b3-4884-8a5c-e324afe0230a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Gratefully,
Rachel Wallace

clean_body: The Supreme Court did the right thing | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more The Supreme Court did the right thing Feb 22 | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Supreme Court struck down Trump's tariffs. It's about time. These tariffs have driven up costs for our farmers, our small business owners, and our families. They cost the average household nearly $1,000 last year. The truth is right there in the grocery store checkout line. But Dan Meuser voted to protect them. He voted to ban Congress from overturning the tariffs that are taking money right out of your pocket. Representatives should be fighting to lower costs for working families. Why is ours trying to make sure they go up? Dan isn't worried about putting food on the table or keeping employees on the payroll. He doesn't care about the thousands of his constituents who don't have an extra $1,000 a year lying around. All he's concerned with is his own stock portfolio - and it's doing just fine. I 'm running to protect YOUR wallet. Not to get myself rich. But I can only beat Meuser if I have a big enough grassroots team behind me. Gratefully, Rachel Wallace Thanks for reading! name: Rashida Tlaib with Our Revolution
subject: Help me & Our Revolution take power from Trump and his oligarchs

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35395?t=1011&refcode=email-20260222_v&akid=10262%2E5885482%2EYWD74i ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

This is Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib. Together, we’re standing on the front
lines with Our Revolution in the fight to stop Trump’s authoritarianism
and take our democracy back from the billionaire bullies.

I’ve been proud to work alongside Our Revolution in our shared struggle
for justice and accountability. Now, we’re rolling out a historic Defund
the Oligarchy resolution in Congress to stop Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and
other billionaires from hijacking our government for their own profit.

I’m proud to work alongside Our Revolution because they do more than talk
– they work every day to build power and deliver change. Now, they’re
taking on the oligarchs and building out progressive power across every
level of government. And as the midterms approach, their work is more
vital than ever.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35395?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20260222nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10262%2E5885482%2EYWD74i ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can right now to fuel
Our Revolution’s organizing to build the power we need to win the midterms
and fight back against Trump’s billionaire takeover.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35395?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20260222nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10262%2E5885482%2EYWD74i ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35395?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20260222nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10262%2E5885482%2EYWD74i ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35395?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20260222nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10262%2E5885482%2EYWD74i ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35395?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20260222nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10262%2E5885482%2EYWD74i ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35395?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20260222nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10262%2E5885482%2EYWD74i ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35395?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20260222nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10262%2E5885482%2EYWD74i ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Here’s the truth: billionaires rushed to bankroll Trump and the MAGA
movement knowing it was a wise “investment.” And they were right.

Tech titans spent at least $72 million to curry favor with Trump – and
over the last year tech CEOs like Zuckerberg and Jeff Bezos have seen
their combined net worth soar by $494 BILLION. And, a new report indicates
that just four Big Tech corporations – Amazon, Alphabet, Meta, and Tesla –
received $51 BILLION in federal tax breaks last year as a result of Donald
Trump’s tax scam.

Do you know what the rest of us got? Regulatory agencies gutted, health
care and food assistance slashed, communities terrorized by ICE – and a
“Trump economy” of rules for the rich and scraps for everyone else. We
have had enough.

The solution is clear: we need to stop pouring taxpayer dollars into the
billionaire-owned companies who buy political influence, and invest that
money where it belongs – the people. With your help, we’re mobilizing Our
Revolution’s 100,000+ member Citizen Action Team to build a movement,
pressure Congress, and expose the politicians who put oligarchs over
constituents.

But Our Revolution isn’t stopping there: primary elections are underway –
and they have a proven track record of turning out votes and driving
progressive victories all over the country. But they can only keep going
if grassroots supporters like you have their back.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35395?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20260222nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10262%2E5885482%2EYWD74i ]Our Revolution is effective – full stop. And this moment is urgent. If you
can, make a donation today. $10, $20, or whatever you can spare directly
fuels the people-powered campaigns we need to win.

As I recently wrote in an oped with Joseph Geevarghese, Our Revolution’s
Executive Director: “It’s time to defund the oligarchy and invest in the
American people.” Join us as we take this fight to the next level.

When we organize, we win.

U.S. Rep. Rashida Tlaib
and Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

establishment by committing to be a 2026 Movement Builder

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: The dark history behind “equity” and “social justice”
body:
Marxism began with promises of a perfect world—and ended in fear, famine, and death.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/OfSEEx3LkgIyYJKzZnD_7U-Sw5CbVTsjtT_6w1fPxwFfPcXd4iEQDnlVCR3CaWt8ymLm-CI0ldmnozWdIFKjSKp8QCNhlGkVwO9PbhIZstPDHsz4KhTFTk9E2YeHhM5isw8UCmJGRmOXPOXkTtVsKODbqPcNJx3600BufrWu2bqNabgGg-2nALhM/4nXjj2cI2mpBNAS1cvqB507oFaEgeN-4/18)_
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/qyClTI5l9BZtjLm3mIBvd7ZqnZXOFW6RihJ3DiWveJEyx6CJvx_D_ZrVkVx0Wpwo8evL0PmY81A_m9dz3ZiIa96lq-MPDWpYI1DXoLcmbAmFswjVISsuksRlRIXuLQwK01wrluPk2H3ndacUziQ9ToHqFDPvFMYDhDxACuUpiBnErerQN9NJr6QijSP6-LthG13xjUkRIOHBzFJwoervpI72JHtHxiQWJR-KGAFbkcenJY8FKYv-F73o0AUdyOBjmGP2EKcMQMAUThkEY5x-15cmqmOTiTQpID_6AJvFphJE8aBJv2BKeRBRbSez3f87BPZ37RLqA6QnMfwD7xYgt4qY3d3ay72O-4TrUME8Xq2RUMjz6gZ_XLc_xk6aNEY5Pup0ZRDHnr0v01wLb6Ht2q5sCeEywSZ0SmI-O2yWGu2si3Y-YEWpeacOWPuBeoLDZ7RoPsJMhJzr4xP_8ySN9xRVRP6CGAKTn6l6xJvQZC09hFS3j5S_MsNivdDkSDTYh7KaXA5ufFg77tnc0Fz7lUUbRW8s8m8xCGgwNVv0k_tqWLKJnLRFVAIkiYMI3Veh4vo68BNEMdiW_3QJb4aksWE3jAkE7vSt6oUa4pxFolBPsO35Z1DsA-Rie3JiuhmXWEAAL5iXFRsgUtRmhPKD980XolXGmqNQuQpoDaCIX77mPY6bmyJ4pmu-ye3sdrSu1cfn/ZKr9IXGov9FIh9QFxlk9RLWFGASHonIv/18)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Here's a story I'll never forget, once I learned the truth behind it.

In 1917, a small group of revolutionaries led by Vladimir Lenin seized power in Russia. They promised a better, fairer world...sound familiar?

But soon after taking control, they began rounding up and executing anyone who stood in their way. Lenin even ordered his followers to hang landowners and seize their crops--so that for miles around, "people see, and tremble..."

Marxism began with promises of a perfect world--and ended in fear, famine, and death.

You may be familiar with that dark history, but too many Americans aren't. How do I know?

Because a century later, these dangerous ideas have been repackaged and rebranded. They're taught in schools and promoted by celebrity politicians using words such as "equity," "diversity," and "social justice."

The words sound harmless, but the ideas behind them are the same. Will they end up with the same terrifying results?

That's why Hillsdale College has created the National Quiz on Marxism, Socialism, and Communism, and I'd love for you to take it.

You can complete your National Quiz on Marxism, Socialism, and Communism using this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/marxism-quiz-tf](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/sf2nb8uaP8M2yI7f49IDFEKHT9efb4wwVAVFJU7RZXwOfsZ04nrch-JFg2k6B7Y7xt9ZaUY9zYFt0fgq4k810w0uK78pSHNyrOHx27yDKR0zpbgB2pzcBwB40OPAHxBjvF5AgkYiSscQBvZrg5nsLMuFtbqIdyptmsJK4trzLr5n_hiEACU1uQcCACkOm1YNizT6LDvVHN133HfG1aQn0CHZww8QrTiCfl9spKAP1s2fzHoIgxs86CuLh98cadOKUcqaTyA0joJl4nwUtF-PZb0fbWKSmxtg5qmBdBq-D6V0R9ChXskMpUlH_dp-JXFRg-YDkpBcP9q51iRcmLpxiIIOSMZaJT0LVOwu0oxJ88-TMmdqtlbokEQqfKxCjb2vO6DN39U0lvLOMlkswqi6QtQe49wowLpMjSNAURkIg-RWp9r_S7vXTg70jG05-fjEjmAEoEIJXcKPh9eCdfH4D2_6zZRGP4FVgdHBBjroOJobkxBjXvvALWufNULzaro3HeUVAQbNSdLL_zoG_nbtFIgb9zvwj4o9WR8G9-apcm6dbk8cCsfFzOZzTf9clj7CzMo99XA25M24VhM5_JwVD4LyAw9puKDT1V7k2LDaLd0pR8hd-EfwmNKxSgahOTOudsISubCQPZ3RiDYkqPYeMkbfj6H3J1XgJmgRU5W9Ba3j20R8BRVGKo5WB6egkqx8tbYz/xILZcDLSKLS5rNUa4KRl7X1BFgWO4Hfv/18)

This short quiz will test your knowledge of the history and real-world consequences of dangerous ideologies like Marxism and socialism.

And when you finish, we'll email you the answers, and you can watch our free online documentary-style course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism," which tells the whole story--from Lenin's Red Terror to today's Cultural Marxism.

Most young Americans have never learned this history. I know I didn't in high school. But you can help change that with your financial support today.

[After you take your quiz, please also consider giving a tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, or even $100 to help us share this free course with millions of Americans](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/Kz5su6jaUksCkxdvZnsBx481xknaqKmYcPBxKuAAiJS4bMVWlRxEIUj0v0mWmSXr43Qh0wIiAEe3tv5vMCY9fvKUSvXXWpB4Dz429RYfVIFxA323nrpEVWPlt6VzGb7A--lnE5Bzdjw4GGPUKcmP58Cicn8kfjFy42QviKm1jKZNsaou0QbWmGX9DbTaS3rt1mEULtzgQ3nVPbG63G1DwSKCKvV2Rt9QRGQe7HKp7fGPcPBpnKDHTKGL_Hsq0i7g5keF_Dzsunnfhl0ilP5v-MJZS-bY6ZtuXRrqyePkVy3B759eI5vpI7PTPRwIcN4Zs8NufGErR_O8t85R56HaJ9QXoNRcqfxzqgk4N8zcByQ2d1DO57poJ6rZ-93-HbINNE2XCqTU5xttP8fDgUqP0TEwQqmyGjoDH1qeS1qGA2cLkJ-WzEL9ykE19YyajUMjFaAbkxczd1z2VhwX2s_HceDib6PkqLkjK9gh9c4XhlL1Galy5D3qqmk_5EG3QQdyahb4qhrtFmu1laP31VbSg6WYWa_RyYqVddSaT38yuK_k5VznOjh5MMVWtu3Vh70Jpoyo0wdBt6ecGezBeVBt7YmMRD2jximcOPtt7ijzQdleBs0X_AhLFznwAARVovwGzBs705e6b9ARNHtK7U4onGNMsrfMG56pX5OsxO7k5RkaHclF2nslPB8BErdQgSThE9F8/QDqcKYgjzI-5isBYeyBlxsGJFT0MwntB/18)--especially young people who are misled by the same false ideas that once brought such misery to Russia and the world.

Because of you, more Americans will learn that the principles of liberty in the Declaration of Independence--not Marxism--are the true path to ordered freedom and human flourishing.

Good luck on the quiz.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Lenin's revolution began with promises of equality but ended with terror. The same ideas are spreading again today under new labels.

Please take your National Quiz on Marxism, Socialism, and Communism now using the secure link below--and, if you can, include a gift to help us reach and teach millions about the principles of liberty and limited government.

clean_body: Marxism began with promises of a perfect world—and ended in fear, famine, and death. | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | Dear Friend, Here's a story I'll never forget, once I learned the truth behind it. In 1917, a small group of revolutionaries led by Vladimir Lenin seized power in Russia. They promised a better, fairer world...sound familiar? But soon after taking control, they began rounding up and executing anyone who stood in their way. Lenin even ordered his followers to hang landowners and seize their crops--so that for miles around, "people see, and tremble..." Marxism began with promises of a perfect world--and ended in fear, famine, and death. You may be familiar with that dark history, but too many Americans aren't. How do I know? Because a century later, these dangerous ideas have been repackaged and rebranded. They're taught in schools and promoted by celebrity politicians using words such as "equity," "diversity," and "social justice." The words sound harmless, but the ideas behind them are the same. Will they end up with the same terrifying results? That's why Hillsdale College has created the National Quiz on Marxism, Socialism, and Communism, and I'd love for you to take it. You can complete your National Quiz on Marxism, Socialism, and Communism using this secure link: This short quiz will test your knowledge of the history and real-world consequences of dangerous ideologies like Marxism and socialism. And when you finish, we'll email you the answers, and you can watch our free online documentary-style course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism," which tells the whole story--from Lenin's Red Terror to today's Cultural Marxism. Most young Americans have never learned this history. I know I didn't in high school. But you can help change that with your financial support today. young people who are misled by the same false ideas that once brought such misery to Russia and the world. Because of you, more Americans will learn that the principles of liberty in the Declaration of Independence--not Marxism--are the true path to ordered freedom and human flourishing. Good luck on the quiz. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. Lenin's revolution began with promises of equality but ended with terror. The same ideas are spreading again today under new labels. Please take your National Quiz on Marxism, Socialism, and Communism now using the secure link below--and, if you can, include a gift to help us reach and teach millions about the principles of liberty and limited government. | |

name: VAP Research Team
subject: The president ordering the seizure of voting machines?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
@NorahODonnell: The January 6th committee shows a draft executive order from Dec. 2020 that would direct the Secretary of Defense to seize voting machines immediately. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NOD_SeizeVotingMachines.png]
The January 6th committee showed evidence in a hearing that President Trump was going to order the Department of Defense to seize voting machines around the country to search for evidence of wrongdoing.
While the order was never given, this highlights the lengths some people were willing to go in their use of federal power to justify their fantasies about elections they see as "stolen". This comes despite the states having control of our elections, not the federal government.
Team : We're looking to hear from voters in your area about your thoughts on this. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Should the President have the power to order the military to seize voting machines without proof of wrongdoing?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=022226_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=022226_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=022226_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=022226_1&amount=20]

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Team Schrier
subject: Our kids can't afford climate denial.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Climate change is real...and so are the consequences. But Trump thinks it's a "scam." [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125915062/603317579/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjE5YmZlZS0yMTEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oi2PMVv6KNhf7bvTRXYqVQwcYIQMDSzYcfLfcfwuxbM=&emci=f1956732-720e-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&emdi=8b19bfee-2110-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter,

Climate change isn't some abstract debate happening in Washington, D.C.—it's the smoke that kept our kids indoors all summer, the heat waves that sent seniors to the ER, the floods and wildfires that have changed entire communities across Washington State.

So when the President of the United States calls climate change a "scam" and tears down the guardrails that limit pollution and help keep us safe from the fallout, it's not just out of touch—**it's dangerous.**

Rescinding the federal finding that says climate change endangers public health means stripping away the legal foundation that has helped reduce harmful emissions for years, and it sends a message that politics matter more than people's lives.

As a pediatrician and as a mom, Kim has seen firsthand how vulnerable kids are to asthma, wildfire smoke, extreme heat, and poor air quality, and she has brought that urgency with her to Congress. **She's fought to protect clean air and water standards, supported investments in renewable energy and climate resilience, defended wildfire prevention and forest restoration programs, and fought back against efforts to gut environmental safeguards that keep families safe.**

Americans deserve leaders who respect science and understand that climate policy is health policy, because the consequences are already showing up in emergency rooms, in schools forced to close during smoke events, and in families struggling to recover from disasters that grow more intense each year. We need an administration that takes this crisis seriously, and we need a Congress strong enough to hold this president accountable when he refuses to.

**[If you believe our children deserve clean air and a livable future, chip in $5, or anything you can, to help Kim keep WA-08 blue so she can continue fighting for our climate, our health, and the communities we love.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125915063/603317581/1210615431?refcode=em26_260222_climat_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em26_260222_climat_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=8b19bfee-2110-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&refcode2=8b19bfee-2110-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjE5YmZlZS0yMTEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oi2PMVv6KNhf7bvTRXYqVQwcYIQMDSzYcfLfcfwuxbM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125915065/603317582/1210615431?refcode=em26_260222_climat_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260222_climat_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=8b19bfee-2110-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f

clean_body: Climate change is real...and so are the consequences. But Trump thinks it's a "scam." Peter, Climate change isn't some abstract debate happening in Washington, D.C.—it's the smoke that kept our kids indoors all summer, the heat waves that sent seniors to the ER, the floods and wildfires that have changed entire communities across Washington State. So when the President of the United States calls climate change a "scam" and tears down the guardrails that limit pollution and help keep us safe from the fallout, it's not just out of touch—it's dangerous. Rescinding the federal finding that says climate change endangers public health means stripping away the legal foundation that has helped reduce harmful emissions for years, and it sends a message that politics matter more than people's lives. As a pediatrician and as a mom, Kim has seen firsthand how vulnerable kids are to asthma, wildfire smoke, extreme heat, and poor air quality, and she has brought that urgency with her to Congress. She's fought to protect clean air and water standards, supported investments in renewable energy and climate resilience, defended wildfire prevention and forest restoration programs, and fought back against efforts to gut environmental safeguards that keep families safe. Americans deserve leaders who respect science and understand that climate policy is health policy, because the consequences are already showing up in emergency rooms, in schools forced to close during smoke events, and in families struggling to recover from disasters that grow more intense each year. We need an administration that takes this crisis seriously, and we need a Congress strong enough to hold this president accountable when he refuses to. = If you've saved your payment information with name: Chris Taylor HQ
subject: ICYMI: Our extreme opponent launched ads against us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
In a race this competitive, we can’t afford to let these attacks go unanswered.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260222-1145&t=1&akid=1145%2E294397%2EapjxEc)
Folks,
In case you missed it: **Our extreme opponent went up on the air with a statewide ad blitz attacking us.**
That means undecided voters are seeing misleading attacks meant to smear Judge Chris Taylor’s record.
In a race this competitive, we can’t afford to let these attacks go unanswered.
That’s why we launched our own ad that sets the record straight and reminds voters who Judge Chris Taylor really is:
* A fair and impartial judge.
* A lifelong advocate for fundamental rights and freedoms.
* Someone who believes our courts should protect people, not special interests.

But reserving TV airtime is incredibly expensive, and while our extreme opponent has billionaires and right-wing special interests on her side, we’re depending on grassroots donors like you to keep our ad up.
[**Please, rush in a $10 donation today to help us compete on the airwaves and reach as many voters as possible before our April election:**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260222_1_ak.hRBpnY&amount=10&refcode=em20260222-1145&t=3&akid=1145%2E294397%2EapjxEc)

Thank you,
Team Taylor

name: Richard Hudson, Chairman of the NRCC
subject: Hope I caught you in time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Good day,

name: Team Pou
subject: Could you imagine if a Republican won here?
body:
They came really close.

| |
---
Hi friend, Could you imagine if a Republican won NJ-09 last cycle? Because they came really close. They would never dare to stand up and demand accountability; they wouldn’t lift a finger to help working families; they wouldn’t work for us. Nellie is standing up and demanding more accountability in the DHS negotiations. Nellie is fighting to get the money for the Gateway project back. Nellis is fighting to lower healthcare costs. When we win tough races like this one and take back the House, we can deliver better. This district is one of the most competitive seats in the country. clean_body: They came really close. | | Hi friend, Could you imagine if a Republican won NJ-09 last cycle? Because they came really close. They would never dare to stand up and demand accountability; they wouldn’t lift a finger to help working families; they wouldn’t work for us. Nellie is standing up and demanding more accountability in the DHS negotiations. Nellie is fighting to get the money for the Gateway project back. Nellis is fighting to lower healthcare costs. When we win tough races like this one and take back the House, we can deliver better. This district is one of the most competitive seats in the country. Republicans are gearing up, and they would love nothing more than to flip this seat and add another MAGA rubber stamp in Washington. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. name: Sarah McBride
subject: You don’t have to be a hero
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Last year, I was asked: Do you have advice for people in this moment who might be horrified by what they're seeing, but a little scared?
# [](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1269?t=1&akid=2853%2E21716%2E7rWTIy)
Hi, it's Sarah.
Last year, I was asked:
_“Do you have advice for people in this moment who might be horrified by what they're seeing, but a little scared?”_
My answer then is my answer today.
**As my dad used to say, if everyone has just a little bit of courage, then no one has to be a hero.**
It might be scary right now. But the more everyday people speak out, the more others will find the courage to do the same. And every time you speak up, share your story, or show your support for this work, your act of courage helps build something bigger than any one person.
Over this past year in office, I have witnessed that courage every single day. People organizing to protect their communities. Neighbors standing up for each other. Americans refusing to stay silent as Trump threatens our rights, our democracy, and our freedom.
_That’s how change happens — and that’s how we’ll win._
**Whether you’re on the frontlines or you’re looking for that little bit of courage today, my promise to you is that I will continue to speak out for all of us, inside and outside of Congress.**
So here's my ask: [**If you’re wondering how you can take action right now, pitch in anything you can to help us push back against the Trump administration and continue building a movement of everyday people who refuse to back down.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260222-1.ZyDqOV&refcode=em20260222-2853&amount=5&t=2&akid=2853%2E21716%2E7rWTIy)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260222-1.ZyDqOV&amount=5&refcode=em20260222-2853&t=21&akid=2853%2E21716%2E7rWTIy)**
Thank you for showing up.
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-2026-footer?refcode=em20260222-1&t=22&refcode2=2853_21716_7rWTIy&akid=2853%2E21716%2E7rWTIy)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=2853%2E21716%2E7rWTIy)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=24&akid=2853%2E21716%2E7rWTIy)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2853%2E21716%2E7rWTIy)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: The final stretch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
We only have 100 days to get Katie’s message in front of voters.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40887%2E3422442%2EmZZTPX)
Peter,
There are just **100 days** until primary election day. In a race this competitive, the last 100 days will decide everything.
**[Can you donate to Katie Porter to help us kick off the final 100 days?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260222_1_ak.KQLGkK&refcode=em20260222-40887&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40887%2E3422442%2EmZZTPX)**
When voters hear about how Katie fights for single payer health care, universal child care, and protecting our rights, they support her. Now, we only have 100 days to get that message in front of them. But with a billionaire blanketing the airwaves with ads, it’s hard to break through.
We’re counting on grassroots support to get her message out across California. Ballots will start being cast before you know it, and we need to win over as many Californians as possible by that point.
**[Can you chip in $10—or any amount you can—to our campaign so we can make the most of the final 100 days?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260222_1_ak.KQLGkK&refcode=em20260222-40887&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40887%2E3422442%2EmZZTPX)**

Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260222-40887&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40887_3422442_mZZTPX&akid=40887%2E3422442%2EmZZTPX)**

name: David Hogg
subject: Project 2027
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Let’s be honest about this.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260222-1&t=1&akid=3175%2E587540%2E9Zt-8O)
Peter,
Conservatives were completely prepared for their 2024 victory.
Remember **Project 2025**? It was a detailed, step-by-step blueprint for enacting a conservative policy agenda after Donald Trump won back the White House.
And according to Project 2025 Tracker, they’ve already implemented 51% of it.
Let’s be honest about this: If progressives are serious about reclaiming power, we need our own version of this. Call it Project 2027, Project 2029... it doesn’t matter. What matters is that our version — _unlike Project 2025_ — will actually help people.
**[What do you want to see on Democrats’ policy agenda after we defeat the Republicans in 2026 and 2028? Take our quick survey to share your thoughts.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/lwd-em-2026-project-2027/?source=em20260222-3175&t=2&akid=3175%2E587540%2E9Zt-8O)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/lwd-em-2026-project-2027/?source=em20260222-3175&t=3&akid=3175%2E587540%2E9Zt-8O)**
Universal healthcare. Gun safety reform. Action on climate change. Abortion rights. Housing prices. Immigration reform — and an end to ICE as we know it.
We are doing more than building a progressive wishlist here, Peter. Democrats _can_ take back Congress and the White House in the next two elections. And we need to be prepared for what we’re going to do to help people once we do. We need to play offence, instead of the weak defence we’ve been showcasing.
When we get the results back in the next week or two we will send you an update with the top suggestions we received.
[**Will you take our brief survey and tell us which policies Dems should prioritize?**](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/lwd-em-2026-project-2027/?source=em20260222-3175&t=4&akid=3175%2E587540%2E9Zt-8O)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/lwd-em-2026-project-2027/?source=em20260222-3175&t=5&akid=3175%2E587540%2E9Zt-8O)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260222-1&t=6&refcode2=3175_587540_9Zt-8O&akid=3175%2E587540%2E9Zt-8O)**

Listen, I hate asking hard-working Oregonians like you for your money — it’s my least favorite part of the job. But here’s the reality: [**Washington is broken.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125916288/603320553/1485128568?amount=25&amounts=6%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500&refcode=email_022226_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjc1M2E1OS0yODEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yg-r7C9Az-bb6FMtLN_fk2SJxTcY3IIje3Mg2BkG73I=)
Trump and his allies hold a terrifying trifecta in Washington D.C., and are watching our democracy crumble while doing nothing to fix it.
That’s why I am working hard to defend our communities from Trump and the GOP’s attacks.
That’s why I put the Trump Administration on blast for DEFYING a court order to fully fund SNAP payments last year.
[**That’s why Senator Merkley and I introduced a bill to allow Americans to sue the government if ICE infringes on their rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125916289/603320554/1485128568?amount=25&amounts=6%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500&refcode=email_022226_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjc1M2E1OS0yODEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yg-r7C9Az-bb6FMtLN_fk2SJxTcY3IIje3Mg2BkG73I=)
And _that’s why this election year is so important._ If we don’t defend this seat from the far-right, we risk handing Trump and Republicans another two years of unchecked power.
**[I am confident we can turn OR-06 into a Democratic stronghold, but I need your help. So, can you please chip in before tonight’s end-of-week deadline? Any amount shows that you have my bad in helping Democrats flip the House blue:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125916290/603320555/1485128568?amount=25&amounts=6%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500&refcode=email_022226_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjc1M2E1OS0yODEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yg-r7C9Az-bb6FMtLN_fk2SJxTcY3IIje3Mg2BkG73I=)**

That's just reality.
Washington is a cesspool of creeps, crooks, crockpots, and crybabies. It's getting harder and harder to find honest folks who just want to do right by God for America.
My friend Steve Scalise just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $100,000,000 (that ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're targeting 35 GOP seats in our most vulnerable districts - harder than ever before.
Now, my buddies in the House have their FIRST major deadline of the election year coming up - and I just learned they're falling 15-20% behind goal.
If they miss it, it'll be a devastating blow.

Washington is a cesspool of creeps, crooks, crockpots, and crybabies. It's getting harder and harder to find honest folks who just want to do right by God for America. My friend Steve Scalise just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $100,000,000 (that ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're targeting 35 GOP seats in our most vulnerable districts - harder than ever before. Now, my buddies in the House have their FIRST major deadline of the election year coming up - and I just learned they're falling 15-20% behind goal. If they miss it, it'll be a devastating blow. So with all due respect, I'm personally asking you for just a few bucks before time officially runs out. Will you please help me out?, I do not want to lose to the party that: Supports taxpayer funded transgender surgeries for illegals Elected a self proclaimed Commie to lead New York City. Opened our borders to MILLIONS of illegal criminals It's just plain stupid - and not even duct tape can fix stupid! Conservatives are holding onto the gavel in the House by the skin of a grape, we lose just a couple races and we're toast. I know we still have the Senate and the White House, but it could all be over before the pot can whistle... I hate being a pest, but we don't have time to sit around - not if we want to win. Will you help us out before it's too late? - Senator John Kennedy + top Conservative leaders at the heart of our MAGA Movement have reached out with GRAVE WARNINGS on the state of the Midterms like NEVER BEFORE... Democrat controlled House would be the worst-case scenario for the MAGA Movement. We're pleading with you to take this seriously. | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. body:
There’s only 48 hours left until the State of the Union and I need you.
| | | |
# **I’M PULLING THE FIRE ALARM!**

**THERE’S ONLY 48 HOURS LEFT UNTIL THE STATE OF THE UNION AND I NEED YOU.**

---
[READ EMERGENCY MEMO](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
There are only 48 hours left until the State of the Union. Democrats want nothing more than to **IMPEACH ME ,** which means we must be prepared for **_MASSIVE TORPEDOES_** flying our way.
In 2020, Nancy Pelosi ripped up my speech.
Now, some Democrats say they’re going to boycott my speech.
Others say they’re going to cause a ruckus as they walk out during it.
A few have even said they must do everything in God’s name to make my speech an absolute failure.

## **ABSOLUTE DISRESPECT!**

[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**I’M PULLING THE FIRE ALARM!** I need every patriot that’s reading this message to rise up and pledge: __[“I’M VOTING REPUBLICAN ACROSS THE BALLOT DURING THE MIDTERMS”.](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)__
Failure to respond could not only cost us victory after my State of the Union speech, but also our majority in the House & the Senate.
Without a doubt, Democrats will **FILE ARTICLES OF IMPEACHMENT AGAINST ME** the moment they seize the majority. **DO NOT LET THEM.**

[FINAL CHANCE: STAND WITH TRUMP?](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

There's something the Left never thought they'd have to say out loud:

_Above: The Left is sending fundraising texts that name-drop Turning Point to scare their donors._
---
In their own words, they're warning supporters about a "hyper-partisan voter registration machine."

They even asked: _" Ever heard of Turning Point?" _

Yes. They have.

Because Charlie cracked the code -- and it works.

**Knock more doors. Chase more ballots. Win more races. **

That's the math.

And the Left knows it's beating them.

Because while they talk, we train. While they protest, we're building.

_**... but a ballot chaser will. **_

name: Theresa Flores
subject: Friend, your caring can stop trafficking
body:
Trafficking Happens Here. Even in Motel Rooms.
I survived child trafficking. Many children don’t—unless someone acts.

| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8325186/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3Yvd1ZITVBYcURYUw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAyMjI/LbmNsa05CU3ZLeQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNYTUFTckFHdFhwTVBscw/gaZtlmA/s6g5b2ad0db)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| |
---
| GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE
---
|
---
| | Friend,

I am a survivor of child trafficking—and today, I work to make sure other children never face what I did. My name is Theresa Flores. **I was fifteen years old.** **An honor student.
****A daughter.
****A girl who trusted the wrong "friend.”** I was trafficked for two years. Most people imagine trafficking happens far away - in dark alleys or foreign countries. **To “other people.”** But my nightmare happened in the suburbs of Detroit. I lived at home.
I went to high school.
**And no one noticed.** On the worst night of my life, I was taken to a dirty motel room and auctioned off to nearly two dozen men. **I remember the smell of the room.
****The fear in my chest.
****And the silence I was forced to keep.** I survived. But many do not.
---
[ Help Save a Child ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
That’s why I partner with the **Sound of Freedom Foundation.** Through education and intervention, they equip frontline partners to do what most systems never taught— _help ordinary people to recognize trafficking before it’s too late._ Partners supported by **Sound of Freedom Foundation** train hotel employees—men and women working in places like the motel I was taken to — to see what they were never taught to look for. **To notice what others miss.
****And to report it.** This is how **prevention becomes possible**. Because one informed employee and one brave phone call can save a life. **Here's the truth most people don’t know.** The majority of trafficking in America happens in hotels and motels. And it spikes around large sports events, conventions and concerts - anywhere demand increases. **There’s more you should know.**
---
* Human trafficking is the second-largest criminal enterprise in the world.
* **In the United States alone, 9 out of 10 missing children are trafficked.**
* If a child is not found within 48 hours, the risk of trafficking skyrockets.
* The average age of a trafficked child is 12 to 14 years old.

---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**These are children.** Not criminals.
Not “prostitutes.” **Children.** **I ask you urgently - please pray they'll be found.**
---
[ Help Save a Child ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**Sound of Freedom Foundation** partners don’t stop at rescue. They help care for survivors too. Across the country, partners host healing events and wellness weekends—safe places where survivors can rest, connect, and begin again. Survivors are offered opportunities to learn self-defense, engage in therapeutic art and movement, and build practical life skills. Sessions help survivors learn forgiveness, rebuild trust, form healthy relationships, and set strong boundaries. **How we care for survivors matters just as much as rescuing them.** You are hearing from me today because the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** helps make this work possible. And because children are worth fighting for. I want you to know this: **Your support is not abstract.
****It reaches motel rooms and f****rightened children - in moments****when seconds matter.** It reaches places I once stood— without help. **Today, by the grace of God, I am a survivor.** An advocate. And the author so others can recognize the signs sooner. **But my story is not the point.
****The children who are still trapped are.**
---
[ Help Save a Child ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Every outreach is a race against time.
Every trained volunteer is a shield. And **YOU** can be part of the rescue. Whether you give once or stand with the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** through steady, monthly support - your generosity saves lives - quietly, consistently and courageously. **YOU can help save children from harm.** **We would be deeply grateful.** **THANK YOU.** You are helping rewrite endings.
You are helping children believe freedom is possible.
---
For God's Children,
---
Theresa Flores
Freedom Fighter
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ **Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8325186/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAyMjI/LbmNsa05CU3ZLeQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNYTUFTckFHdFhwTVBscw/gaZtlmA/s4t7d7d3d79)

name: Jeff Phaneuf
subject: A seat at the table
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
A behind-the-scenes look at the work ahead.

| |
---
Hi there, It’s Jeff, Seth’s campaign manager. Running this campaign means making quick decisions based on what we’re seeing across Massachusetts. That work requires discipline and the ability to look ahead rather than only react to the next deadline. Our recurring supporters fuel our ability to run this campaign. And as such, we want to know what you think and get your feedback. We are opening a quarterly strategy session to our recurring supporters. These meetings will be a chance for me to walk through how we’re thinking about the race, what challenges we are facing, and where we’re putting our energy next. We will keep these sessions limited to people who support the campaign on a monthly basis. Recurring support helps us plan ahead and maintain focus on organizing and strategy rather than constant fundraising. It also ensures these conversations are with people who are invested in our campaign's long-term success. name: Team Mandela Barnes
subject: Look at our first attack ad:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
It’s clear why this is happening: they’re scared of our momentum.
| Friend, the Trump-endorsed GOP frontrunner has already started running attack ads against our campaign. Take a look for yourself: [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.oH05rx&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_022226_B1_Attack&t=2&akid=5864%2E196590%2Ek_tXHQ) **It’s clear why this is happening: they’re scared of our momentum.** The GOP has attacked Mandela from the first day he jumped into this race — because they know voters are hungry for change. For years, the Republican-dominated legislature here in Wisconsin has failed to solve the real issues people care about. That’s going to end this November when we win a Democratic trifecta. That looks like finally expanding Medicaid, giving our small business owners and farmers the economic tools they need to thrive, and ensuring our young people can stay in Wisconsin and earn a good paycheck. That’s the crux of Mandela’s bold vision for Wisconsin: delivering for working families. But right now, we are being massively outspent on the airwaves. We don’t take corporate PAC donations or cater to special interests, so we rely on grassroots donations to counter these attacks and reach voters more often than Tom Tiffany does. **[If you’re with Mandela, please consider chipping in $15 or $27 today to our campaign. We’ll need all hands on deck to combat these attack ads, and with your help, we’ll have the resources to do it →](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.oH05rx&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_022226_B1_Attack&t=3&akid=5864%2E196590%2Ek_tXHQ)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6683?amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_022226_B1_Attack&t=4&akid=5864%2E196590%2Ek_tXHQ)

# [AI's Brave New World](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=188748428&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg4NzQ4NDI4LCJpYXQiOjE3NzE3OTIzMDksImV4cCI6MTc3NDM4NDMwOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gfxxeoXZBLNFto6lOXICZglMn6MysC_Bt-ftGXc3r8A)
### How advancements in artificial intelligence will improve human lives in many domains.
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| Feb 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=188748428&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg4NzQ4NDI4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3MTc5MjMwOSwiZXhwIjoxNzc0Mzg0MzA5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iKnjp48Otmu4cskyUZqD1ld45ACjAXpHP4CZX8BNqMc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=188748428&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg4NzQ4NDI4LCJpYXQiOjE3NzE3OTIzMDksImV4cCI6MTc3NDM4NDMwOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gfxxeoXZBLNFto6lOXICZglMn6MysC_Bt-ftGXc3r8A&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=188748428&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg4NzQ4NDI4LCJpYXQiOjE3NzE3OTIzMDksImV4cCI6MTc3NDM4NDMwOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gfxxeoXZBLNFto6lOXICZglMn6MysC_Bt-ftGXc3r8A)
