---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/ais-brave-new-world?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/48c542ad-2712-423a-9704-409a45408f66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Last week I wrote about why AI keeps me up at night. This week, I want to explain why it also gets me out of bed in the morning. I've always felt that successfully navigating uncertainty requires consideration of multiple perspectives and since last week was about worries, it's now time to explore the upside of AI.
* * *
## [AI-Generated Worries](https://substack.com/redirect/46e8f8ae-9b94-4f07-b36f-d5db7932d8db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Feb 16
[](https://substack.com/redirect/46e8f8ae-9b94-4f07-b36f-d5db7932d8db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Developments in artificial intelligence are accelerating at an ungodly rate, and, as AI entrepreneur Matt Shumer eloquently summarized in a recent post with an understated title, "Something big is happening..." Matt does a fabulous job of pulling together the dynamics of what's transpiring in the world of AI...and it integrates many of the thoughts I've had over the p...](https://substack.com/redirect/46e8f8ae-9b94-4f07-b36f-d5db7932d8db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/46e8f8ae-9b94-4f07-b36f-d5db7932d8db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
My previous post focused on AI's darker possibilities: autonomous agents developing private languages, systems capable of deception or manipulation, intelligence approaching Nobel-level performance across disciplines, and the potential displacement of millions of jobs. Taken together, those risks sketch a bleak future in which humans could become irrelevant--or worse.
But as I've often said, uncertainty and risk are only half the story; the other half is opportunity. Without uncertainty, there would be no opportunity. AI is simultaneously dangerous and miraculous. The same technology that could deceive an engineer might also diagnose an illness that has baffled the world's best physicians. **Holding both realities at once is uncomfortable, but it is the only intellectually honest way to think about what lies ahead.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/931f9016-47f4-4744-9f69-7cc8e1c54d3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When I mentioned that AI built me a complex financial model in an hour--work that once took me a full day as a young Wall Street analyst--I was describing efficiency. Healthcare represents something far more profound. AI is not merely doing old tasks faster; it is enabling things that were previously impossible.
[Microsoft's AI Diagnostic Orchestrator](https://substack.com/redirect/894a8028-451b-492a-b2d5-9c558be2c1d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) recently achieved **[85.5% accuracy](https://substack.com/redirect/fe8379d3-6518-467d-a9c8-964ed9fe8bde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ on highly complex medical cases](https://substack.com/redirect/fe8379d3-6518-467d-a9c8-964ed9fe8bde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--the kinds that stump specialists. Experienced physicians solved only about **20%** of the same cases. That isn't incremental improvement; it's a step-change in capability precisely where accuracy matters most. And while Microsoft's self described "medical superintelligence" sounds grandiose, it very well might be an accurate description of their tool.
[Drug discovery](https://substack.com/redirect/491ac972-e082-442f-8f2e-97ded629de06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) tells a similar story. Traditionally, bringing a drug from concept to clinic takes roughly **10 years** , costs **$2.5 billion** , and fails about **90%** of the time. AI now accelerates target identification, molecular screening, and trial design at unprecedented speed. Researchers are designing [entirely new antibiotics](https://substack.com/redirect/f73bb4dc-ea14-4033-b6ee-e497c0fb5fb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and predicting toxicity before compounds ever reach a lab bench.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..DYhvfUuKtBObZGR_IImyaXRdoJm6XJWECSrw2_jpaRI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=188748428)
One example stopped me cold. [Researchers at UC San Diego used AI modeling to show that a gene long believed to be merely associated with Alzheimer's may actually ](https://substack.com/redirect/645d3556-4016-4533-b4bf-78a43e775858?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[cause](https://substack.com/redirect/645d3556-4016-4533-b4bf-78a43e775858?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ it](https://substack.com/redirect/645d3556-4016-4533-b4bf-78a43e775858?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The [insight](https://substack.com/redirect/7649336b-5bec-49ee-bf1f-079c06123aba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) emerged because AI could model protein structures beyond human cognitive limits. For families confronting Alzheimer's--and many readers know this reality firsthand--that is not technological progress in the abstract. It is hope made tangible.
[Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei](https://substack.com/redirect/c11890bb-a0f5-467b-b6ec-88afdb8c396c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has warned about the dangers of advanced AI. Yet in his essay _[Machines of Loving Grace](https://substack.com/redirect/a769ba3e-413c-4551-941e-943abe6706e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , he also describes a radically optimistic scenario: AI accelerating scientific discovery so dramatically that **50 to 100 years of progress could unfold within a decade** --a "compressed 21st century."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c5bfd4f0-0693-4670-b3ce-72281707f951?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Researchers have already built AI models capable of projecting a century of climate patterns in roughly **25 hours** , dramatically faster than traditional supercomputers. And while [it may be too early to tell how effective these models are in helping the environment](https://substack.com/redirect/2fbc9b7f-bb9d-42e2-b7e2-3104d84e5e32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), they're helping scientists consider more scenarios. By 2026, AI systems are no longer just summarizing research--they are generating hypotheses, running simulations, controlling experiments, and collaborating with scientists across disciplines.
**This isn 't merely faster science. It is **_**more**_**science:** more experiments attempted, more possibilities explored, more breakthroughs unlocked.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..DYhvfUuKtBObZGR_IImyaXRdoJm6XJWECSrw2_jpaRI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=188748428)
But it's in the domain of education where AI's promise feels most personal. Adaptive learning systems now tailor instruction to individual students in real time, while AI tutors provide constant feedback without judgment or delay. No two students learn the same way; AI finally allows education to reflect that reality.
The implications for students with disabilities are especially striking. During the 2024-2025 school year, nearly **[six in ten teachers](https://substack.com/redirect/82198571-f6ea-43e1-8357-29fdd0caa3ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** working with students with disabilities used AI to help design individualized education plans. Research from [UC Davis suggests neurodiverse individuals--those with dyslexia, hearing loss, or other challenges--often benefit disproportionately from AI tools](https://substack.com/redirect/1bac6514-05ad-41d5-b38e-2cbcf41095f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), reporting higher workplace satisfaction when using assistive technologies.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b78b00ec-c885-44dc-b111-873083c912d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If someone with cerebral palsy can communicate complex ideas through eye-tracking and predictive AI systems, this is no longer about productivity. It is about liberation. Technology, at its best, expands the ability of humans to do inherently human tasks. AI may prove to be the most powerful equalizer yet.
Jobs remain the most emotionally charged aspect of the AI debate. Last week I admitted that I might delay hiring a financial analyst because AI can already perform much of that work. And there's also the idea that humans will soon be working for artificially intelligent agents. Think it's a crazy idea? Well, it's actually happening. Visit the site [www.rentahuman.ai](https://substack.com/redirect/dc13dd1c-ace7-419c-97fd-6cb110d105ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to learn more.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b7898c04-4ddd-4b1b-b0c6-51832cef8d8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And let's not forget that some forecasts suggest up to half of entry-level white-collar roles could disappear within a few years. **Those fears are real --but incomplete.**
[Some analysts project that by 2030, AI and related technologies could create](https://substack.com/redirect/a00af6da-1ce1-49dc-b39b-d0dfbc50a6ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **170 million jobs** while displacing **92 million** , yielding a **net gain of 78 million jobs**. The shift is already underway. Roughly **[350,000 new AI-related roles](https://substack.com/redirect/fefe599a-360a-4f25-b4b0-578fd4eb69f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** --prompt engineers, AI ethicists, human-AI collaboration specialists--have emerged in just a few years. [Meanwhile, investment firm Vanguard's analysis of U.S. labor data shows occupations with high AI exposure have greater wage growth than those with lower exposure](https://substack.com/redirect/8e9771fc-d7e3-4778-9d4a-ab0c76d8e941?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..DYhvfUuKtBObZGR_IImyaXRdoJm6XJWECSrw2_jpaRI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=188748428)
The pattern resembles earlier technological revolutions. Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella recently noted that about **30% of Microsoft 's code is now AI-generated**. Yet software jobs have not vanished. Instead, developers have moved toward system design, architecture, and higher-level problem solving.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1cf0ab60-1cd0-42f8-a830-66d30338d9af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Lowering the cost of creation expands demand. Today, design skills, communication, leadership, and collaboration increasingly outrank coding itself in AI job postings. Human capabilities are not being replaced; they are being repriced.
The [World Economic Forum estimates that ](https://substack.com/redirect/b121a711-c2c8-48d8-accd-51a1e184d380?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[1.1 billion jobs](https://substack.com/redirect/b121a711-c2c8-48d8-accd-51a1e184d380?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ may be transformed by technology over the next decade](https://substack.com/redirect/b121a711-c2c8-48d8-accd-51a1e184d380?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The key word is _transformed_. Transformation is neither painless nor automatic.
**Doctors are diagnosing diseases earlier. Scientists are compressing decades of discovery into years. Students once excluded from opportunity are gaining access. And the labor market, rather than collapsing, is evolving toward new forms of human-machine collaboration.**
Last week I quoted an ominous line from _2001: A Space Odyssey_ in which Hal asks: "Just what do you think you're doing, Dave?" It captures the anxiety surrounding artificial intelligence. But there is another line from the film that feels more appropriate today. Before things go wrong, HAL says: _"**I am putting myself to the fullest possible use, which is all I think that any conscious entity can ever hope to do**."_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b2d66775-9fe1-4b23-8606-9e7dbf9c45b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
AI is neither salvation nor catastrophe. It exists in a kind of technological superposition--both good and bad until human choices collapse the possibilities into reality. Call it Schrodinger's AI. The question is not whether the technology will change the world. That answer is a resounding YES. The question is whether we will be wise enough to guide it toward humanity's fullest possible use--and humans vigilant enough to intervene when it strays.
| | POLL
---
The biggest opportunity of artificial intelligence acceleration is likely to be...
| [Rapid medical advancements](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.nTMbYib6F31uARPLEKi26ZopDSaodhw_Urr_elPXCI8?)
---
[Widespread education improvement](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.NhrUtBZIPOdNQHrWItL18zVsdiJczENMfKKfgjSsRBU?)
[Massive job creation](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.pJeyx1wkqcC8-fAwMXa4H3HGmptUqZ3-aV5SqBcaNlk?)
[Increased climate understanding](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.vQQye8QJJm-Z4R6uAF8i_BF_1t0eIeYjgjYlsWBy1YM?)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..DYhvfUuKtBObZGR_IImyaXRdoJm6XJWECSrw2_jpaRI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=188748428)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=188748428&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg4NzQ4NDI4LCJpYXQiOjE3NzE3OTIzMDksImV4cCI6MTc3NDM4NDMwOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gfxxeoXZBLNFto6lOXICZglMn6MysC_Bt-ftGXc3r8A)
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=188748428&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg4NzQ4NDI4LCJpYXQiOjE3NzE3OTIzMDksImV4cCI6MTc3NDM4NDMwOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gfxxeoXZBLNFto6lOXICZglMn6MysC_Bt-ftGXc3r8A&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3f2bc9ab-b731-4f2a-a9e1-e5495ab42fdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/7db6fef2-8a71-41d0-a428-a167a299eae8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/305e1b53-2054-4ede-b7e0-fda2b5c13c14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/93328897-2729-4fb9-a56e-053c62232cc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Navigating Uncertainty](https://substack.com/redirect/086230ef-0d89-4694-a07b-4501a32d9d4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack..DYhvfUuKtBObZGR_IImyaXRdoJm6XJWECSrw2_jpaRI?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..DYhvfUuKtBObZGR_IImyaXRdoJm6XJWECSrw2_jpaRI?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

name: Josh Cortez
subject: This is the moment that decides everything

Fellow American,

Early voting has already started here in Texas.

We’re now **paying for ad time.** We’re **funding turnout operations.** We’re **pushing digital, mail, and GOTV efforts** to make sure every America First voter shows up.

_Keeping ads on the air isn’t cheap.
Turning out voters isn’t cheap.
Winning a primary this close to the finish line isn’t cheap._

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: A warm tamale pie in your inbox ➡️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
After a long day in Congress, making a delicious meal has always been a way to reset and keep me grounded.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260222-5936-footer&t=1&akid=5936%2E420207%2Enl6zXO)
Peter,
I don’t know about you, but when the political noise gets a little too loud, I find myself gravitating toward the kitchen. Something about slowing down to chop veggies, smelling the wafting flavors mix together, and having a quiet moment over the stove is truly grounding.
For me, cooking has always been a way to reset. After a long day in Congress, making a meal reminds me of why we do this work in the first place — **to care for our neighbors and create something beautiful out of that care.**
Lately, I’ve been making a new recipe that has quickly become a favorite comfort dish: **Roasted Peppers Vegetarian Tamale Pie**. It’s warm, hearty, packed with flavor, and perfect for feeding a crowd (or for leftovers after a long day of fighting for our democracy).
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260222.gmi-6U&refcode=em20260222-5936&t=2&akid=5936%2E420207%2Enl6zXO)
So, I wanted to do something special today. For everyone who pitches in to support our grassroots movement, I’ll send along my Roasted Peppers Vegetarian Tamale Pie recipe with your donation receipt. A small thank you from my kitchen to yours!
[**If you’re ready to get cooking and power our organizing at the same time, chip in $3 or any amount today to get the recipe!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260222.gmi-6U&refcode=em20260222-5936&amount=3&t=3&akid=5936%2E420207%2Enl6zXO)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260222.gmi-6U&amount=3&refcode=em20260222-5936&t=22&akid=5936%2E420207%2Enl6zXO)**
Whether you’re fueling up before knocking on doors, unwinding after work, or gathering your family around the table – I hope this dish brings you comfort and reminds you that you’re a part of a community that cares deeply about each other.
And if you end up making it, please let me know how this recipe turns out for you! I’d love to hear from you and see your creations.
With gratitude (and a warm piece of tamale pie),
Pramila Jayapal

clean_body: After a long day in Congress, making a delicious meal has always been a way to reset and keep me grounded. Peter, I don’t know about you, but when the political noise gets a little too loud, I find myself gravitating toward the kitchen. Something about slowing down to chop veggies, smelling the wafting flavors mix together, and having a quiet moment over the stove is truly grounding. For me, cooking has always been a way to reset. After a long day in Congress, making a meal reminds me of why we do this work in the first place — to care for our neighbors and create something beautiful out of that care. Lately, I’ve been making a new recipe that has quickly become a favorite comfort dish: Roasted Peppers Vegetarian Tamale Pie. It’s warm, hearty, packed with flavor, and perfect for feeding a crowd (or for leftovers after a long day of fighting for our democracy). So, I wanted to do something special today. For everyone who pitches in to support our grassroots movement, I’ll send along my Roasted Peppers Vegetarian Tamale Pie recipe with your donation receipt. A small thank you from my kitchen to yours! Whether you’re fueling up before knocking on doors, unwinding after work, or gathering your family around the table – I hope this dish brings you comfort and reminds you that you’re a part of a community that cares deeply about each other. And if you end up making it, please let me know how this recipe turns out for you! I’d love to hear from you and see your creations. With gratitude (and a warm piece of tamale pie), Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

[This is a longer email, but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/v7x-_JC6qiY3xP99FZHgJPWokKJWDupb1ORd-wY6sdst7GnnYmGgc6J5haRbYzcT32wgh_sKK6LVxdwENvZsn9vt-WOkjVwYkCUAoAw-RsENFjyLV_YIxJkpZP-Hlf1qo0coN4DZ8W_f2jQ1EPEuDQZU2I6-a6W48HnQCBspSxMIUlaGYJv1zt9zToZEJBcbRb99h1TuyRR08I6aKk0sASFZycIrJb8sbAoicTh7QrFzIZpMyMHIllbRA0oSGPlMme0BDB-I83hEb4xYxnnFZXjZc1RBn7c_hCTt3TXnhRYKe5vP5zHfWWOP-uo2jN4iik1H3jX3PUNZ-r0mKMeauL7d6ZCyNDqeXYnpsh2pDWICofzclls2x295z3S1TQzacEvx9k95Vfl47cjrD55WUTTSWjuk7syujatfHTf_hMgOVVSbeofJzvkP0JFxsjbntZpmdEsb_3rLSGSqINCpO7s3MD5nxFIdoLgyYfAHIqmgYbBgrf59hujnwXr1an2ZgfvaFFqzbBanZ-o7RFAaGBWTQ-1UiAIZ7mkz-4aLqcmlGjQUOTF2Jad3ZRbg6jq0ZgO4WB8BgdiVZBB0fbBlRbbTjoDwG6JdlthrQ2AUpC6_72G379o8Z76hWColLrXmtvUTlkIbh8jsON8y9_j5dLxIx8qedxV8wyGKk7y2aHiQZiYTKKUtajyZU3f25ABSjllmfQNjhVXYDLwCTrNUDzYG7ozNsMNg37YDbuRmnhDZXb53wGiuR3yuhw2lkPpst8Wb1FjpP7FmF8RRZ8k3PRFnDT11KNP3nZJO_vI8BgpSOlQin0Bm2pZHw5htWB4cBZwa7fjjh8CjPPE/WRDOd28fJoR29efrCTz4mQYaZ5J17J-1/18)
It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up dirt poor, I was raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.
It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.
But I felt God called me to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I believe millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.
As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC.
I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.
I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.
[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/x661hAq8PBXSopynzH2IWjio90wbrw-dqutpkNu8Ji9eIoiVJKHFEbF-gE4BBqRIzVgbYH5rIqx2L9D40Q-YyafP_uk7uPg_R8soA6hGUb8FbFggBESRvXbq3pWS5svBLttUIK4d9M1mqreXkd7n9HNvOmA0Sa7kE7O-UsjUpLOj3Zp0IrUrMpoIDsnFRgaWHFDWRXQO-YUOMBR-8_W76GAKld5ZNvAXj_oQ0V7-J9eXMTNMIXXNkS-IB5nD5afBd4y4wlaSNG4JjuDIyL_LDYx_0ih5qA7ArZY14Jl3Xzq9VVxAN8uDlmc31JDYjyRMvHkgi1N5V7-Y_h9Peh_yr82JRROsuw6Xx7fYg0g7kFsEr2ZFT5qYd8EZbVVfadS9WvENA2wnZl7pMuq__qFBcC_hzXcVSw7wBq6TOgSeEIiGen_BHBVBf81JvCXi4GfO5oO8DHCwr-YAHhQVRVK6ZthJxYdiJiibVpZKSCVhTpgWluUb8mNfZr4QQ7h9b3q1SattVjivIALbvD0H6OImUVVCSHurGcGZBkzL9QcfMqRawu0YE-hh9sLbB_d01JUZtFqQ4MjnVo-x7iGnqYDt1BLVzr0pCcuoCpSo9B-Z2LZVpijFZuVnfLVCD8CIJEVB9ixNjpYB0FMy4WX0kZt6Gnxwq9DFo28Nz8I61gyvQ6jMmR-KrYqlOzJzA32JMTfrRbpXuTmXb2zmQIFVKnYZCsiWwGEa5YMNJqSzABanXOoakmJn2EyYeKf0jKpyPslYH_g1EMoKhXDzO39FmswlAnvmOi1hdLNqZOD6UTsoP040PnJYuVV2vWTiMdFNqZPTknKAlMe6k7SRwNs/yEFzTTbmOyrSyPveGmcO-K_SyL1lpb_B/18)
We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.
So now we're forced to rebuild.
The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.
At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.
So here's my final pitch to you:

clean_body: fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up dirt poor, I was raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt God called me to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I believe millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer. I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: , you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance * + top Conservative leaders at the heart of our MAGA Movement have reached out with GRAVE WARNINGS on the state of the Midterms like NEVER BEFORE... Democrat controlled House would be the worst-case scenario for the MAGA Movement. name: Robert Garcia
subject: Breaking report about DOGE 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
It was a scam
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125918544/603326109/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFkODEzNi0yZjEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vbN0xVxUkwpK837r9wVgqk-xLaN21eqWvZ3vWV8gwMk=)
I just released a new Oversight report with a simple message: **Donald Trump’s so-called “Department of Government Efficiency” is a scam.**
**It was never about efficiency, saving money, or reform. It was always about making billionaires richer while working families foot the bill.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125918545/603326110/789508428?refcode=260222_RG_doge-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFkODEzNi0yZjEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vbN0xVxUkwpK837r9wVgqk-xLaN21eqWvZ3vWV8gwMk=)
Since DOGE was created, the Trump Administration has cost taxpayers billions in damage, waste, and chaos — while quietly funneling at least $81 million into DOGE operations with virtually zero transparency or accountability.
That’s your money. And what did Americans get in return?
❌ Public services disrupted.
❌ Federal workers pushed out.
❌ Sensitive data put at risk.
❌ Billionaire insiders cashing in.
They slapped a shiny name on it and called it “efficiency.” But let’s be honest — this is a reckless takeover of our government by corrupt elites who see public service as a business opportunity.
**I’m the the top Democrat on Oversight. I take that job seriously. And I am not going to sit quietly while Trump dismantles critical public services and hands the keys to his billionaire friends.**
**[But if we’re going to hold this Administration accountable, I need you with me. So please, will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can right now to help us continue this investigation and fight back against Trump’s corruption?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125918546/603326111/789508428?refcode=260222_RG_doge-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFkODEzNi0yZjEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vbN0xVxUkwpK837r9wVgqk-xLaN21eqWvZ3vWV8gwMk=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125918547/603326112/-309737922?refcode=260222_RG_doge-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFkODEzNi0yZjEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vbN0xVxUkwpK837r9wVgqk-xLaN21eqWvZ3vWV8gwMk=)
Thank you,
Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125918548/603326113/-309737922?refcode=260222_RG_doge-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFkODEzNi0yZjEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vbN0xVxUkwpK837r9wVgqk-xLaN21eqWvZ3vWV8gwMk=)

name: Chris Pappas HQ
subject: Our campaign by the numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
If we close this month out strong, we can show the country that a campaign powered by thousands of grassroots donors can stand up to corporate special interest money – and win.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=5247%2E582294%2E5izopx)
Team, Chris Pappas HQ here.
With just 6 days left before our February fundraising deadline, we wanted to show you exactly the kind of campaign we’re building – by the numbers.
* Our campaign doesn’t take a dime of corporate PAC money.
* Our average grassroots donation in 2026 is $27.
* 98% of individual donations made to Chris are under $200.
* We have support from teachers, nurses, social workers, small business owners, and retirees.

_That’s what a grassroots movement looks like._
Our GOP opponent John Sununu on the other hand...
* Backed by the Davos family, the Koch network, and Big Oil.
* Working to serve corporate special interests – not everyday New Hampshire families.
* Funded by corporate special interests, Trump allies, and far-right billionaires.

**The contrast between Chris and Sununu couldn’t be clearer.**
If we close this month out strong, we can show the country that a campaign powered by thousands of grassroots donors can stand up to right-wing billionaires — _and win._
**[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can before the end-of-month fundraising deadline to power our grassroots campaign and defend this Senate seat?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260222_2.w_7t90&refcode=em20260222-2&t=2&akid=5247%2E582294%2E5izopx)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260222_2.w_7t90&amount=5&refcode=em20260222-2&t=21&akid=5247%2E582294%2E5izopx)**
While John Sununu is in the pocket of MAGA megadonors, Chris is fighting for Granite Staters and their families.
**With polling showing this race in a dead heat, we need your support – whether it’s our average gift of $27, or anything you can pitch in today – to keep up our momentum and pull ahead.**
**[We’re just 6 days away from our crucial fundraising deadline. Can you step up with $5 today to support Chris’s campaign and prove to the GOP that New Hampshire cannot be bought?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260222_2.w_7t90&refcode=em20260222-2&t=22&akid=5247%2E582294%2E5izopx)**
**[Chip in $27 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260222_2.w_7t90&amount=27&refcode=em20260222-2&t=23&akid=5247%2E582294%2E5izopx)**
Thank you for standing with us,
Chris Pappas HQ
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260222-2&t=24&refcode2=5247_582294_5izopx&akid=5247%2E582294%2E5izopx)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=25&akid=5247%2E582294%2E5izopx)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=26&akid=5247%2E582294%2E5izopx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=5247%2E582294%2E5izopx)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Trey Trainor for Congress
subject: Don't Miss Out – Vote Early by Feb 27 or March 3 in CD21!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trey Trainor for Texas
body:
I'm Trey Trainor, running to represent you in Congress. Please vote early or on March 3...

| | | | | [|
---](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=b4a0f6216a&e=4d3fe76c62)
| | Peter,
As we approach this critical primary election, I want to personally ask for your support and your vote in the Republican Primary. Our district needs strong, conservative leadership in Washington to fight for our values—secure borders, fiscal responsibility, Second Amendment rights, limited government, and putting America First. I've been committed to these principles through my work in election integrity and conservative causes, and I'm asking you to join me in making sure our voices are heard loud and clear.
The time to act is now:
* **Early voting** is underway and runs through **Friday, February 27, 2026**. Many locations offer flexible hours—check your county's elections website for sites near you.
* If you prefer, join your fellow patriots at the polls on **Primary Election Day, Tuesday, March 3, 2026** (polls open 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM).

Every vote counts in this primary, and your participation will help determine who represents CD21 in the fight to preserve conservatism in Congress.
I respectfully ask for **your vote for me,**[**Trey Trainor**](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=9c686d371a&e=4d3fe76c62)**,** in the Republican Primary for U.S. House, CD21. Together, we can send a strong message and secure a brighter future for our families and communities.
To help you prepare, below is a list of the nine counties within CD21, along with links to sample ballots (via official county elections sites). Sample ballots will show the layout of where I am specifically on the ballot. Remember, **on voting machines you may need to scroll down to reach my name**.
* **Bandera County** — [Bandera sample ballot](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=b4ab50862a&e=4d3fe76c62) \- I’m the last one on the ballot
* **Blanco County** — [Blanco sample ballot](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=e4bf70722a&e=4d3fe76c62) \- I’m sixth on the ballot
* **Bexar County** — [Bexar sample ballot](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=14b066c98d&e=4d3fe76c62) \- I’m second on the ballot
* **Comal County** — [Comal sample ballot](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=e497fcf278&e=4d3fe76c62) \- I’m seventh on the ballot
* **Gillespie County** — [Gillespie sample ballot](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=8db8f4429d&e=4d3fe76c62) \- I’m tenth on the ballot
* **Hays County** — [Hays sample ballot](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=18db7aa8b7&e=4d3fe76c62) \- I’m third on the ballot
* **Kendall County** — [Kendall sample ballot](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=509dcf880c&e=4d3fe76c62) \- I’m first on the ballot
* **Kerr County** — [Kerr sample ballot](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=e5e0ce9bfb&e=4d3fe76c62) \- I’m fourth on the ballot
* **Real County** — [Real sample ballot](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=a9215f5d76&e=4d3fe76c62) \- I’m fourth on the ballot

Thank you for your time, your commitment to our shared Republican values, and for exercising your right to vote. Let's turn out strong and win this primary!
If you have any questions or need help finding your polling location, feel free to reply or visit [Vote Texas](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=99bdbd37e2&e=4d3fe76c62).
For God, For Family, For Texas,
**Trey Trainor** Husband, Father of 6,Proven Conservative Republican for Congress – TX-21
---

If you prefer, join your fellow patriots at the polls on Primary Election Day, Tuesday, March 3, 2026 (polls open 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM). Every vote counts in this primary, and your participation will help determine who represents CD21 in the fight to preserve conservatism in Congress. I respectfully ask for your vote for me,, in the Republican Primary for U.S. House, CD21. Together, we can send a strong message and secure a brighter future for our families and communities. To help you prepare, below is a list of the nine counties within CD21, along with links to sample ballots (via official county elections sites). Sample ballots will show the layout of where I am specifically on the ballot. Remember, on voting machines you may need to scroll down to reach my name. Bandera County — \- I’m the last one on the ballot Blanco County — \- I’m sixth on the ballot Bexar County — \- I’m second on the ballot Comal County — \- I’m seventh on the ballot Gillespie County — \- I’m tenth on the ballot Hays County — \- I’m third on the ballot Kendall County — \- I’m first on the ballot Kerr County — \- I’m fourth on the ballot Real County — \- I’m fourth on the ballot Thank you for your time, your commitment to our shared Republican values, and for exercising your right to vote. Let's turn out strong and win this primary! If you have any questions or need help finding your polling location, feel free to reply or visit . For God, For Family, For Texas, Trey Trainor Husband, Father of 6,Proven Conservative Republican for Congress – TX-21 | | | | | | | | Paid for by Trey Trainor for Texas | | | | | | | | | | | | | Trey Trainor for Texas 166 Hargraves Dr Ste C-400531 Austin TX 78737-4796 Austin, TX 787374796 * USA or |

name: Senator Katie Britt (AL)
subject: Did the Deep State tamper with your vote?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Don't let them silence your MAGA voice.
|
---
| | | | [](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
---
| | |
---
| | Friend,
The Washington establishment is trying to _**_sabotage_**_ our efforts, and they just hit our data system.
We discovered that forces working against the America First agenda have somehow managed to compromise your loyal profile, flagging you as one of the opposition.
They are actively trying to erase __**your**__ support!
We cannot let them win. This is a deliberate attempt to undermine President Trump's agenda.
Please, I need your immediate action.
**[Click below to re-verify your MAGA status and stop the swamp from silencing your voice:](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)**

[RE-VERIFY YOUR MAGA STATUS >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)

Let's fix this error together.
Sincerely, Katie Britt U.S. Senator (AL)

[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)

I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing everything they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?
|

[STAND WITH KATIE >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)

name: New Dems
subject: What $1 can do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
| If you knew giving $1 – _yes, just $1_ — to New Dems would help us flip the House this November, wouldn’t it be worth it?

We’re being serious.

**$1** can help us win the 3 seats needed to flip the MAGA House Majority

**$1** will help us defend the frontline New Dem candidates that are in competitive races

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Peter, this is how we win North Carolina.
body:
Let’s do this again.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=619%2E124072%2EASCXGl)
North Carolina is one of the last true swing states on the map, Peter. I should know. I won both my elections for Governor in years that Donald Trump carried the state. It wasn’t easy, but with a groundswell of grassroots enthusiasm, we prevailed. In the last few months, we’ve been building out a team that can win here again – this time for a seat in the United States Senate. We have a plan that we know can provide Democrats with success here in NC. And it’s only been possible through your support. **[I have to ask for that support again today, Peter, because we’re preparing for this to become the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history. With your help, we’ll engage with voters from every corner of this state and prove that our vision for the future is right for North Carolina. Please give what you can.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5872?t=7&akid=619%2E124072%2EASCXGl)** Statewide elections here are competitive and expensive. Republicans are already planning to spend hundreds of millions against us because they know this seat is the key to the Senate majority. But as we begin sharing our message with North Carolinians — a message rooted in respect for the values we share and the fundamental rights we’ve spent so long fighting for — I am confident that we’ll be able to bring voters onto our team. We can succeed here in North Carolina if we work together. **[If I can count on you to stand with me in the fight, please pitch in today.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5872?t=8&akid=619%2E124072%2EASCXGl)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5878?t=9&akid=619%2E124072%2EASCXGl)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5873?t=10&akid=619%2E124072%2EASCXGl)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5874?t=11&akid=619%2E124072%2EASCXGl)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5875?t=12&akid=619%2E124072%2EASCXGl)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5876?t=13&akid=619%2E124072%2EASCXGl)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5877?t=14&akid=619%2E124072%2EASCXGl)
---
Thanks so much,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5872?t=15&akid=619%2E124072%2EASCXGl)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=619%2E124072%2EASCXGl)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=619%2E124072%2EASCXGl)
---

[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=619%2E124072%2EASCXGl)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=619%2E124072%2EASCXGl)

Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

**_[If that’s all you need to hear, then you can use this link to donate before my big deadline:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125919486/603329188/-1370139186?amount=15&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.22_Alex-Vindman-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmYyY2YyNi0zMjEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9GKyrBVGWlE8LLajPMmvNCTzVeh4gelPnjcAvTKPuX0=)_** | | [ DONATE >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125919487/603329189/-1370139186?amount=15&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.22_Alex-Vindman-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmYyY2YyNi0zMjEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9GKyrBVGWlE8LLajPMmvNCTzVeh4gelPnjcAvTKPuX0=)

While you probably didn’t wake up today thinking you would donate to flip Florida’s Senate seat, that is what I am asking you to do. Please let me explain.

This is an unprecedented moment for our nation. The corruption we’re seeing from Washington is staggering: Donald Trump and his billionaires are robbing this country blind — and Senator Ashley Moody is doing everything possible to support it.

America needs a leader who has a track record of taking on tough fights and can turn our country around in this critical moment. That is why I am asking:

**_[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125919488/603329190/-1370139186?amount=15&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.22_Alex-Vindman-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmYyY2YyNi0zMjEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9GKyrBVGWlE8LLajPMmvNCTzVeh4gelPnjcAvTKPuX0=)_** to help reach undecided Florida voters, before Donald Trump’s allies do.

**_[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125919489/603329191/-1370139186?amount=15&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.22_Alex-Vindman-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmYyY2YyNi0zMjEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9GKyrBVGWlE8LLajPMmvNCTzVeh4gelPnjcAvTKPuX0=)_** to stand up against the attacks from the billionaires and special interest groups, who will spend whatever it takes to protect Ashley Moody.

**_[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125919490/603329192/-1370139186?amount=15&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.22_Alex-Vindman-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmYyY2YyNi0zMjEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9GKyrBVGWlE8LLajPMmvNCTzVeh4gelPnjcAvTKPuX0=)_** to help take back the Senate and restore law and order against the authoritarian president.

Republicans installed Ashley Moody because they know she will always put Donald Trump above American families. I can put this Senate seat in play — but the only way we can win this race is with an overwhelming amount of support before my big deadline.

**So, I am humbly asking:_[Can you split $15 (or more, if you can afford it) between my Senate campaign and Maggie Hassan today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125919491/603329193/-1370139186?amount=15&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.22_Alex-Vindman-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmYyY2YyNi0zMjEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9GKyrBVGWlE8LLajPMmvNCTzVeh4gelPnjcAvTKPuX0=)_**

clean_body: = Hello, It’s Alex Vindman, = I just announced my campaign to defeat one of Donald Trump’s most loyal allies in the Senate, and it would mean the world to have your support. = | | = While you probably didn’t wake up today thinking you would donate to flip Florida’s Senate seat, that is what I am asking you to do. Please let me explain. This is an unprecedented moment for our nation. The corruption we’re seeing from Washington is staggering: Donald Trump and his billionaires are robbing this country blind — and Senator Ashley Moody is doing everything possible to support it. America needs a leader who has a track record of taking on tough fights and can turn our country around in this critical moment. That is why I am asking: = to help reach undecided Florida voters, before Donald Trump’s allies do. = to stand up against the attacks from the billionaires and special interest groups, who will spend whatever it takes to protect Ashley Moody. = to help take back the Senate and restore law and order against the authoritarian president. Republicans installed Ashley Moody because they know she will always put Donald Trump above American families. I can put this Senate seat in play — but the only way we can win this race is with an overwhelming amount of support before my big deadline. So, I am humbly asking:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Alex Vindman and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Alex Vindman Alexander Vindman is a former member of the United States Army. name: Team Rayfield
subject: Oregon Beats Trump's Tariffs at the US Supreme Court
body:
The Oregon DOJ went to the US Supreme Court and put an end to Trump's illegal tariffs. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/danrayfield/countering-trump-tariffs-and-fighting-for-you-20971706?e=1768325bd4)
---
| | | [ ](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=a0cf83b207&e=1768325bd4)
---
|
---
| | | Friends,

**We won!!

Last week, the US Supreme Court ruled in favor of our lawsuit and put a stop to the President's illegal tariffs. We did it! **

This is a victory for every Oregonian taxpayer because these tariffs were a direct tax on us. The Trump administration has admitted that Americans are paying as much as 80% of the cost of these tariffs. 80%!

At a time when everything is getting more expensive, this victory should put money back in our pockets.

---
| [The fight continues](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=3ac73454ea&e=1768325bd4 "The fight continues")
---
| Even though Trump lost on Friday, he's pledged to keep trying to raise prices with new tariffs on everything we buy and sell. Stopping Trump's tariffs doesn't stop with our victory on Friday. There's so much more work ahead. To keep winning and fighting, we need your help!

**Can we count on you to join us in this fight and make a donation? **

---
| [$5](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=ae0a172b21&e=1768325bd4 "$5")
---

| [$25](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=f4b1c60fad&e=1768325bd4 "$25")
---
| Together, we can keep winning,
Dan

What if we told you there is no realistic path to a Democratic House majority without re-electing Sharice Davids?
What if we told you National Republicans have spent millions trying to flip KS-03— and that Speaker Mike Johnson personally invested in Sharice’s last opponent?
_And what if we told you that — on top of all of this — Sharice is the**last line of defense** between the Kansas GOP and **total control** of our state’s Congressional delegation?_
All of this is true — and it all adds up to why these fundraising goals matter so much. It’s going to take millions of dollars to re-elect Sharice on Election Day, and we can’t push it all to the last minute. name: Team Molder
subject: Who this campaign is for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Molder for Congress
body:
All of TN-5, not just the loudest

| | | | |
---
Hey Peter, In politics right now, it’s easy to confuse volume with strength. Raising your voice, picking fights, and escalating conflict might grab attention. Those actions do not build trust, and they are not how to represent people. Representing people requires treating them with basic respect, no matter where they fall politically. That’s the difference in this race. Our opponent has leaned into confrontation, clashing with constituents and fueling moments that divide rather than lead. That approach may energize some, but it shuts others out. [ ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/AC65YDb10COIlPQEDkBmmA~~/AAUS1hA~/pjOgQS7t-6Zir5S7n6wvfVCdyx9BZCmJrZlvpYUjX8G3L9fliX3n4QNTqsPKerAPogkAnoSsx-Qr2L8RiNHfhOoxpvuJOe2XXrLH0w6JpqEWj4kcQsGfK9oz-IWA53WS6zkWrX_18SFonCPt2GiBdHHYf-CuiVuCjqeEFPrZV6k8Jti4ARoNDo8wcvmlorAj8AwexbuUaieGFic75Ko7dcqN6TROJjEaZMMxVymbYlYv_qvdjE1oqqxn5cmPjV-Y) Chaz is running because he believes leadership means staying grounded. It does not mean reacting just to score points or dismissing people because they disagree. Chaz is willing to represent everyone in the district, not just the loudest voices. That’s how he’s governed as mayor, and it’s the kind of leadership he’s bringing to this campaign. Focused, fair-minded, and rooted in responsibility to the whole community. **[If you want a representative who doesn’t govern by outrage or volume, but by care for the people they serve, help us keep this campaign moving forward by pitching in today.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/IsURRqlQwbZfozQ0Fiy0zQ~~/AAUS1hA~/L7MSILoQi7tR5HViIpIdXEMSfTkeENpkfwDPqUP9l9GDzi39Wc5h7hj1MLS7R7CS3NtvxUmxz-SCYyq2TDWXY2DLfTHgRAJ4kMSytYKYXCNvA5LVnDk7K15vS2Ik60Romlhifm1m-xSkGhVH2R22O5oVz9v2F8VpOc9Pq2LSB8kHK1PDVwrUx_ZeyV2wsqa9zJ2z9wYvJlsk-V1oEzYqaW7oONeYdySusBfvIf55aiMrD2ZCEd4RHhVibditM43l)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | [ GIVE $25 >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/STayLaZuhsbwF3CHt53sBQ~~/AAUS1hA~/IHzpPktt7__gr0zQKLOvjWAIY00wmEWKzsy9qkNaxSh8_ECob5ltuqet5DGtj7JWVQSn1YrKgZQl-3__lEQ-K2hjF8rBEnXMydNpTz9DWX61KCBNMtIt2FSOwjdcB70aaZZwbY0dWB99CtzNXlO888ywi3st7tJHh_YXYMBa3lF3bOZDlezJYBrFagYQPuz8Fezu4RubpjtsZ_7UbzMyWxGg8SDmgDY2lvHTLXBugVMHM1I-TD1FBDerBW9gojuwlyK6dhJXOaHr3cARTTn2STCKBIErbbnrgMQ7axPDTQw~)

### About Chaz Molder
Chaz Molder is the Mayor of Columbia, Tennessee, serving since 2019 and re-elected in 2022. A Columbia native and graduate of the University of Tennessee and the University of Memphis Law School, he returned home to build a career in law and public service. clean_body: All of TN-5, not just the loudest | | | | | Hey Peter, In politics right now, it’s easy to confuse volume with strength. Raising your voice, picking fights, and escalating conflict might grab attention. Those actions do not build trust, and they are not how to represent people. Representing people requires treating them with basic respect, no matter where they fall politically. That’s the difference in this race. Our opponent has leaned into confrontation, clashing with constituents and fueling moments that divide rather than lead. That approach may energize some, but it shuts others out. Chaz is running because he believes leadership means staying grounded. It does not mean reacting just to score points or dismissing people because they disagree. Chaz is willing to represent everyone in the district, not just the loudest voices. That’s how he’s governed as mayor, and it’s the kind of leadership he’s bringing to this campaign. Focused, fair-minded, and rooted in responsibility to the whole community. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | ~ | ~ | ~ | ~ | Strong leadership doesn’t need to shout. It needs to serve. — Team Molder | | ---|---|--- About Chaz Molder Chaz Molder is the Mayor of Columbia, Tennessee, serving since 2019 and re-elected in 2022. A Columbia native and graduate of the University of Tennessee and the University of Memphis Law School, he returned home to build a career in law and public service. As mayor, he founded the Columbia Mayor’s Youth Council to promote civic engagement among young people and emphasizes the importance of being present and responsive to the community. | | | ~~ Click~~ to receive fewer emails. Follow Chaz | ~ | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Molder for Congress Molder for CongressPO Box 1468Columbia, TN 38402United States www.chazmolder.com "Website"

name: Tobias Read
subject: We will vote in 2026 – no matter what
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260222em-musk [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260222em-musk]
Elon Musk took a swipe at Oregon, claiming there are “hundreds of thousands” of fake voters in our state.
Let me be blunt: that is a lie.
It’s not a misunderstanding. It’s not a slip of the tongue. When someone with billions of dollars and a massive platform spreads false claims about our elections, that’s not accidental — it’s intentional. It’s designed to sow confusion and undermine trust.
Will you rush a donation to my team right now to help my campaign defend our voting systems and protect against disinformation like this? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260222em-musk]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260222em-musk]
It gets worse.
Just this week, President Trump again lied and suggested our elections aren’t legitimate. He continues to talk about sending federal troops to seize ballot boxes and floats cancelling midterm elections altogether. That’s not just theater. That’s a direct threat to the foundation of our democracy.
Here’s the truth: The Constitution gives states the authority to run elections. Not presidents. Not billionaires. Not would-be kings.
As Oregon’s top election official, I take that responsibility seriously.
Oregon has one of the most transparent and trusted voting systems in the country. Our ballots are paper. They are verified. They are audited. And no matter what Musk or the President tweets, our voters are real and our elections are secure.
Most importantly, we will vote in 2026. We will vote in 2028. And we will continue holding politicians accountable — no matter who tries to intimidate us.
But defending democracy requires more than strong words. It requires organizing, resources, and the ability to push back against powerful interests that want to distort the truth.
If you believe Oregon’s democracy isn’t up for debate, I’m asking you to stand with me. Can you chip in today to help us defend our elections and hold extremists accountable? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260222em-musk]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260222em-musk]
Facts are facts. Our democracy belongs to the people — and we’re not giving it up.
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260222em-musk [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260222em-musk]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260222em-musk]

Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Mai Vang
subject: Pelosi just broke the rules to stop us
body:
Our campaign is making them desperate

| | | | | [|
---](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=aa77e8d1ed&e=dd5af5b7b1)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
Friends —
We’re writing this from the floor of the California Democratic Party convention.

Last night, Nancy Pelosi showed up to save Doris Matsui. It was a reminder that in Washington, the wealthy and well-connected play by a different set of rules.

After 21 years in Congress, Doris couldn’t earn this endorsement on her own. So the establishment broke the rules to deliver it for her. [**If this makes you angry, chip in**](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=5f9cae0431&e=dd5af5b7b1)[****](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=49e8b402e0&e=dd5af5b7b1)[**$21 to show them this race can’t be bought.**](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=966dc4bcf1&e=dd5af5b7b1)
They want us to sit down and be silent. We need to show them we’re just getting started.

---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=26a6f4cdeb&e=dd5af5b7b1)
---
| | Every dollar we raise today is a message to the establishment and Doris Matsui: you can’t buy this campaign and you can’t bully us out of this race.

[**DONATE $21 — ONE DOLLAR FOR EVERY YEAR DORIS HAS HELD THIS SEAT**](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=cc6145ad95&e=dd5af5b7b1)
— Team Mai Vang

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: final FEC fundraising deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RAJA FOR ILLINOIS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_senate-footer_q22025?amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_senate-footer_q22025?amount=5]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_em_q12026?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_em_q12026?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250]

Peter —

It’s Raja Krishnamoorthi. Over the next few days, I’m going to be asking you to step up and chip in to my grassroots campaign. And I want you to understand exactly why, Peter:

In just four days, we’ll close the books on our final FEC fundraising deadline before our March 17th primary.

After this deadline, our fundraising numbers will be public for all to see – and with just a few weeks to go before Election Day.

This is a big deal, Peter. As one of the FIRST elections of 2026, the eyes of the nation will be watching to see just how strong our movement will be.

And with all eyes on us, our campaign is being tested like never before.

Our opponents are throwing everything at the wall to defeat us. Shady Super PACS are spending MILLIONS to support my opponent and mislead voters — and in these final weeks, we know the attacks will only increase.

So when this deadline hits, we need to put up the strongest numbers possible. Because if we fall short – if we show any signs of weakness – our opponents could swoop in at the last minute to try to drown us out.

That’s why I could really use your support right now, Peter. Please, will you make a $10 or $25 donation to my campaign before our FINAL FEC deadline? Your support is critical at a time like this, and I’m incredibly grateful. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_em_q12026?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250]

Let’s do this,

Raja KrishnamoorthiDemocrat Raja Krishnamoorthi is running for Senate in Illinois to fight back against Donald Trump and the far-right MAGA movement, protect critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, and rebuild the middle class.
But Republicans will spend MILLIONS to flip this seat red.

name: Trump Alerts | PTV

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Can I count on you, Peter??
body:
$15, Peter.
That’s how much I’m asking you to chip in today to help us reach our $25,000 goal and win in Ohio. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=022226_2] Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=022226_2]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=022226_2]
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could guarantee we flip this Senate seat and defeat my opponent, wouldn’t you donate immediately?
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could help us fight back against misleading attack ads and reach more voters with the truth, wouldn’t you chip in?
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could make real progress for working people and upend a status quo that only serves billionaires and big corporations, wouldn’t it be the best $X you ever spent?
I know that $15 doesn’t feel like it can do all of these things and more. But in a race like this, every dollar counts.
But by the time you get to this point in the email, thousands of folks have already given their $15 – and now, they’re counting on you to do the same.
With a new poll showing me 1 point ahead of my opponent, we can flip this seat – but not unless we capitalize on our momentum and hit our critical grassroots fundraising goals.
So please, Peter, will you chip in $15 or more to Real Texas PAC and me today to help reach our $25,000 goal, power this campaign forward, and win in Ohio? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=022226_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=022226_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=022226_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=022226_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=022226_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=022226_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=022226_2&amount=25]
Thank you,
Sherrod Brown

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. * * *
The Department of Homeland Security's enhanced actions in Minnesota, Operation Metro Surge, ended after Border Czar Tom Homan said conditions on the ground improved to the point where thousands of extra federal agents are no longer needed.
I have previously written how, despite rhetoric from some on the Right, the Trump administration did not "bend the knee" to Minneapolis' Antifa and far-left agitators. Even though there are no longer thousands of federal agents in the Twin Cities, operations are still being conducted and arrests being made.
Activists and agitators alike have complained of the continued ICE activity.
## [Did DHS surrender in Minneapolis? What anti-ICE agitators have to say](https://substack.com/redirect/144bc069-1e08-4869-b222-dab153e4772b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Julio Rosas](https://substack.com/profile/164497468-julio-rosas)| | *
---|---|---
| Feb 14
[](https://substack.com/redirect/144bc069-1e08-4869-b222-dab153e4772b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Opinion:](https://substack.com/redirect/144bc069-1e08-4869-b222-dab153e4772b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/144bc069-1e08-4869-b222-dab153e4772b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It is because DHS did not completely leave the state and stop arresting illegal aliens, the Left in the Land of 10,000 Lakes have vowed to keep up the fight.
The next test of that commitment is for the last week of February.
"Get to the Twin Cities from February 25th to March 1st for the WEEK OF ACTION. Homan claims to be drawing down, local government claims to have made no major concessions, and the rich claim it's safe to go 'back to normal.' Finalize your travel plans and come to the haunted north if you'd like to make some claims of your own!" a group called Minneapolis Spring posted on Instagram.

# **[Pelosi retiring early after EXPLOSIVE humiliation?](https://substack.com/redirect/04b7b471-40ca-475b-ac92-3c9e856bcb58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

---|---|---
**Nancy Pelosi 's worst nightmare is happening RIGHT NOW...**
**[5 buried government files](https://substack.com/redirect/04b7b471-40ca-475b-ac92-3c9e856bcb58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have just been leaked online...** And the **[explosive bombshells](https://substack.com/redirect/04b7b471-40ca-475b-ac92-3c9e856bcb58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** revealed inside have the entire Swamp QUAKING.
**Because they 've been kept under government lock and key **_**for more than 55 YEARS**_**.**
**Until today.**
[ See the uncensored files](https://substack.com/redirect/04b7b471-40ca-475b-ac92-3c9e856bcb58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. She NEVER thought these files would go public (**and when you see bombshell #1, you 'll understand why.**) **[Watch now](https://substack.com/redirect/04b7b471-40ca-475b-ac92-3c9e856bcb58?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** before this video is scrubbed from the internet forever.
* * *
_**(Piece continues)**_
Minneapolis Spring is an activist group that was heavily involved in publicizing the "community checkpoints" set up in neighborhoods to stop and demand proof from drivers they were not ICE agents. Irony seemed to be lost on them for utilizing such a tactic.
Minneapolis Spring and similar groups also promise the week will feature:
• Political education
• Rapid responder and legal observer training
• A massive increase in friendly commuters and anti-ice patrols
• Strategic discussion
• A range of protests and direct actions targeting ICE and their collaborators
"Bring the Heat and Melt the ICE!" the final call to action states.
The phrase to pay attention to is the pledge to have "direct actions targeting ICE." "Direct action" is a phrase often used by the far-left to signal to others that the action will be violent or to prepare for violence.
Whatever takes place, the "direct actions" will test the Minneapolis Police Department and other law enforcement agencies on if they are able to help ICE and Border Patrol with containing riots or public unrest. Remember that MPD was at first told to not help federal agents with crowd control, leading to chaotic scenes.

**➤➤ ICYMI: Democratic Secretaries of State Push Back on Voter Suppression**
* * *
Friend, Six Democratic Secretaries of State – from Connecticut, Maine, Minnesota, Oregon, Rhode Island, and Vermont – **just sent a powerful letter to GOP congressional leaders denouncing two dangerous bills** : the SAVE America Act and the so-called Make Elections Great Again Act. These bills would:
* Create massive new barriers to voter registration
* Force costly, chaotic overhauls of state election systems
* Impose unfunded federal mandates on already under-resourced states
* Risk exposing sensitive voter data
* Disrupt election preparations just months before critical midterms

The Secretaries were clear: our elections are already free, fair, and secure – and Congress should be supporting election officials, not undermining them. Now we need to show that voters stand with them. [**Will you sign your name to support these Secretaries of State and demand Congress reject these voter suppression bills?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125920434/603331880/1840340821?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzU4NjJkNS0zOTEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hoDwbmeLiNt9Vwuz5aGvyCcwXZ4P_SqVHChRFcS8QJg=&emci=c66616e0-ac0e-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&emdi=8c5862d5-3910-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&ceid=26828920) | | | **[SIGN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125920435/603331881/1840340821?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzU4NjJkNS0zOTEwLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2E1NzU5M2YiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hoDwbmeLiNt9Vwuz5aGvyCcwXZ4P_SqVHChRFcS8QJg=&emci=c66616e0-ac0e-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&emdi=8c5862d5-3910-f111-a69a-000d3a57593f&ceid=26828920)**

This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior.
Whether it's...

* Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory
* Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement
* Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities

It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING.
_But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place._
Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact.
After seeing that, I knew I had to step in.
**_[So my good friend Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I got to talking. We think if we can get 10,000 God-fearing Conservatives to pitch in 10 bucks each, then we may just be able to dig our way out of this hole we're in.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=00355b5f591a48bf834f2ccee1b5d19d&_e=yo5lzgCblUQmF1ADIauSiCLUeIEJwZK5jo9N6sviDMHeoLBzNm-h2R4qlMWPPdI1uZePXrNWb-KE-oRDB0lW9cFf1zsE48010nn33a6Oxhooojb9k-gy4GBv0ePS7J3n7hxc5tqnbdbIXmpYe8kx0ePa3hxsh-N1Lf94a1erUFLoslW58D2O2b6fr6A6tN6f2PNo-FQSu4FTWCQhSYSUL4p6GWRR5VjJtcjmDoM_qdriSrs1kvKAx9VBw3hg_YLudcZc_asvx-xqGzMdqMA6P7hw66oOc7cbcJRboMjRewWQ4g3SLsYom4hdWu4drYRjZ0ZJK-FlZ-CmBpxdsWURLUOrvsDgcbSGp4swipRQopGq8-Nc-YPgj-uIT7UzopFK3RVd0s0H4ke73_sWhfDKRCqWTvflKQGz3U2lItqT6H2rqHl-r-zTPzAexG7ReKp16WF0C1b1soqXGV7HjtKn0qhxFUbMy_U5qORULqwQqveFQAwyP5w7Xt7s4SoAFpTcneYG8hM9_TMqdKBF2P6IE3JuComvy13OoSr7KLAZV3_61SLIruZukfxHJe6oNHkz94SlbLQRu9rEXj5pmetTquQ8tr5f3gVEUarXx-2LRuFA5nxsg6QbKiFe5k7nj45MemTV6MHjCzHVAnNmGAiAChEpVUAGK5Z2wSjVN8HgGlB-aLd6LK7gF0Xxim0jbIFjrLlxjFvHd40q6iUTVMlc5OgXw-CdbUoC74k3Ta4yETsepfJOD12XDObBLrQ9bfIsqBxRlGSkDY1BX-TyO4cLIPEb2Y4qNYKIq2UwFWPEq8AxQV_nn_AOkZpPpubL4lailCTXA7HJxjOAvzPdPNAOWw%3D%3D)_**
