clean_body: This ain’t the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack. This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior. Whether it's... Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING. But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place. Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact. After seeing that, I knew I had to step in. Do you reckon you could be one of those Conservatives? we all step up and work together I think we'll be able to keep these Democrats at bay and continue to deliver wins for good, hard workin' Americans. But I can 't do it without you, Fellow American. Thanks for hearing me out, John N. Kennedy + top Conservative leaders at the heart of our MAGA Movement have reached out with GRAVE WARNINGS on the state of the Midterms like NEVER BEFORE... Democrat controlled House would be the worst-case scenario for the MAGA Movement. We're pleading with you to take this seriously. | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Peter,

I wanted to reach out personally before tonight.

Standing up to ICE when policies cross the line isn’t always the easiest political move. **_But I didn’t run for Congress to pick the easy fights_**. I ran to stand up for people who don’t always have someone standing up for them.

We can have immigration enforcement and still treat people with dignity. We can have a system that doesn’t tear families apart or target people who are simply trying to live and work in peace. That balance matters to me.

In an election year, every stance is watched. Every vote is counted. And the strength behind this campaign determines how clearly I can keep speaking out.

subject: What happens after a child is rescued?
body:
Rescue saves lives--but healing needs a home

| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9cdf7ac3e2ff4186b1758d631910d81a&_e=VM9gENZjp67cXXnIaR721qbxp6u5khn84BLBSvnQqvrQgSnkwrcK4YhDPEZtBGqrEpxlb-JS-lnL3521j0OfXlkgnOpEk4tqRA4FZelH-Pw6rr-z23IFyi_JsMBX5piyMNw0UAlFx3XBQR1SyFhqzJ7GxUC_yi-UWFmlIJ52pnUoEOT-fl-0iu4-EOZlLRC4CPQmHTCI2YpG7_xzjCi6ujSwPLdVuN12P6Fe8LnG3kmpdETOHCZMj5I2R0d-X_yuYvmkal3FCe_7JzvCt2xH1bOt6hqmyUPea1DMXjFPQBerAPPtpE15c_9VyJKitQwgzE9w5Mk65YScOpb7YcfOHekGi3okOrwK7nFtvIEAcGgtbQyIEQvvoS0t2tHppNjg4VvVLnBYOp72YWH031IvBVlzHTcyIRHh48Te_L-GHuK3kDzeSy21SaiFC6LqgCbrhlczC7giXPdSVIjARJloW31yZ6NrAlPIqkmfBbNA2QdTDCmrck158bWGDl3KTFFr1kEu9sQi1fzJNZS2IITzgi8tQ1kbcL4c2YqlWC4TXcZ6MD2lrJKLPR49xLo35Owd6PDvYTwYngzGGThNM1Nhi9DQ--3AG08LUYChz619vaxfQzjCGE9INo6rtDMw6xZRv0gdI1tjnS7qpkwvwNvHukdiNPOx_csU9rPKaFPTT9uOjHE1BPBvmTJ1IhniOIHyLoWqIvfsbrIvjrOq8qK-bGBuGz2kWSa3JrfHiscPTXl6R0qmnZ1tKN6S-KWV50Cd_5Ge8AManbBYKS3jWmU_3w%3D%3D)
---
| |
---
| GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE
---
|
---
| | Friend,
---
I want to share something most people never see. When a child is rescued from sex trafficking, the danger may be over... but the pain is not. **Their body is free.**
But their heart, mind, and spirit are often still trapped. Many have nowhere safe to go. No bed of their own.
No warm meal waiting.
No trusted adult to say,
**" You are safe now. You are loved."** This is why the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** exists. The **Sound of Freedom Foundation** was created after the success of the film _Sound of Freedom_ --to turn awareness into action.

Its mission is simple and urgent: **to stop the sale of God 's children** by supporting rescue, protection, and long-term healing for victims of trafficking. Every day, the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** works with trusted partners to help ensure that rescued children are not forgotten.**Because rescue is not the end of a child 's story.** Children who have survived trafficking carry deep trauma--
fear, shame, confusion, and pain no child should ever know. **They need more than freedom alone.**
**They need healing.** And healing begins in a home. That is why one of the Foundation's key partners is the House Parent Project.
---
[ **Give a Child a Place To Go**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9cdf7ac3e2ff4186b1758d631910d81a&_e=VM9gENZjp67cXXnIaR721qbxp6u5khn84BLBSvnQqvrQgSnkwrcK4YhDPEZtBGqrEpxlb-JS-lnL3521j0OfXlkgnOpEk4tqRA4FZelH-Pw6rr-z23IFyi_JsMBX5piyMNw0UAlFx3XBQR1SyFhqzJ7GxUC_yi-UWFmlIJ52pnUoEOT-fl-0iu4-EOZlLRC4CPQmHTCI2YpG7_xzjCi6ujSwPLdVuN12P6Fe8LnG3kmpdETOHCZMj5I2R0d-X_yuYvmkal3FCe_7JzvCt2xH1SjWXSAwYD7IEt8tMJ9kDEvh7tkMpHES3FSaBwQkmWz5khHVy_Zhsr4o7Rx8UxrJmK5wUZ6kcflKLuVYUm9Wp0jTDZbRY2NtAmPov82_Xh2TZXaiXNnN2Rgn_nWoPAR0_uhOSkJYGvpJw6jNYSMZHxpOAqAMrlnV6xRcs3FvRohJoxDR5Gb2qd5JcNivTUoiDLZRm6ADfBau5JzzeAfcsmdBaLhzljXmklrNDD66GtN2YueyCfc18Fi1Zdfo3kx8K39qpFzaxHylUvy8OeFPf9kET67DPxn185j-zlKMrDeRvXtHnk20DDczPe4KiAqYPuVJUz3yEpwpc3M8ubyQIIIifAr2LHZaq_y06jvfzerzucnkaHH-zYuw_TzXMnVTifj2YnDMlYf5yTC4tCTvlGaV_O8EIAXx7dT0MhyEXfJcU0-zrOYSVqnFg1cXwfKGCcMmBR73plIS6hmNoMw6oMklBWKR167fFQEqsN7WUb-fEdbZ1nbdogi23EBsY762Tg%3D%3D)
---
The House Parent Project is a nationwide network of **trauma-informed, faith-filled homes** created specifically for children rescued from sex trafficking who have _no place to go_.

It exists to answer one heartbreaking cry heard again and again after rescues: "I have no place to go." Through this partnership, rescued children are not sent back into uncertainty.

They are welcomed into safety--into homes where healing can finally begin. In these homes, dedicated house parents provide:
---
* Immediate safe shelter
* Nutritious meals and clean clothing
* Medical and trauma-informed mental-health care
* Secure transportation and protection
* And most of all--consistent, loving adults who pray, listen, and stay

---
These house parents provide more than a roof. **They create an environment where a child can finally sleep without fear. **
**Where nightmares begin to fade. **
**Where trust is slowly rebuilt. **One little girl told us the first night she stayed in her house parent's home was the first night she had ever slept through the night. **That is what your generosity makes possible.** When you give, you are helping place a rescued child into a home of restoration. Jesus said,
_" I was a stranger, and you welcomed me."_ When you support this work, you are welcoming a child who has been rescued from evil-- and reminding them that God has not abandoned them.
---
[ **Give a Child a Place To Go**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9cdf7ac3e2ff4186b1758d631910d81a&_e=VM9gENZjp67cXXnIaR721qbxp6u5khn84BLBSvnQqvrQgSnkwrcK4YhDPEZtBGqrEpxlb-JS-lnL3521j0OfXlkgnOpEk4tqRA4FZelH-Pw6rr-z23IFyi_JsMBX5piyMNw0UAlFx3XBQR1SyFhqzJ7GxUC_yi-UWFmlIJ52pnUoEOT-fl-0iu4-EOZlLRC4CPQmHTCI2YpG7_xzjCi6ujSwPLdVuN12P6Fe8LnG3kmpdETOHCZMj5I2R0d-X_yuYvmkal3FCe_7JzvCt2xH1RhKeXAhTom6pblKDnChJQsDWvGtdj6KO1RYiIHs9WQrDv3asqrg97Fa9I78FLT3z5IX580_hMsxQ3bU3CnXF4dXHqFo6OsrGiaOK-8t_V5Fxv6TqEg9GWuB3555X9Ny7Eykvd9tcqanZGVY2IAsbzIuIjdBeVZrmaKZ7iN6v2Zjfr1ocMbMJ_I9gFFR-l6oZaLis_9qy374rW6OKK75awKwNCL7FCSfqttwM1kUZThU5Rr8Gf9eHJuy_F2fNgaTEj6G9CUYeb6Eumvlr-isqoIy1p2nIYQRZbvwXfGaqDcCiXiGnNl6rQByBgcmE551OccFX9ntU_FVfG4caU5j3gA6W3wJpgV61FZGZS1QfgLpWknlBnpZYSmGioLZIdP8FyUKvj0swKClhC7X98hTeELHMkJoVsuMKFt1CbssgP-Da3ShLtbUi2DdAqqwy55XbPyQUxhY3A95hijtpeL99xL-ADzHhX89CtoC0IcxHKMv2ey7KswLsJgKjHIg7octKw%3D%3D)
---
One survivor's story shows why this matters so deeply. Her name is **Theresa Flores**. Theresa was trafficked as a teenage honor student--
right here in America.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9cdf7ac3e2ff4186b1758d631910d81a&_e=VM9gENZjp67cXXnIaR721qbxp6u5khn84BLBSvnQqvrQgSnkwrcK4YhDPEZtBGqrEpxlb-JS-lnL3521j0OfXlkgnOpEk4tqRA4FZelH-Pw6rr-z23IFyi_JsMBX5piyMNw0UAlFx3XBQR1SyFhqzJ7GxUC_yi-UWFmlIJ52pnUoEOT-fl-0iu4-EOZlLRC4CPQmHTCI2YpG7_xzjCi6ujSwPLdVuN12P6Fe8LnG3kmpdETOHCZMj5I2R0d-X_yuYvmkal3FCe_7JzvCt2xH1cOojFH5G1DyO3c7VUL06Uu2SZB94tkJkq8cz-jrpRzWjNG40rLcEhgw9J7q2g-6-2bP9sXNkFyY-f0_W_ZWb7Zer0LyfxkQGx2MR7mYK49l1m-q71VH-Utx1W2Wjaqkdqnwh9uE98ksFaeB6jEpX2NpBj0OjJw4OfmR9frYmxpuMaDzXlpRBxP2eKZ2ygCa9zW4crE_0r8_QMTQXLxw1j7-RqMFY88Yv6hHqsPOsTR3SIXoYt1LRGrAod7T_BHbUxNNMaK-5SAYR8rYdsfNBAQkNDZpwSLDoQbMH5VBj6LJxsdQawqOdoxh2BaSKnfeq-GjTiDm53O5fmxP_KHwR2dOXqo3nPb0EQRh4ralpOnHgMGNPOd1iAhrdEgYItNe7QRjB8NzG3-EMpdJm9ed_THTznSxiT9JDOR6vAdH4AceK7dV4J-EV15-DwFyH5fRGVY1QSrcWM5AvqmZj7Q5_tVucIWwsWXbyg5zC8e4qfRMxo3SjYFuxTdnUx5B4dpHRQ%3D%3D)
---
Hidden in plain sight.
Living at home while being exploited at night. For years, she carried the trauma in silence. **But God restored her voice.** Today Theresa Flores is a nationally respected survivor advocate and educator who works alongside organizations like the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** to expose how trafficking happens--and how healing is possible. Her journey--from captivity to courage--is told in her book, _The Slave Across the Street_.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9cdf7ac3e2ff4186b1758d631910d81a&_e=VM9gENZjp67cXXnIaR721qbxp6u5khn84BLBSvnQqvrQgSnkwrcK4YhDPEZtBGqrEpxlb-JS-lnL3521j0OfXlkgnOpEk4tqRA4FZelH-Pw6rr-z23IFyi_JsMBX5piyMNw0UAlFx3XBQR1SyFhqzJ7GxUC_yi-UWFmlIJ52pnUoEOT-fl-0iu4-EOZlLRC4CPQmHTCI2YpG7_xzjCi6ujSwPLdVuN12P6Fe8LnG3kmpdETOHCZMj5I2R0d-X_yuYvmkal3FCe_7JzvCt2xH1VT1UJOIADNyLrJ1TeWwPpuedKiVR2DvUesXKa6zrDR7LT-MgoEXZG7g7wvmuNsKXbq44YpUIoVx6wcKh2WNFtQI2mp5-MXFpX_maLn5JFfwttC-iLhu8_vWUeBUuLMjtpONpUw1gAPZRQbhJF6j26qKbnuh_DAV2QeHim2RbNPLpnJqIiCAhQF9wfkDdZ0nuKKnG8oYQ8sLd4JxbDgg-HPIDcO5yMI37fUBzE_E2JcQAsD0O2nIL3nJw84xrzEb_NnkKN-bY1hMIyhIqoGEgnuQTBluj1F2EAIGEOs31zJCxNvxWMLecNL8dOgxJ2vvD13s9iKDlvs4Rxi7A_3pM3sTGFKIK1fvj_RQtsm4_fZzLe6g9-8gjF8Kcu0AUVp7lBxW0dAnL2he37bxM5yS16Ia8H1O-y3qiXGI6dIMbIM0N6JcccXL-Zre8tXzcs_h1-OGF7-U1jpYSjUxIjv4BUvSDVIuQrVmkQWMe46g7pa6GUFC4-rqKGbM7sh2RJLA-g%3D%3D)
---
In this deeply personal story, Theresa explains how children can be trafficked while living at home. She explains how trauma affects the body and soul...
and how **healing begins when survivors are surrounded by safety, care, and faith.** As a thank-you, I would be honored to send you a copy of _The Slave Across the Street_ with a **gift of** **$60 or more** --to help expand the House Parent Project and provide more safe homes for rescued children.

clean_body: Rescue saves lives--but healing needs a home | | | | | | GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE | | | Friend, I want to share something most people never see. When a child is rescued from sex trafficking, the danger may be over... but the pain is not. Their body is free. But their heart, mind, and spirit are often still trapped. Many have nowhere safe to go. No bed of their own. No warm meal waiting. No trusted adult to say, " You are safe now. You are loved." This is why the Sound of Freedom Foundation exists. The Sound of Freedom Foundation was created after the success of the film Sound of Freedom --to turn awareness into action. Its mission is simple and urgent: to stop the sale of God 's children by supporting rescue, protection, and long-term healing for victims of trafficking. Every day, the Sound of Freedom Foundation works with trusted partners to help ensure that rescued children are not forgotten.Because rescue is not the end of a child 's story. Children who have survived trafficking carry deep trauma-- fear, shame, confusion, and pain no child should ever know. They need more than freedom alone. They need healing. And healing begins in a home. That is why one of the Foundation's key partners is the House Parent Project. The House Parent Project is a nationwide network of trauma-informed, faith-filled homes created specifically for children rescued from sex trafficking who have no place to go. It exists to answer one heartbreaking cry heard again and again after rescues: "I have no place to go." Through this partnership, rescued children are not sent back into uncertainty. They are welcomed into safety--into homes where healing can finally begin. In these homes, dedicated house parents provide: Immediate safe shelter Nutritious meals and clean clothing Medical and trauma-informed mental-health care Secure transportation and protection And most of all--consistent, loving adults who pray, listen, and stay These house parents provide more than a roof. They create an environment where a child can finally sleep without fear. Where nightmares begin to fade. Where trust is slowly rebuilt. One little girl told us the first night she stayed in her house parent's home was the first night she had ever slept through the night. That is what your generosity makes possible. When you give, you are helping place a rescued child into a home of restoration. Jesus said, " I was a stranger, and you welcomed me." When you support this work, you are welcoming a child who has been rescued from evil-- and reminding them that God has not abandoned them. One survivor's story shows why this matters so deeply. Her name is Theresa Flores. Theresa was trafficked as a teenage honor student-- right here in America. Hidden in plain sight. Living at home while being exploited at night. For years, she carried the trauma in silence. But God restored her voice. Today Theresa Flores is a nationally respected survivor advocate and educator who works alongside organizations like the Sound of Freedom Foundation to expose how trafficking happens--and how healing is possible. Her journey--from captivity to courage--is told in her book, The Slave Across the Street. In this deeply personal story, Theresa explains how children can be trafficked while living at home. She explains how trauma affects the body and soul... and how healing begins when survivors are surrounded by safety, care, and faith. As a thank-you, I would be honored to send you a copy of The Slave Across the Street with a gift of $60 or more --to help expand the House Parent Project and provide more safe homes for rescued children. Your generosity is not just funding rescue. It's providing a bed, a meal, a protector and a future. It 's helping a child believe they are worth saving. **Thank YOU for caring. Thank YOU for taking the time to see what happens after rescue. And thank you for believing that God 's children are not for sale. With gratitude and prayer, Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

Here’s a quick recap of what’s at stake and what could come next. = But we have tools to respond to such a ruling. And the worst-case scenario does not need to become reality. Across the South, with support from grassroots activists like you, the Fair Fight Action team will work to stop racially discriminatory voting maps from getting passed at the state level. We’ll advocate for pro-democracy reforms to secure fair representation. We’ll shine a light on unfair maps that silence communities of color. And we’ll never stop fighting for a democracy where all of us have the freedom to make our voices heard. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- In solidarity, The Fair Fight Action Team * = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2026 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. Howdy pardner, Let’s talk rodeo, since this weekend is the 101st _La Fiesta de los Vaqueros_ in Tucson. How does that have anything to do with politics? Elections and rodeo are more alike than you might think. The mayhem, the excitement, the constant manure — lots of that. Deciding to run for office isn’t quite like plopping yourself down on top of 2,000 pounds of angry, twisting, bucking muscle, but sometimes you still need the fearlessness of a bull-rider to put yourself out there in front of the public. Just you and your ideas out there in the arena in front of all those people, risking it all. But just like in rodeo, there’s a lot of people backing you up. That’s where this team comes in. We’re there like the pickup riders that get a fallen rider out of the way of hoofs and horns, or, the clowns making sure that the bull is distracted until everyone is safe. **[So, can you pitch in a few bucks in honor of the Tucson rodeo and help us keep the show going by supporting Democrats across the state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125921232/603334014/-639501641?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260222_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTY4ZTQ3YTQtNDExMC1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhNTc1OTNmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=44K4461tNEKb4Zug-5pEesk3dOoL75__cBNiy-9siOI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125921233/603334015/1861397980?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260222_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTY4ZTQ3YTQtNDExMC1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhNTc1OTNmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=44K4461tNEKb4Zug-5pEesk3dOoL75__cBNiy-9siOI=)

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

name: Team Deb Haaland
subject: Deb has never been afraid to be the first
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=7654%2E400544%2EFw2BnG)
---
Deb has never been afraid to be the first, friend.

She went from being one of the first two Native American women elected to Congress to the first Native American Cabinet secretary — **and now, she's ready to make history once again by winning in New Mexico and becoming the first-ever Native American governor.**

But she can't do it alone: [Will you chip in what you can to help power her campaign?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4677?refcode=jtk275-fr-nd&t=2&akid=7654%2E400544%2EFw2BnG)
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4677?refcode=jtk275-fr-nd&t=3&akid=7654%2E400544%2EFw2BnG)
---
Deb's campaign is historic, but most importantly, it's a testament to her promise to be a fighter. Coming from 35 generations of Laguna Pueblo women, she is both of and for New Mexico — **and she's spent her entire career fighting for her neighbors and community.**
**Now, she's ready to take that****determination and strength****to the governor's office.
**
Deb is ready to build an education system that gives every child the chance to dream big, protect affordable healthcare, and ensure our streets are safe by providing law enforcement with the tools and technology they need. _But she can't get there without you._
**_[Please, if you believe in Deb's vision for New Mexico, chip in $5 or whatever you can comfortably spare right now to help her win in November and make history once more.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4677?refcode=jtk275-fr-nd&t=4&akid=7654%2E400544%2EFw2BnG)_**

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I'm respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
Hi there, it’s Jon Ossoff. I’m writing to ask, directly, if you’ll make a $10 donation to my reelection campaign before our February fundraising deadline.

I’m the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Donald Trump won in 2024. That makes me the GOP’s top target.

To win, and win big, we’re building the most ambitious statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen. That means more organizers, more rallies, and more direct outreach to voters in every corner of the state.

If everyone reading this chipped in just $10, we’d hit our goal tonight. But the reality is: not everyone gives. That’s why your support today matters so much.

[****So I’m asking: Will you make a contribution before our February fundraising drive ends?****](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-feb26.GJoCgS&refcode=em260222-2-f&t=1&akid=1688%2E5691347%2EZf-Zik)

Thank you for everything. Jon Ossoff |
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-feb26.GJoCgS&refcode=em260222-2-f&t=2&akid=1688%2E5691347%2EZf-Zik)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=1688%2E5691347%2EZf-Zik) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1688%2E5691347%2EZf-Zik) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

**[I was the only Member of Congress to call for Prince Andrew’s arrest.](https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor//pkg0944-ag3097-email-eml-fls?xuna=v1%3AeyJhZ3kiOiIwMjkiLCJhc2siOiIwMDEiLCJjbGkiOiIwODciLCJpc3MiOiIwMDEiLCJtZWQiOiJlbWFpbCIsInBrZyI6IlBLRzA5NDQiLCJzdXIiOiIwMDAiLCJ3byI6IkFHMzA5NyJ9&recurring=true&amount=26&xuno=464c3237383336&utm_medium=email&utm_term=aegean&xunv=aegean&xutm=02009801)** **Now, I need your help putting him behind bars for _LIFE._** Peter, it’s Nancy Mace. Months ago, I called for the arrest of Prince Andrew. _**On his 66th birthday, our wishes were granted.**_ **[But I’m not stopping here. In fact, I’m not stopping until EVERY last pedophile in Epstein’s Black Book is sitting in a cold, dark jail cell.](https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor//pkg0944-ag3097-email-eml-fls?xuna=v1%3AeyJhZ3kiOiIwMjkiLCJhc2siOiIwMDEiLCJjbGkiOiIwODciLCJpc3MiOiIwMDEiLCJtZWQiOiJlbWFpbCIsInBrZyI6IlBLRzA5NDQiLCJzdXIiOiIwMDAiLCJ3byI6IkFHMzA5NyJ9&recurring=true&amount=26&xuno=464c3237383336&utm_medium=email&utm_term=aegean&xunv=aegean&xutm=02009801)** **Peter** , I was just a kid when I was raped by my attacker – about the same age as many of the women absued by Epstein. _Too young. Too vulnerable. Too innocent to experience such brutal, life-altering pain._ **But by the grace of God, I made it to the other side.** Jesus carried me through trauma, heartbreak, single motherhood, public failure, and private grief. Being a rape survivor wasn’t the end of my story, but that doesn’t mean I’ll ever forget what happened to me. **It’s part of the reason why I ran for Congress, and now why I’m running for Governor.** [**Because when I finally found my voice and spoke out about my abuse, NO ONE was there to help me.**](https://secure.winred.com/nancy-mace-for-governor//pkg0944-ag3097-email-eml-fls?xuna=v1%3AeyJhZ3kiOiIwMjkiLCJhc2siOiIwMDEiLCJjbGkiOiIwODciLCJpc3MiOiIwMDEiLCJtZWQiOiJlbWFpbCIsInBrZyI6IlBLRzA5NDQiLCJzdXIiOiIwMDAiLCJ3byI6IkFHMzA5NyJ9&recurring=true&amount=26&xuno=464c3237383336&utm_medium=email&utm_term=aegean&xunv=aegean&xutm=02009801)

| | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.
---

name: James Walkinshaw
subject: Virginia is fighting back

body:
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260222-207&t=1&akid=207%2E12592%2E9SYUXn)
Friends,
Right now, Donald Trump is bullying Republican-controlled states across the country to redraw their congressional maps mid-decade.
They're trying to drown out our voices and lock in their power.
**But Virginia is fighting back. This April, we have a chance to level the playing field with a temporary redistricting amendment – one that's transparent, puts voters in charge, and gives both parties a fair shot in the midterm elections.**
Early voting starts next month, so we don’t have much time to educate voters across the Commonwealth about what this amendment actually does and why it matters.
[**So, will you please donate to Virginians for Fair Elections right now to help us pass this amendment and defeat Trump’s mid-decade redistricting scheme?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260222_2.tH11wF&amount=3&refcode=20260222-207&t=2&akid=207%2E12592%2E9SYUXn)

James Walkinshaw

name: Yen Bailey
subject: Volunteer Today to Save Democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YEN BAILEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | |
---
[|
---](https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=1d2873e3b5&e=58216231a8)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Hello from the Yen Bailey Campaign,
We are reaching out because you have previously expressed interest in volunteering with our campaign! With a Special Election potentially on the way, we would greatly appreciate any assistance you could offer in flipping District 2.
If you would like to assist in a campaign taking on the establishment and returning ethics to Congress, then our campaign is the place for you! Please see the link below to join today!
---
| |

Let’s prove that people, not politics, decide the future of this district.
Thank you for standing with me,
— Yen BaileyCandidate for FL Congressional District 2
---
|
---
| | | | | | | Yen Bailey’s journey began with her parents, who fled war-torn Vietnam. Her father, a South Vietnamese Air Force pilot, bravely escaped the fall of Saigon by flying with his crew and dozens of Vietnamese refugees. They settled in Destin, Florida, where Yen and her brother were born and raised. Witnessing her parents' sacrifices and resilience deeply influenced Yen, inspiring her to pursue a career in law and public service.

[ ](https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=f42e244023&e=58216231a8)

A Tallahassee-based attorney and Tulane University and Florida State University Law School graduate, Yen has dedicated her career to public service. She served as a Senior Attorney for the Guardian ad Litem Program and spent over 13 years as an ethics attorney at The Florida Bar. Committed to her family, Yen stepped away from her law career at the Bar to care for her elderly father.

Yen is a proud wife and mother. She cherishes time with her husband, Steve Bailey, a lawyer and professor at Florida State University and former Army Green Beret, and their two teenage sons.

Yen’s dedication to civic engagement led her to co-found Every Vote Florida, a nonprofit voter outreach organization, where she served as Vice President. She also served on the board of Friends of the LeRoy Collins Public Library System, promoting literacy and supporting public libraries in Leon County.

Yen is running for office to address the needs and challenges of the average Floridian in the panhandle, believing her opponent, Neal Dunn, has failed to do so. For years, many in the district have felt neglected and left behind by Dunn, and Yen wants to be a voice for all in Washington D.C.

With her extensive background in public service and dedication to the community, Yen Bailey offers a fresh perspective for District 2. Her journey from the daughter of immigrants to a congressional candidate embodies the American dream and the power of perseverance.

---
| [JOIN YEN BAILEY TODAY](https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=7af8e11c82&e=58216231a8)
---
| | PAID FOR BY YEN BAILEY FOR CONGRESS
---
| | | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/yenbaileyforcongress/volunteer-today-to-save-democracy?e=58216231a8)
Yen Bailey for Congress * PO Box 12699 * Tallahassee, FL 32312 * USA
[update your preferences](https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/profile?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=7f5618c668&e=58216231a8&c=6c7d7f4e35) or [unsubscribe](https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=7f5618c668&t=b&e=58216231a8&c=6c7d7f4e35)

name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: House votes 218-213 to pass biggest voting rights rollback in American history — we need to respond
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTM1MDAwMTES1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjQwMDgxNjkzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
DEVELOPING... MAGA Republicans in the House have voted 218-213 to advance their newest version of the anti-voter SAVE Act, the so-called "SAVE America Act." If allowed to become law, this would be the biggest federal attack on voting
rights in American history.It would imperil online voter registration, mail voter registration, and voter
registration drives, unravelling hard-won access to the ballot box for millions of eligible voters. We need to respond immediately. Please, renew your LCV membership for just $5 to help us raise $20,000 before the end of this month to power our work to protect voting rights and ensure that everyday people aren’t denied a voice in our democracy >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~ Let’s be clear: the politicians pushing the anti-voter SAVE Act and SAVE America
Act know that their agenda is wildly unpopular.Backed by billionaires and corporate polluters, they’re the same ones working to
end protections for clean air and water, fast-track fossil fuel projects, ban
clean energy, and sell off our public lands. To lock in their corporate agenda,
they want to pick their voters rather than letting voters pick them. Because these attacks on our democracy are so unpopular, we have a real chance
to stop them — but we need your help to campaign as hard as possible. There’s so much at stake, Peter. Here’s what these bills would do: Require people to present proof of citizenship like a passport or birth certificate in person just to register to vote or update their registrations — documents tens of millions of Americans don’t readily have access to.Make it harder for married women and others who have changed their names to register and cast a ballot.Create new barriers for military voters, rural voters, disabled voters, and communities of color.Open the door to purging eligible voters from the rolls under the guise of "verification." We can’t let them get away with this, Peter. The stakes are too high
for too many people and too many communities. Renew your membership for just $5 today to help push back against attempts by MAGA politicians to pass dangerous policies that will lead to dirtier air, more polluted waters, and worse health for everyday people >> https://links.messages.lcv. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP FOR JUST $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. Our democracy and our environment are inseparable: we can’t protect our climate,
our public lands, and our communities if politicians are given free rein to
manipulate who gets to vote. We can’t let them force their unpopular,
destructive policies through without the American people having a say. The midterm elections in November will shape the future of our nation for
decades. MAGA Republicans are working overtime to tilt the ballot in their
favor, so they can continue to do Trump’s bidding even amidst unprecedented
backlash from the people. Renew your membership while it’s only $5 today. Every gift moves us closer to our $20,000 goal and strengthens our ability to respond in this critical moment. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f0j~ Thanks for standing with us. We won’t give in. Chris Brooks
Vice President, Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13500011&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjQwMDgxNjkzNAS2&spReportId=MjQwMDgxNjkzNAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13500011&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjQwMDgxNjkzNAS2&spReportId=MjQwMDgxNjkzNAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_ypT7vr-

name: Courtney Hunt
subject: The SAVE America Act is a sneak attack on women’sright to vote

body:

Hi Peter , it's Courtney Hunt. I want to talk briefly about the SAVE America Act and why it worries both me and Evan.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs6gc2C5hUDUAX_oNaSPVDobFeqfVfzIW2x4J26hzyt88o3zVZirJfGa_zWPPaP01dlL56hPOWeUzCiTwwH4q7RIyBKSq-Fc8XEokuBJhyAcrw65nhZegyN-uhwpgCLo-D9H215Ejsw4hFl6xKqc7Bkt4RbZDaOmLi72BJWJK8vrY4SG-qisS0fDo5xD_FubM8uBIUzSraLd9mFkSUkCUc4tSqBlsMygli-xgpSIBNRYW49mq0BqNdCDkkPa0GySiZvQPw6qgD1fWcEv5_jeFkhgSF5pHqJDN65gD7dcrJA9b-lyQGC9Y2t3_elhWY3ibBvAG7LUhC9GMZ1W3ZYWRG2099n5QIp7h7xpoFx3gPA3A/4od/IrgEg-wGSomxshro062MjQ/h1/h001.6c3QMUhPwPZkr27oul9aRRMbhtpCeN0OQoZAFfXcEfo)
---
Only U.S. citizens can vote in federal elections. **That 's already the law.** When you register, your information is verified against government databases to confirm eligibility. When you vote, you show ID to confirm your identity. The claim that millions of non-citizens are voting has been investigated again and again without evidence. Yet this bill is being sold as if our elections are overrun with fraud. **What it would actually do is require Americans to produce additional proof of citizenship -- such as a passport or birth certificate -- both when registering to vote and at the polls on election day!** That may not sound like a big deal until you think about real life. Millions of married women changed their names like I did. Their birth certificates don't match their current IDs. Tracking down original documents can mean fees, time off work, and navigating government offices during business hours. Many Americans don't have a passport. Many don't know where their birth certificate is. Replacing one isn't instant -- and it isn't free. These barriers fall hardest on working families, low-income citizens, seniors, and LGBTQ Americans whose documents may not align neatly. [**Republicans have been trying to get this bill passed for years, and unless we take back the majority, they will keep trying until they succeed - just as they did with stripping away abortion rights. That's what makes Evan's race to flip TX-03 so critical. Can we count on your support today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs6gc2C5hUDUAX_oNaSPVDobFeqfVfzIW2x4J26hzyt88o3zVZirJfGa_zWPPaP01dlL56hPOWeUzCiTwwH4q7RlaivF-u6CAQ71E9yNhSHJHbpIyzLPTTg3-DLrNGkmJFi6KXGD-UXVZHDuSQxI1kt7I0roZ7Wl1QPZGb3qFRCKT22YTjNwSDCGnvVLAFSkNaUjklY6t3XLDyT2xR84VpQkyRFJjG1sA2JTNsnPNgL3XVz4iSH7qZ-GxqMW34kc_dUlNZC4dG6AB9HzcXUXLm9mh2NWnQoIBrXBaAXHzqSOyhZ7XCeE68xJyzuD4ZIo3CYXVCjxkhF2Wdin_nGcuJL0Bf1Pq7wh9zaHyl_hBmLpg/4od/IrgEg-wGSomxshro062MjQ/h2/h001.xAFqh3ApY8tI9KE5NMFLiKIqUCyTa2-fSxX7pluFQoE)

**I 'll be blunt: This has nothing to do with securing elections and Republicans know it.** They've been pushing this lie about non-citizens voting for YEARS and cannot produce an ounce of evidence that it's happening. **This is about making it harder for Americans to participate in our democracy. About making sure that fewer people vote.** Evan believes protecting democracy means defending both security and access. That's why he's running -- and why this race matters. [**If you 're able, please consider making a contribution to help us flip this seat and stand up for voting rights.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs6gc2C5hUDUAX_oNaSPVDobFeqfVfzIW2x4J26hzyt88o3zVZirJfGa_zWPPaP01dlL56hPOWeUzCiTwwH4q7R-9mYozwE_9DE_kSaQiE9b8V3nxV91R2x5G1S9TVqAjjwBpu2bMY9MeaJMI_S1-MExOPYftPHBmeToXUpGIuq2eiHUpN-5GXlcib3hd08SzjdME9vPnvKn9J-1YV6KOTbjimzTz_dKL0LV8poOMTwgLp0WtrU_qawEYtrqlk4ab39tQ85EHFFA7TYtzWPQ6z64r7g_DWxr0VljQsjrmKoRk1QQc5tCIDc5DAWjoueA78y2CLCvhLeWTPWQ47jF1Nb1abRS84y31Dy2M2vrww4lQ/4od/IrgEg-wGSomxshro062MjQ/h4/h001.8v_OJQ9g95t_Irz097TfQ1A-Cfh76qOVq8n-XPF_31w) We're grateful for your support. name: Crow for Congress
subject: Trump will do whatever it takes to try and defeat Jason. We won’t let that happen.

body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Team, Donald Trump and his administration are trying everything they can to silence their perceived political enemies, including Jason.

When Jason stood up for the Constitution and the rule of law, Trump called for Jason to be arrested, prosecuted, and even executed. That effort failed when a grand jury refused to indict him on bogus charges for the video they filmed last year, simply reminding their fellow servicemembers to follow the law.

Not only did Jason stand tall in the face of these threats, he took the fight to them–demanding Jeanine Pirro preserve all evidence and prepare for a potential lawsuit over their failed attempt to politicize our justice system.

That’s going to make Trump even angrier and more determined to defeat Jason.

Jason just launched his re-election campaign and promised to keep fighting to protect free speech, defend our democracy, and flip the House blue this November. The attacks will only ramp up between now and Election Day — and we have to be ready to fight back.

In this critical moment, we’re asking you to stand with Jason as a Founding Donor for his re-election. Will you step up with a contribution today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-feb26]

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: My last state of the state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
As I prepared this speech, I was thinking about how much you have helped and how much we still need you. |
#
---
Team, I’ll be delivering my final State of the State Address on Wednesday. I’m excited to talk about the progress we’ve made for Michiganders over the past 8 years and the work we’ve still got left to do. **[We’ve accomplished a lot with your help. Having your support in the days and weeks ahead is crucial. If you’re able, will you pitch in $10 to help Fight Like Hell PAC continue our work defending our progress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125922411/603337564/-1561548048?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20260222_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGVlODFiNmQtNDkxMC1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhNTc1OTNmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hG6tQ-S0XsdhqV3o8Y-FJjDicFx5KLnMeePis4OLpFE=)** When I ran for governor in 2018, I visited all 83 counties in Michigan to ensure voters in every corner of the state knew I would fight like hell to deliver real results for them and their families. I promised to protect their fundamental freedoms, make meaningful progress for working families, fix the damn roads, and so much more. **I’m proud to say we’ve kept those promises. We’re continually making Michigan the best place in the country to live, work, and start a family.** While other states have restricted fundamental freedoms, we’ve expanded them. While other states attack working families, we’re made hardworking Michiganders at the center of everything we do. Since I’ve been governor, we’ve saved Michiganders billions of dollars in taxes, created thousands of good-paying jobs, and lowered costs. And team, **we fixed the damn roads**! The balanced, bipartisan budget we passed in October made a record, _nearly $2 billion annual investment_ to fix our state and local roads. That will make everyone's drive safer and faster, and create tens of thousands of good-paying local jobs. **[I’m not just talking about results. I’m delivering them. name: James Carville
subject: This should scare the hell out of every Democrat in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
New Hampshire’s Senate race is tied. And I’m rattled.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100985?refcode=em20260222-10097&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10097%2E614464%2ER5y3C4)
Peter, it’s James Carville.
I’ve worked on more campaigns than I can count, and let me tell you: **I don’t rattle easily.**
But this race in New Hampshire? **It’s TIED. In a dead heat. And that should scare the hell out of every Democrat in the country.**
**[💥Before you read another word, split a $10 donation between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee to help us pull ahead right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100985?refcode=em20260222-10097&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=10097%2E614464%2ER5y3C4)**
**[Chip in Now ››](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100985?refcode=em20260222-10097&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=10097%2E614464%2ER5y3C4)**
Here’s the deal: Jeanne Shaheen is retiring. That means this seat is wide open. **And now John Sununu — yes, one of those Sununus, the long-time New Hampshire political dynasty — is running to flip it red.**
He’s got the name, he’s got the money, and he’s got the full weight of the Republican donor class behind him — from Wall Street to the far-right Super PACs. They see New Hampshire as their ticket to locking down the Senate for another decade.
And right now? **This race is neck-and-neck. It could go either way.**
Chris Pappas is our guy. He’s won the toughest district in New Hampshire four times. He knows how to reach voters across the aisle and build a coalition that wins. But he cannot — _CANNOT_ — do this alone.
So here’s what I need from you:
**[Rush a contribution split between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee today. $10, $25, whatever you can spare to help Chris take the lead and hold the line in New Hampshire.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100985?refcode=em20260222-10097&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=10097%2E614464%2ER5y3C4)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100986?refcode=em20260222-10097&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=5&akid=10097%2E614464%2ER5y3C4) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100986?refcode=em20260222-10097&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=6&akid=10097%2E614464%2ER5y3C4) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100986?refcode=em20260222-10097&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=10097%2E614464%2ER5y3C4) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100986?refcode=em20260222-10097&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=10097%2E614464%2ER5y3C4) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100986?refcode=em20260222-10097&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=10097%2E614464%2ER5y3C4) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100986?refcode=em20260222-10097&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=10097%2E614464%2ER5y3C4) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100985?refcode=em20260222-10097&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=10097%2E614464%2ER5y3C4)
---
The GOP knows if they take New Hampshire, Democrats don’t have a shot at retaking the Senate. And they’re ready to bury us in negative ads and dark money.
We’ve got to fight smarter, faster, and harder. We’ve got to help Chris Pappas build the campaign we need to win. **Let’s show these Republican bigshots that they can’t buy another Senate seat. Not on our watch.**
**[Give what you can right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100985?refcode=em20260222-10097&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=10097%2E614464%2ER5y3C4)** Let’s win this damn thing and flip control of the Senate.
— James Carville

name: Elissa Slotkin for Senate
subject: Today is different
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
You know Elissa...
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2416%2E135344%2EwgFdrk)

**You know Elissa...**
She doesn't particularly like having to send fundraising emails, and we try our best not to fill your inbox daily with fundraising requests for her campaign.
But today is different. Today is a day we have to ask. Here's why:
As you know, last week U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro attempted to persuade a Grand Jury to indict Elissa and a few of her colleagues for making a video President Trump didn't like.
Pirro’s attempt failed, but we have no idea if their efforts are over.
At the same time, we have **a lot** going on in Michigan. We have critical statewide races – including U.S. Senate, Governor, Attorney General, and Secretary of State – three flippable House seats, and a number of other important races all the way down the ballot this cycle. And since Elissa is the one Democrat who won the state at the same time as Trump, she has a big role in helping to ensure we win these races.
And if that wasn't enough... a number of candidates in the Midwest and in red states across the country have asked Elissa to come campaign for them before the upcoming election.
All of these things have a financial cost ... and it means we have to ask those who both understand the stakes of her legal and political fight, and the importance of these campaigns.
So while we try to limit the number of times we ask, right now is one of those days we are hoping you can chip in:
[**Can Elissa count on you to make a contribution to her campaign to help her continue to fight back legally and politically against Trump's efforts at retribution and at the same time help Elissa elect Democrats in Michigan and elsewhere in this election?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sep25.bZDurS&refcode=em251029-1&t=2&akid=2416%2E135344%2EwgFdrk)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-sep25.WUs7Df&amount=3&refcode=em251029-1&t=21&akid=2416%2E135344%2EwgFdrk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-sep25.2zH0rx&refcode=em251029-1&t=22&akid=2416%2E135344%2EwgFdrk)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-sep25.unHWcv&refcode=em251029-1&t=23&akid=2416%2E135344%2EwgFdrk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-sep25.qqU7T-&refcode=em251029-1&t=24&akid=2416%2E135344%2EwgFdrk)**

| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-sep25.WUs7Df&refcode=em251029-1&t=26&akid=2416%2E135344%2EwgFdrk)**

Thank you for your continued support. It means a lot to Elissa.
Team Slotkin
